I intend to have a prime spot on the debate stage for the First Presidential Debate in August.

But, Fellow American, I need your help to get there. I need your help to secure unique, grassroots donations, which will be one of the main requirements to be included in August's debate to discuss how to actually *FIX* our country.

Watch my reaction to the announcement of the first debate here ⬇️⬇️

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c9f7b0c5402546b696fd9917a3d538e6&_e=OW9M8K4LXsD75oJzgRUhpfI23AJehfuwSdkeCXjlTOoVoTJagT9MfMPdCrVB1nu0OQaxjVy-drH6LWe151aUDoAu0dP0WS8xFjp8A3sFaqx5jguOvrIC9YcKQ-A6zXkS0r9VOZlVvdNQTBwbm-epKGM3G2eluwg-BfY8M7I9zJPCeZhmkmMLf9wsCuKJcvsVEd7aXPRDw_bSFlxL4wpgV49UBdy4VzTfej1Tn7_JrrOmvP2do_hM7BgclyKL_mR97NvJwncFoweo56xask_F7wNveac3cCKGA_-1AgVwedSUjS0Am20ivYYO6-bBoUKfrQsnxBzJJ7FNcC7s27YAf2QZ6SPZA1NMGpp9nP9GyV0G4gCX_P1suNyyPNPMq89yTozkTGyLG4OtWs2fPLi_TcU8wIWnvBycdbtQGVzYACI%3D)
It's going to take radical new ideas to put America back on track - and that's ok. We won't deliver national unity by standing in the proverbial "middle," singing kumbaya and compromising. It's by embracing the radicalism of the ideals that birthed America in 1776.

**[Just one dollar (or more) will help us drive forward and get our ideas a prominent spot on the debate stage.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c9f7b0c5402546b696fd9917a3d538e6&_e=OW9M8K4LXsD75oJzgRUhpfI23AJehfuwSdkeCXjlTOoVoTJagT9MfMPdCrVB1nu0OQaxjVy-drH6LWe151aUDoAu0dP0WS8xFjp8A3sFaqx5jguOvrIC9YcKQ-A6zXkS0r9VOZlVvdNQTBwbm-epKGM3G2eluwg-BfY8M7I9zJPCeZhmkmMLf9wsCuKJcvsVEd7aXPRDw_bSFlxL4wpgV49UBdy4VzTfej1Tn7_JrrOmvP2do_hM7BgclyKL_mR97NvJwncFoweo56xask_F7z7CUW18dEY_k_sfq112V3UTFxMJEB4Oau91BVg7dIgoin6lWBAbe_QDMHgWKL-Xi-hUI5N5QJGWM__i_Q1T6hg128QCllH51SF1BykBnULl7LcdpjVM5_Ibm0dm1NeBnBYK2Uip5b-cUY3m7z0CudY%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c9f7b0c5402546b696fd9917a3d538e6&_e=OW9M8K4LXsD75oJzgRUhpfI23AJehfuwSdkeCXjlTOoVoTJagT9MfMPdCrVB1nu0OQaxjVy-drH6LWe151aUDoAu0dP0WS8xFjp8A3sFaqx5jguOvrIC9YcKQ-A6zXkS0r9VOZlVvdNQTBwbm-epKGM3G2eluwg-BfY8M7I9zJPCeZhmkmMLf9wsCuKJcvsVEd7aXPRDw_bSFlxL4wpgV49UBdy4VzTfej1Tn7_JrrOmvP2do_hM7BgclyKL_mR97NvJwncFoweo56xask_F75Z88oWZb6hjiJK86kjWaF9-bW090699Wh-2TGc5Zgm_Cq1RdmbKHcOV54Fkie5xJRZrOwoxYSyubhnvoZ9tAFc_MJswEHL0-Jyd47tvZqAjJKqCynjdYpfqXiEhrlCAqOkjIx9lz1uJOVzwozo_Ogg%3D)

subject: Just over TWO WEEKS out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us May 5th and 6th in Kennewick for the Republican Action Conference! | | |
---
| |
---
| | Hey Peter,

We are just over two weeks away from the 2023 Republican Action Conference, and we're thrilled to introduce some of our amazing guest speakers! Don't miss this opportunity to learn from their experiences and get inspired by their stories.

🗓️ Dates: May 5-6, 2023
📍 Location: Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center

[Register now and join us at the 2023 Republican Action Conference!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7114f23ea5&e=6a281f566d)

---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=faebc30aa4&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
|
## Our incredible line-up of speakers includes:
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b8eec1b65d&e=6a281f566d)
---
| 🎤 **Liz Harrington** : A highly respected political commentator, Liz Harrington currently serves as the spokesperson for President Trump and is the former Republican National Committee (RNC) spokesperson. With a deep understanding of American politics and policy positions, she is a strong advocate for transparency and truth.

🎤 **Jim Walsh** : A dedicated state representative since 2016, Jim Walsh is committed to creating family-wage jobs, adequately funding schools, and protecting taxpayers, property rights, and gun rights. He serves on the House Civil Rights and Judiciary Committee, the Transportation Committee, and the Regulated Substances and Gaming Committee.

🎤 **Joe Kent** : A 20-year veteran of our nation's Special Forces and a widower raising his two young sons, Joe Kent served as a foreign policy advisor to President Trump. Now, he's running for US Congress to restore common sense Republican values and defeat extremist Democrats.

🎤 **Dr. Raul Garcia** : A Cuban immigrant and passionate change-maker, Dr. Garcia is a medical professional who ran for Governor of Washington in 2020. His commitment to improving Washington State and serving its residents continues.

🎤 **Semi Bird** : A former Marine and Special Forces Green Beret, Semi is a Behavioral Scientist, Executive Director of Team Concepts Training and Consulting, and a School Board Director for the Richland School District. He's now running for Governor in Washington State.

🎤 **Kellyanna Brooking** : A 15-year-old high school student and political activist, Kellyanna founded a Turning Point USA hub and started speaking at public events throughout Washington State. She has been featured on national news outlets and is currently working as youth campaign adviser & deputy communications director for Washington State Republican Governor candidate Semi Bird.
---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2727855213&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
| Don't miss this opportunity to hear from these inspiring speakers and participate in engaging panels and workshops at the RAC. Secure your spot today and join us for this unforgettable event!

[See you there!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a2637efc83&e=6a281f566d)

-Team WAGOP
---
| [More Information on our 2023 Republican Action Conference](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=627d268864&e=6a281f566d "More Information on our 2023 Republican Action Conference")
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/rac2023-reminder-1340952?e=6a281f566d)
---

His commitment to improving Washington State and serving its residents continues. 🎤 Semi Bird : A former Marine and Special Forces Green Beret, Semi is a Behavioral Scientist, Executive Director of Team Concepts Training and Consulting, and a School Board Director for the Richland School District. He's now running for Governor in Washington State. 🎤 Kellyanna Brooking : A 15-year-old high school student and political activist, Kellyanna founded a Turning Point USA hub and started speaking at public events throughout Washington State. She has been featured on national news outlets and is currently working as youth campaign adviser & deputy communications director for Washington State Republican Governor candidate Semi Bird. | "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!" | Don't miss this opportunity to hear from these inspiring speakers and participate in engaging panels and workshops at the RAC. name: Don Huffines
subject: my new column… LIBERTY REPORT
body:
"To hold public leaders accountable, you must always assume they are not telling the truth."
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-f/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **The Dallas Express Welcomes Columnist Don Huffines**
## _" To hold public leaders accountable, you must always assume they are not telling the truth."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, April 19, 2023 -- _The Dallas Express_ is pleased to announce that Don Huffines has joined the publication as a featured columnist.A Dallas native and fifth-generation Texan, Huffines has spent decades as a business leader in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex. From 2015 to 2019, he represented local District 16 in the Texas Senate. Just last year, Huffines mounted a campaign for Texas governor.Huffines' column, "Liberty Report," will run every Tuesday in _The Dallas Express_."This column aims to provide valuable and factual information for readers based on my firsthand experience as a State Senator representing Dallas and my 40-year experience as an independent businessman in Dallas," Huffines says of the new project.He adds: "My fight right now is to advance liberty, prosperity, and virtue. I am interested in sharing the hard truth and providing solutions to cure the problems that Texans face, rather than simply putting a bandaid on the issues."Last year, the former senator established the Huffines Liberty Foundation to advance these priorities. _The Dallas Express_ has previously reported on the foundation's work, including studies on subjects such as [property taxes](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-j/) and [corporate tax abatements](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-t/).Huffines sees this research, his previous political service, and his work with _The Dallas Express_ as complementary endeavors."If the people are not educated on the proper role of government, which is always to defend your God-given liberties, then we are all doomed," he argues. "Our founding fathers knew the greatest threat to our liberty was the government they created. If you educate people that to truly experience liberty we must have a virtuous society, the political world is less important when they have a solid foundation. "Huffines adds that "the press should play a huge role" in holding the government accountable to citizens.While he does not see the vast majority of media institutions fulfilling that role today, Huffines appreciates journalists and institutions like _The Dallas Express_ that still observe that duty."These people are so successful," he notes, "because they understand that to hold public leaders accountable, you must always assume they are not telling the truth.""A true patriot does not just have the authority to question government. A true patriot has an obligation to question government."Huffines has contributed occasional opinion pieces to _The Dallas Express _in the past, presenting creative thought on Texas' [border crisis](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-h/). "_The Dallas Express_ is serving a large niche that needs to be filled in the Metroplex," says Huffines. "People need an opportunity to read the news without having to pay for it. ... _The Dallas Express _is challenging traditional media in many ways, to the reader's benefit."_The Dallas Express _is proud to serve as Dallasites' most reliable resource for understanding what's happening in the city and beyond. This includes not just reporting the news to arm our readers with the facts, but giving a platform to key leaders and thinkers who can introduce Dallasites to fresh perspectives and profound insights.The inaugural Liberty Report, "[Overthrowing Our Texan Monarchy](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-k/),"** ** is available to our readers now. The column takes a fresh look at the prospect for term limits in Austin, drawing on Huffines' own experience in the Texas Senate. The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-u/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-b/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-n/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-p/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-z/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-v/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zlriklt-l-e)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-x/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-zlriklt-17329976-yuddtktydi-s) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-zlriklt-yuddtktydi-g/)

Dear Patriot, Below are links to some of the most important news stories today for your consideration. Courtesy of Right Wing Report. |
Dear Concerned American,

Your petition to Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, your Senators, and your Congressman is linked below.

It's vital that you submit your petition immediately.

_Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, and the Big Labor bosses are about to go ballistic_.

I have introduced the National Right to Work Act to repeal forever Big Labor's power to force workers to pay union dues in order to work.

_So the union lobbyists, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and their allies are going to use every trick in the book to bury the National Right to Work Bill_.

And they want to do it as quietly as possible.

_The union kingpins (and their water-carriers in Congress) can't afford the consequences of having their coercive privileges publicly debated and voted on in Congress_!

They don't want the American people to know that: *** _Millions of workers are forced to surrender part of every paycheck to keep their jobs_.

This cash funds violent "organizing" drives, a limousine lifestyle for union bigwigs, and bankrolls radical, tax-and-spend politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Hakeem Jeffries. *** _Big Labor's power is deadly to millions of small businesses_.

Big Labor politicians and stacked bureaucrats are strangling small businesses with confiscatory taxes, destructive laws, and straitjacket regulations. *** _Forced unionism exports millions of good jobs overseas_.

Productivity-killing work rules, workplace class warfare, slowdowns, "sick-outs," and strikes all take their crippling toll, closing the doors of many businesses -- for good. In the fight to force votes on a National Right to Work law, opponents of forced unionism will face a showdown against the full might of Big Labor.

**[That's why it's vital that you act at once to ignite massive public support for a National Right to Work Bill](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0DuWpioUQOHRaMjicFAhMKi7qv55iAqCL8BTvkZ_V3fc8d7RN7RGaS1tObZQK9BKg9bl1EorwfZVI8YBTd0J6Lk2HQ5jV0FjoCp9K7hALgUHAATNgP2AlOqj_lP8qxHfP7KQPHs30eU3l8e4Z2L9vpZLOxHFAr8K8SnEh_LM_rH9ifi5aSnwu9567L2tsHmC8WHe1PkuC-6mOo8Q0dxGV0ErTXsMp1shAt8fzWGfT1uP9N7iGt95FO9BV9z210E4TOSnyOnXXSfXscqzTC66zuwpPP6pJA0zVxjIidfGHNX0qoDKxbcTMpCKISnXiymFnDxKI287_04W70SW5JFihVd9bTPFeGcFGgpRj34q8Ht-V7UdFOqY19CY6W2OcJ7bc6QGTeemcm0rBVoLwDK3Q7z8svijbgrJ3dr55a8htTfLNHLOGdrEGbnTWsNIXfj0zHe1wIs1x602Zhs5IIPpSv8HAAD__2ggorc).**

[](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxskEuSpCAUAE-jS-LBUz4LFz3RXfdA5WchJUhZ6uknetazzMhc5TyMUqnOtmagXFIlFVWq9QNFAbMydJrtpJBjPyndMYRuHmUPPbZhYPDLDCilSBWh5Id2nXzIPxK-BPv-6ZoOSnC-fkJyxWyvUsn0Wts4-Fq3Br8a9mjYo5Yn-U_2K_Fx1tjgN08TTsH2KK5lDMszyeOOEV9jf-zLhuOsYGUpHzrWM5tScz39O7_vU9SuwApiTdIUyAwh3XcSfuRufV8Mgu_p5XV9sthRjh6lVpqrS3q-SWt2W_TTa2fchHu28Lp7qWYNMhmgwsnYg1NzcgzMumW3BRb8ZDBsPMfA4Hj1lwUWMBw0N4yb4Bv8ft6rTHtd-FbWRYz-FvtyHOnas8BRO9-uQy-pUoxiW4Z5-4QYw85F04FbdYj_HtbhJKUaACBoM5DqDmtHUuUHr4kEzRl-iNhPmYgV3YyE-k_-GwAA___K1565)

Now is the time to act.

By the time the Right to Work Bill comes up for a vote, every member of Congress must realize the eyes of the American people will be watching.

_National opinion polls all show that 80% of the American people agree it's wrong to force workers to pay union dues under the threat of being fired if they don't pay_!

And the National Right to Work Committee, who has led the fight against forced dues for over 50 years, must have your help in demonstrating that to Congress.

_If the public's attention is fixed on this battle, Congress will be forced to recognize -- or defy to its peril -- the massive public opposition to compulsory unionism_.

Then we'll see who dares to stand with Big Labor. . .

. . . and who stands with freedom and the American people.

**[It's vital you click to submit your petition to Mitch McConnell, Kevin McCarthy, your Senators, and your Congressman immediately](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0Du2pCoUgOHRaMgCNsImMDh31al5iI8CRFSgfI3-ru644_-PvqE1qLWY6rFlEplGzbSubYtsAKOGsWt6riSlAJQqrUHrBpuukbVrOeVABaeMMWCaMPLLhMA3_of0R_HXr6gETe5jy-niJ43bmgrp16UOrS1lq-Cn4u-Kv0uayT-2PxHeVwkVvGTsoXdTA-r2xvk54vGEAKtpjuw3MG4cdrWdk7svrfvTp1nt-8n0lPf0IF-nL-ucRZPNwX3Qg1-zsp06wx4HNLj2B_1q77c1jo_0u4v2QjTmNF_voDMOFz4zucHNMrdW20PGu2HpQSX1DThSZ7MIPbq1l8D3eLl0PzQ7CFHcoxwvOomKy9HZCl7zs2DMxcstLV4Z-6jsjyPeeVdguo-tl7ZBpjVnUKd22E4XgstSVYJ-ls6Fv4alvUgqI6WUwLRTUj7HNBlS8IS7J66THE6i8oWRTEoMQJg99_8DAAD__63OoEQ)** to demonstrate to Congress and the national media the strong support for Right to Work.

It's all part of the National Right to Work Committee's four-part plan to pass a National Right to Work law: *** _Contact directly by mail up to 10 million supporters_ , urging them to demand their Senators and Congressmen vote for the National Right to Work Bill; *** _Brief personally the hundreds of favorable columnists, radio talk show hosts, and editorial writers nationwide_ who can help mobilize public opinion; *** _Deploy digital advertising through email and across social media_ in the days before the vote to really make Congress feel the heat; and *** _Run TV and radio ads_ targeting swing votes in key states and districts. It is critical in this battle that Congress hears loud and clear from the nearly 80% of Americans who support Right to Work.

Of course, Congress may choose to obey Big Labor bosses rather than the majority of their constituents. That's their choice.

_But time and again, when politicians defied the public and voted for forced unionism, they've paid the price with the end of their political careers_!

Of course, this whole effort will be very expensive.

_An all-out media and direct-mail blitz to mobilize massive public pressure on Congress will be the key to our success_.

To pay for the expensive ads, mailings, and other efforts, it's urgent you send a special contribution to the National Right to Work Committee today.

**[Will you make a generous contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or $50 to launch the next, crucial phase for ultimate passage of a National Right to Work law](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0Du2pCoYQOHRaMjipf4EBueuOjUPQBAQ0QLK1-jv6o473jv6plGBENy2ZiQ9EAGCCNG6kdtJTbrjthcgsVakM9RaNUipBRCQrR8ppgxzigkhjAhE0C_hHN7wH-Cfgb5-ecNx9rOrp09zNvuWK9Lb2sbR1bo37Keh74a-a17QP7Y_kb2vGhv26pNm2tuODXdQPiwJjidGtqnuKGFnmm7f75YnzoUMXOq9fkxY1eGJStrlWWVlOpIqdhuZIUFaorqKtSw4s-fpwpEtJM_ytud28_45yDetvL-2BQqDqsOjsrlC6F3WoS5Oz9gBOEKqSHLJnYpmufx5M38fJW9Sz3cR-xLAmVhErVV8r6GhvfGuYa_lWSGVGvo9r2FQ7hlKOI50l8_AlJxdu44dECEoYW0ep_30MfrSDw3H8yp9_GtYxwvlajDGiNkPRnU-rFWowslujbzsKTvRUC5IyA58Yoi48_N_AAAA__-AmaS6)?**

[](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0Dm2rCoYQOHRaMiibwKD81admocIyo_YU6Uw-rfujW-8d_S5zmpj-Nj6jkhNjDbEmDZ0VpKRDA5TZoVXmopeDthJJ72jDjvZQkcxZZhTTAhhxCCCfgnn-q3_0_hH0dcvbzg-YQr5hnU6_b6dGQ3b0qYu5Lw37Keh74a-8zmjf2x_Ins_OTXsJdeBDTAKpkq0EOdVf2tKbLPie8WdDQpMyTkeK_g7lTB-wnHJQD9mNpTVSkn8PMLZzcz386kScJkTSUeBXacyRqv6cD_uhMXDQ04QTpA11SxknJd9cYlxX6XNC5-I5zQXHo5p68s5rJkvjtbZEteLPANsgytJsu0CHvenlupAejHjHRoqPYSGvea66PXKUe7nEpUNVV3x-13LdShm-ym0Syc0MYYS1p6d229ICS6pGo6npYf01zB3DzqzxxgjNh4Y5ek7jhZlfbMyIOglZTdS16NXNCruGCLhPv4PAAD__2BDo88)

It's vital you act immediately to put the politicians' feet to the fire to bring the National Right to Work Act up for a vote.

_It would be a crime to let politicians who support compulsory unionism off the hook_.

Up against the forced-dues fed, billion-dollar might of Big Labor, all the Committee has on its side is truth, public opinion. . .

. . . and you!

Unlike Big Labor, the National Right to Work Committee doesn't have (or want) the power to force anyone to pay dues.

So it has to depend on generous folks like you.

_Please don't make it easy for Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, Joe Biden, and Big Labor to bury the National Right to Work Bill_.

clean_body: Dear Patriot, Below are links to some of the most important news stories today for your consideration. Courtesy of Right Wing Report. | Dear Concerned American, Your petition to Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, your Senators, and your Congressman is linked below. It's vital that you submit your petition immediately. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, and the Big Labor bosses are about to go ballistic. I have introduced the National Right to Work Act to repeal forever Big Labor's power to force workers to pay union dues in order to work. So the union lobbyists, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and their allies are going to use every trick in the book to bury the National Right to Work Bill. And they want to do it as quietly as possible. The union kingpins (and their water-carriers in Congress) can't afford the consequences of having their coercive privileges publicly debated and voted on in Congress! They don't want the American people to know that: * Millions of workers are forced to surrender part of every paycheck to keep their jobs. This cash funds violent "organizing" drives, a limousine lifestyle for union bigwigs, and bankrolls radical, tax-and-spend politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Hakeem Jeffries. Big Labor's power is deadly to millions of small businesses. Big Labor politicians and stacked bureaucrats are strangling small businesses with confiscatory taxes, destructive laws, and straitjacket regulations. Forced unionism exports millions of good jobs overseas. Productivity-killing work rules, workplace class warfare, slowdowns, "sick-outs," and strikes all take their crippling toll, closing the doors of many businesses -- for good. In the fight to force votes on a National Right to Work law, opponents of forced unionism will face a showdown against the full might of Big Labor. . Now is the time to act. By the time the Right to Work Bill comes up for a vote, every member of Congress must realize the eyes of the American people will be watching. National opinion polls all show that 80% of the American people agree it's wrong to force workers to pay union dues under the threat of being fired if they don't pay! And the National Right to Work Committee, who has led the fight against forced dues for over 50 years, must have your help in demonstrating that to Congress. If the public's attention is fixed on this battle, Congress will be forced to recognize -- or defy to its peril -- the massive public opposition to compulsory unionism. Then we'll see who dares to stand with Big Labor. . . . . . and who stands with freedom and the American people. to demonstrate to Congress and the national media the strong support for Right to Work. It's all part of the National Right to Work Committee's four-part plan to pass a National Right to Work law: Contact directly by mail up to 10 million supporters , urging them to demand their Senators and Congressmen vote for the National Right to Work Bill; Brief personally the hundreds of favorable columnists, radio talk show hosts, and editorial writers nationwide who can help mobilize public opinion; Deploy digital advertising through email and across social media in the days before the vote to really make Congress feel the heat; and Run TV and radio ads targeting swing votes in key states and districts. It is critical in this battle that Congress hears loud and clear from the nearly 80% of Americans who support Right to Work. Of course, Congress may choose to obey Big Labor bosses rather than the majority of their constituents. That's their choice. But time and again, when politicians defied the public and voted for forced unionism, they've paid the price with the end of their political careers! Of course, this whole effort will be very expensive. An all-out media and direct-mail blitz to mobilize massive public pressure on Congress will be the key to our success. To pay for the expensive ads, mailings, and other efforts, it's urgent you send a special contribution to the National Right to Work Committee today. ? It's vital you act immediately to put the politicians' feet to the fire to bring the National Right to Work Act up for a vote. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
Thanks for opening my email. I hope you’re having a great day so far.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo0knlf434rh8pb6sg84ite047ius7512853hesg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge2o75c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course **["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbiupjqi4qdik7dnc55s6nbpp6o4a85cp01h2tkg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge2o75c9h2bs)** studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That 's why we've turned our online course, ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj7keditpto18hsda5iiggh6q4o8v4vealckbpcg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge2o75c9h2bs) into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy.** **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of **["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziqufk512qi6c02sne7a04m6r1b3lfe6hf48poc0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge2o75c9h2bs)** for your home library or give it as a gift. **Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty.** Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0o263ldt3dql5608me9b8650kcqg8un0uhc8vr0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge2o75c9h2bs)** Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College **P.S.** Despite what _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"** now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8tve2696nk4olo3hcmht1kshkmthn51e3skn8g8_)** Act today because quantities are limited! Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans. |

| Pro Life Update

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: End the weaponization of police power in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KO%2f4tqdtouQljKzkbsY%2fAg&sysid=1)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665978%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bTbU2dvnOKcNR2SezT4UGQ&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KO%2f4tqdtouQljKzkbsY%2fAg&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY → **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665979%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nDX7%2fseO0LOINcT9zddmPw&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665970%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NGiH0pmIF%2byQCCaYZLW74A&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665971%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QV6l2ZUYqWkyjck85QCi8A&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665972%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N%2fI5yVhs%2fNg%2fLnEQAWrabA&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665973%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gRhsNZL7u2rmHsQ9hVpjPQ&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

The IRS is trying to close the tax loophole that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market crashes and recessions. **[Learn More](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpdkjfjsjos2n4694cng3fu4c2s1usd7r0of6l80_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or2c3h2bs)**
# **A Catastrophic Recession is Imminent?**
On the heels of the 2nd largest bank failure in US history and the 9th interest rate hike in the last 12 months, a staggering **186 more banks are on the brink of collapse.** **“Could your bank be next?”** The Fed's reckless recent printing of **$300,000,000** **to bail out more struggling banks** has further devalued the dollar (and your savings) and pushed inflation trending toward all-time highs. If your bank goes under, do you really think the government is going to bail you out like it did SVB and Signature Bank? The **FDIC can’t even cover SVB** and Signature Bank combined deposits, so how can you expect them to cover your deposits if your bank fails? And if that's not enough to terrify you, consider this - experts predict that the latest interest rate hikes will inevitably trigger a recession, causing your investments and retirement accounts to plummet even more in value. Renowned investors **Robert Kiyosaki** and **David Morgan** have repeatedly said that the **“dollar is now trash”** and urge Americans to[invest in**GOLD**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z30h5hunhviuthf1b0f307hubccg4e6auno4qr60_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or2c3h2bs), ironically the same precious metal that the banks themselves are now hoarding to protect their own assets. **Gold** truly is a symbol of financial stability and security, increases in value over time, and outperforms the market, **especially in turbulent economic times** like these. Don’t wait for another interest rate hike in 2023. **It could be too late by then**. Protect your financial wellbeing now. Get your**[FREE Wealth Protection Guide Today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z49r26h98d5mfj29pugrc6aq448utmuj90gt6tao_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or2c3h2bs)** and learn how to protect your savings with **Gold.** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb887dp4ui48u5riglo0kd87cl8sar071gpbd92o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or2c3h2bs)

name: American Federation for Children
subject: Parents deserve CHOICE! OPEN if you agree…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8hh7mt429g3naq33o6ac6cgraudolamdo0p67uo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or6c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling.**That’s why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide.This Fall, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we’re RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_**Here is the pledge...**
---
| | _“I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school.”_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8gbg51um8gms63hq1u8t8jcuov7a3rr7rndad50_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or6c9h2bs)
---
| | **Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE – _and kids deserve better_ – [_join our movement and sign the Education Freedom Pledge today! >>_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zebvklcq1uvfreo6bmesq78jhnla6t06hlp2b5uo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or6c9h2bs)**
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfjn43klkbbd9em8ah9mlkq9v43geobpunaq3p9o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or6c9h2bs)
---
| | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America.**Some of the Education Freedom Pledge’s top signers include...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* AFC Fellow Corey DeAngelis
* Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos
* Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr.
* **[_Add YOUR NAME here >>_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv6oru3opdumu2svs6p8af7r7lin5q8nnu811k38_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or6c9h2bs)**

---
| | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn’t best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement – the teachers’ unions – wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you’ll take a stand today! >>_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4otubcn38q0bc5v272p1ll82h30ftlpdnecfec8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or6c9h2bs)**
---
| | [**SIGN TODAY >> STAND FOR SCHOOL CHOICE!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqqv1frk4sdng5trdipbnuda32lsf1lf15c3fdho_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or6c9h2bs)

name: The Flyover
subject: More news. Less time.
body:
Here is your opportunity to sign up today for FREE.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0sk9ansifjkoem48en6p4sthdt67g5cuuhaf5a0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or2cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Reader,
Are you sick and tired of trying to search through so many different news sites to figure out what is going on in the world? Spending too much time trying to figure out what is **ACTUALLY** important? Not sure if you can trust what you are reading? Today is your day to sign up for a **FREE** newsletter called _[The Flyover](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6s1qfftl6d7840rrsir6thqrmob49sr31n8qv60_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or2cth2bs)_ where our talented team of editors will do all that work for you. Get informed on politics, business, world affairs, science, technology and many other topics with a single email directly to your inbox. **_[Click here to sign up now for FREE!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsmtieet95fcmovdjhgrouk6ian1n3nes6rsqavo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge6or2cth2bs)_**
Finding quality news online is like sifting an avalanche. We dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day, so you don't have to. One email does truly have every relevant story. I recently spoke at an RNC donor retreat.
---
My message was simple: **_“The old Republican Party is gone, and it’s never coming back.”_**
---
In its place is a NEW America First movement that defends America’s interests, secures our borders, protects our jobs, looks after our hardworking citizens, and vehemently opposes illegal immigration, pointless wars, and rigged globalist trade deals that rob our country.
---
**Patriots like YOU are the new leaders of our Party.**
---
Don’t forget that it was __OUR__ America First message that won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin – states that Republicans hadn’t won since the _1980s_.
---
The Republican nominees in 2008 and 2012 couldn’t win Florida, Ohio, or even Iowa.
---
_We forever revolutionized the electoral map for Republicans. We paved a path to victory._

_America First is our Party’s only hope at survival._

# **A Catastrophic Recession is Imminent?**
On the heels of the 2nd largest bank failure in US history and the 9th interest rate hike in the last 12 months, a staggering **186 more banks are on the brink of collapse.** **“Could your bank be next?”** The Fed's reckless recent printing of **$300,000,000** **to bail out more struggling banks** has further devalued the dollar (and your savings) and pushed inflation trending toward all-time highs. If your bank goes under, do you really think the government is going to bail you out like it did SVB and Signature Bank? The **FDIC can’t even cover SVB** and Signature Bank combined deposits, so how can you expect them to cover your deposits if your bank fails? And if that's not enough to terrify you, consider this - experts predict that the latest interest rate hikes will inevitably trigger a recession, causing your investments and retirement accounts to plummet even more in value. Renowned investors **Robert Kiyosaki** and **David Morgan** have repeatedly said that the **“dollar is now trash”** and urge Americans to[invest in**GOLD**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1ujt2v8o7lu065imkllsvs4lsp3q64tscdrlo9o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge1ob6cth2bs), ironically the same precious metal that the banks themselves are now hoarding to protect their own assets. **Gold** truly is a symbol of financial stability and security, increases in value over time, and outperforms the market, **especially in turbulent economic times** like these. Don’t wait for another interest rate hike in 2023. **It could be too late by then**. Protect your financial wellbeing now. Get your**[FREE Wealth Protection Guide Today](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zflfsbcdcs60u88tfp2ta49af6g9vr18tgddrhs0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge1ob6cth2bs)** and learn how to protect your savings with **Gold.** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z128pu6o39levc7q4jl6e24m7b8sv7svdkdcosi8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjge1ob6cth2bs)

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbe6drr8csj6gf2pn5n3i1jpum2iqj299s3rmmoo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbsr7fh5f4kgsufmqpvcienncvmelmt010hmc808_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcumeiogtl2qtmspdtof7ue2lcs5pmr2pdmleeco_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1517bupih2fb70n4rt29guhmuonoqef2g938jro_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zga5d2vudgaaqsfl9isinodm5bplaom5504ole98_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1osq25flm08q9a0elpmgkgfnfp60ti92ht7kmq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zes3qvjp6gikguiffbrg6gq0of7smeefl1bi5glo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlrbatb79a4bplj9a06vefp5qfn79n3mtek7g500_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3qsenrqofvv9aj0vn8884l8speuqmv5i7adva1g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl9134ikmqhl6lcouoju153971iq6095ulepac10_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zc5dlsitubfqj8410ae2ija5rlhnjlh6p87gfkf8).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqkus0uvp5j8mg7dbrc2d8hhit8m5vchp6da4bs0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjie0oj6chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWRscEiDCN

Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWRscEiDCN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in Imprimis,
Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme
Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the
nation's highest court: "My job is to apply the Constitution."

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61721165:WRscEiDCN:m:3:2532013465:21EC4DFA5291FB1CD636152FD6BA5696:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWRscEiDCN

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We need you to STAY on our team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven’t heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79961%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lhRQ15tTB9vmDbYTpF26Cw&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we’ve seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they’re going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79962%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8ghFSmC6MAZuvqx%2fQeXUpQ&sysid=1 "but you only have until
midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79961%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lhRQ15tTB9vmDbYTpF26Cw&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can’t DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79963%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aNsuL0%2bD0YnQXnV4STnxkw&sysid=1 "Renew your membership
before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though, friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79964%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W4nvRE2QQi%2fPipsJscAzSw&sysid=1 "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79975%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0DJkqb78K3FMiwYnGwyIGA&sysid=1 "Are you going to renew
your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4
consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to
let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79961%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lhRQ15tTB9vmDbYTpF26Cw&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79976%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FhD2nZfkxcIUmvpqIFtrwA&sysid=1 "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn’t over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79977%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TBHlia4ZFfiG%2fTFXKQXRUQ&sysid=1 "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79978%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CdgPAKXKTC8fMvHv%2bwWr9w&sysid=1 "Renew before it’s too
late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office
---
| |
---

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaefkgq4ljf536pt8su7qre1ivk37l5butdrvqfo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjieaor3cdh2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfc9c2q9omas8bviqf6uaio0841k92tu6ltnek48_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjieaor3cdh2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn3rn2kf66hv17ooo5mop8s0m2qqtgdrjhmga4no_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjieaor3cdh2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlge0jjij7r6e94qa3sr38l68b5l9uagorkj8p58_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjieaor3cdh2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2s1kktsdrvpsh6p9caqng5rc3kb21d2as1fr96g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjieaor3cdh2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zti36mkn7jc7gsv4l3ugte7t1sjkq3l1b69plmj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjieaor3cdh2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeuled5t06l396rs1s2bc8av63mme8nhcq2v5r68_rp22sh2s8i66o74cjieaor3cdh2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: we’re counting on you to set the pace (please read)
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | | | | | | | [DOUBLE YOUR GIFT FOR THE NEXT 63 HOURS ONLY](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1729925?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, I had to personally reach out to you early, ahead of the Earth Day rush Saturday, and share this important update on our planet-saving work.
No matter what greedy corporations say, or how many millions of dollars they spend on PR and misinformation campaigns, Friends of the Earth is committed to fighting back. **Corporate pollution is a choice, and we CAN hold companies accountable for that choice. **
**Right now, mega-manufacturing plants are pumping out single-use plastics that end up in our oceans to the tune of two huge garbage trucks per minute. Corporations are aggressively working to expand mining, logging and drilling operations on our public lands. The resulting habitat loss threatens the survival of endangered species – who are now in more danger than EVER. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is worsening from out-of-control fossil fuel greed. **
**The fact is this: We don't have to live like this, and our only Earth doesn't have to die like this.** We have the power to stop catastrophic outcomes for our planet and all its inhabitants if we fight back together now. And what more powerful moment than Earth Day to take action?
**That’s why this is such heartening news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day up to our goal of $180,000 but only until midnight Saturday. Because you've been such a committed supporter, we created a custom match link you can use to be the first to DOUBLE your Earth Day impact. So please hurry and make your gift for our planet now! Here’s your personal link: **
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1729925?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This goal means so much to our organization and the planet – and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early-bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators and stop the climate crisis before it’s too late.
**Matches like this don’t come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. **That’s why we must seize this opportunity for our planet, friend. With all our futures on the line, getting complacent or giving in to despair is simply not an option. So we’re counting on committed environmentalists like you to set the pace for the rest of our community.
**With time running out, we need to make this Earth Day really count. Please, make your membership gift and be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our planet while we still can. Your personalized Earth Day match access link is right here – donate now to have every dollar doubled:**
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1729925?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you,

Erich Pica
President
Friends of the Earth

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | == Friend, I had to personally reach out to you early, ahead of the Earth Day rush Saturday, and share this important update on our planet-saving work. No matter what greedy corporations say, or how many millions of dollars they spend on PR and misinformation campaigns, Friends of the Earth is committed to fighting back. Corporate pollution is a choice, and we CAN hold companies accountable for that choice. Right now, mega-manufacturing plants are pumping out single-use plastics that end up in our oceans to the tune of two huge garbage trucks per minute. Corporations are aggressively working to expand mining, logging and drilling operations on our public lands. The resulting habitat loss threatens the survival of endangered species – who are now in more danger than EVER. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is worsening from out-of-control fossil fuel greed. The fact is this: We don't have to live like this, and our only Earth doesn't have to die like this. We have the power to stop catastrophic outcomes for our planet and all its inhabitants if we fight back together now. And what more powerful moment than Earth Day to take action? That’s why this is such heartening news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day up to our goal of $180,000 but only until midnight Saturday. Because you've been such a committed supporter, we created a custom match link you can use to be the first to DOUBLE your Earth Day impact. So please hurry and make your gift for our planet now! Here’s your personal link: | | == This goal means so much to our organization and the planet – and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early-bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators and stop the climate crisis before it’s too late. Matches like this don’t come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. That’s why we must seize this opportunity for our planet, friend. With all our futures on the line, getting complacent or giving in to despair is simply not an option. So we’re counting on committed environmentalists like you to set the pace for the rest of our community. With time running out, we need to make this Earth Day really count. Please, make your membership gift and be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our planet while we still can. Your personalized Earth Day match access link is right here – donate now to have every dollar doubled: | | == Thank you, Erich Pica President Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=66865e04ad1440c6936a7662c9fae4f0&_e=xi4rhyCzd6-BVQ9dXsizGdFakjU3JMW5NXmjbvx9wuOq9De_XmQxsqa1Pz_aR6TEmmYyhaeWGEMuGUHR0q6ywzXemcHUY-CZUwJxS_0M0OM1X7suUeotKzg7aCIGZvwX7EUQGk0uzeWqk9AsHKes0JIafQ3q26WOkBXt304dB6eFm5N2N3xuMpUFqMRVuLFHm8YE8O6yqCWfpTsrD5sqgbE7jkNZAd3t-Y7XrykWDpgM8Aj5PftFKD8IroORxExVbCIcpqhblI_rmqgOnxXt3rBLkeMWN-E9MUaKoYrpdA2qdj-1B1bjVfphw7C1Lf34M-yz0kWlI0iImR7tqtKLFsMbLilArTbaz4qMIjZEQBnbw2UD1EpMi2RXn5S76AdO)

| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. **That 's why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This Fall, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_ **Here is the pledge ...**
---
| | _" I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school."_
---

| | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn't best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement - the teachers' unions - wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you 'll take a stand today! >>_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=66865e04ad1440c6936a7662c9fae4f0&_e=xi4rhyCzd6-BVQ9dXsizGdFakjU3JMW5NXmjbvx9wuOq9De_XmQxsqa1Pz_aR6TEmmYyhaeWGEMuGUHR0q6ywzXemcHUY-CZUwJxS_0M0OM1X7suUeotKzg7aCIGZvwX7EUQGk0uzeWqk9AsHKes0JIafQ3q26WOkBXt304dB6eFm5N2N3xuMpUFqMRVuLFHm8YE8O6yqCWfpTsrD5sqgU3Id5IpLrDVlXxMGl4914-Nd8TV3qMXvpB-aLFFZt0qnLK03V1wUmHSnxh6txsGeKQDaJooF1Hd7d-knqhDqCxo1Fr02TYeHU5e3qOmpogQdtAsKJoXyzn0LiHYxi6KcrmR1cP5xhecA-YgQnfHAy_ah16voSOquQOaHRrM87jn)**

body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50aee0165a73448f8dffdd9d9d827864&_e=8XevL7NhoJYaXX87_WFpQpGoxiP25fYc-bhQwnnJRR5W2H8YR5PS6wxLH7R03tid6UdCwIav-5N1WTufMnicuErfFtNFZcwTJmyaR9QK7M4tNHWg59GOl31y9rPKkgLHEbsFJgLHHpGRlz5OZBS58nFakt0I_LDmgvv8OUwkR0aGfh9K2bepHamnOptNvu3ulMnswc7WKnTOeceXtk68DlVehY2Y26XkKB4o4h9yytNtiHSpMff49n4bvrGUO6aVv5Gj7NUAGkgHMpVjM19NyuCNhwHE_ttnGVvHMPETX6q3MNgNWU2YosgIOETOVmQg4-UayK6RH5EPw92RkxAcEHx0zCVugTsfuSzb_VnmwIHB_3BgvLG-jTCRi5dgNw2uSgkcdRBEgPHThIYPix-reQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend,

---
I recently spoke at an RNC donor retreat.
---
My message was simple: **_" The old Republican Party is gone, and it's never coming back."_**
---
In its place is a NEW America First movement that defends America's interests, secures our borders, protects our jobs, looks after our hardworking citizens, and vehemently opposes illegal immigration, pointless wars, and rigged globalist trade deals that rob our country.
---
**Patriots like YOU are the new leaders of our Party.**
---
Don't forget that it was __OUR__ America First message that won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin - states that Republicans hadn't won since the _1980s_.
---
The Republican nominees in 2008 and 2012 couldn't win Florida, Ohio, or even Iowa.
---
_We forever revolutionized the electoral map for Republicans. We paved a path to victory._
---
_America First is our Party 's only hope at survival. _
---
And in 2024, the survival of our entire country is being put to the test. Either we win - or we lose America for good.
---
**[Please make a contribution to help our NEW America First movement WIN in 2024 - for 1,500%impact.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50aee0165a73448f8dffdd9d9d827864&_e=8XevL7NhoJYaXX87_WFpQpGoxiP25fYc-bhQwnnJRR5W2H8YR5PS6wxLH7R03tid6UdCwIav-5N1WTufMnicuErfFtNFZcwTJmyaR9QK7M4tNHWg59GOl31y9rPKkgLHEbsFJgLHHpGRlz5OZBS58nFakt0I_LDmgvv8OUwkR0aGfh9K2bepHamnOptNvu3ulMnswc7WKnTOeceXtk68DlVehY2Y26XkKB4o4h9yytNtiHSpMff49n4bvrGUO6aVtRlfGa0flluq3wFqj307Az6RWOfYPQlTNj_LXIZhc38SKtiSzPeLRei5DnsrnFGddwjFuzYTDEYaLHa9sHrYm7GZ0BLcHf-D9bGAACefNAwZAVKp_yjtntSx0RBv1VUUCfTcbT1aLsVX8GqxDnVE4A%3D%3D)**

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . | | | | | Friend, I recently spoke at an RNC donor retreat. My message was simple: " The old Republican Party is gone, and it's never coming back." In its place is a NEW America First movement that defends America's interests, secures our borders, protects our jobs, looks after our hardworking citizens, and vehemently opposes illegal immigration, pointless wars, and rigged globalist trade deals that rob our country. Patriots like YOU are the new leaders of our Party. Don't forget that it was OUR America First message that won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin - states that Republicans hadn't won since the 1980s. The Republican nominees in 2008 and 2012 couldn't win Florida, Ohio, or even Iowa. We forever revolutionized the electoral map for Republicans. We paved a path to victory. America First is our Party 's only hope at survival. And in 2024, the survival of our entire country is being put to the test. Either we win - or we lose America for good. | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
