Friends,Our state Freedom Caucuses have been making noise and disrupting the status quo in their respective states. Naturally, the Republican Establishment is worried and now they’re making plans to go after our people.Recently, an anonymous dark money Super PAC has formed in South Carolina to target SC Freedom Caucus members in their own districts. Why? Because they refuse to bend the knee to the liberals pretending to be conservatives that are running the SC House GOP. In fact, only Hawaii has more liberal Republican legislators than South Carolina.This is happening all over the country. From Wyoming to Georgia, RINO-polluted state GOPs are getting ready to go after Freedom Caucus members. We’re in for a fight against the establishment in 2024 and we cannot win it without you. If you want to take back your country, it starts by building robust leadership in red states. That is what we are doing every single day. **We URGE you to help.** As Glenn Beck said about our state freedom caucuses, “If we abandon them now, we deserve what we get. These people are brave enough to stand. We must support them.”So please donate to [State Freedom Caucus Action](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=4226cd9d536047169f7e31f84dff7fc9&_e=i1OEEYZJpRbUygHmdzntvDF45WzzD2qO61qs9ckVMPxgJF3HxN6hcf7kzk8WJdZWKQ6x6Q0yRQdMVAAO61xTgcDnoDb0rl4mJvwuaQbr3LAvvazRj9yOnV6R92blBf3nNGRPqv-qlEMf_FAxo58xY07pIcxQuFAxzjsaB6ndxJ3XutCtTKDYWlvRXYobMJV7coXhVvDV26xVleN33HoCX1DRIFJJnlaJjdISihS3ovJDhTdwF0HvrGh3YMDuD831) so that we can defend our State Freedom Caucus members and go after the liberal Republicans all across the country who are refusing to represent you. **JOIN THE FIGHT** Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. There are two ways you can help: **1.[Subscribe](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=4226cd9d536047169f7e31f84dff7fc9&_e=i1OEEYZJpRbUygHmdzntvLYyobATCet6-XnAbSPrvt6gojLKI-k-80MPORN5VOMF_KCgzfWdmh32HKcyY6wObDueTD42UOMKvg1RSatpPTqbzZihM0U0Eulir84IeXIOwm3RZfuQ9oiTW9xVQ33hlHS9HPUvm5K2qeQ6XUkHLN7_FB8Fx85Z0z3DjiId5n2CwoV73pMVpHsRkltBRogmnQ%3D%3D) to our free newsletter.** **2.[Make a contribution](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=4226cd9d536047169f7e31f84dff7fc9&_e=i1OEEYZJpRbUygHmdzntvDF45WzzD2qO61qs9ckVMPxgJF3HxN6hcf7kzk8WJdZWKQ6x6Q0yRQdMVAAO61xTgcDnoDb0rl4mJvwuaQbr3LAJLMdUzaJh-YpFv8VjMUQx_rVyPAdiExF7dUgaOVdsKujMc7aV71y1EzRrb3Qi_Ge4lYfNzG6MgGSXTTzsvheVEGASa-LlmJ3ZYToy-YKccV98RNPyeNbHngwmYqTZ7XP8PaU38fEuAuTQlOlJ6Vrv) to help us advance the cause of liberty.** Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for freedom across the nation. **Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President

name: BOMBSHELL Report via Left Action
subject: Supreme Court Justices must be held accountable for ethics violations (Sign your name)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Add your name: Tell Congress to pass the Supreme Court Ethics Act >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20055879-814b-40c6-b52a-7c81d5d6bff8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83e69e1b-eb21-48a0-8a43-13502d75276a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Recent bombshell reports revealed that Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas has [secretly received millions of dollars worth of lavish vacations from a prominent GOP donor](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2cd18580-4984-41db-8e64-35f839abfcc4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), over the course of many years, which he never reported. The same donor also purchased property from Thomas, which Thomas also did not disclose. He even repeatedly claimed income from a real estate company that no longer exists! He must be held accountable for these clear violations of ethics rules – and most likely violation of the law as well. Unfortunately, when it comes to ethics, Supreme Court Justices face little to no oversight or accountability. **[This has got to change! And now we finally have a way to do it. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d786895-1fa6-4d0a-bc43-737bfe22bb08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** A number of Democratic members of Congress are leading the charge to establish ethics rules within the Supreme Court by introducing the Supreme Court Ethics Act. We need Congress to pass this bill and hold Supreme Court Justices accountable! [Sign your name: Demand Congress pass the Supreme Court Ethics Act >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c607806-98a9-42c9-89fb-ac5648519e05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Jon Tester
subject: First, then, now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection next year, and Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies are already raising big money to attack me.

| I have an important state-of-the-race update for you, Peter:

**First:** Democrats lost our House majority, making the Senate the last line of defense in the fight for reproductive freedom, getting dark money out of our politics, and more.

**Then:** Political experts from _CNN_ to Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ kicked off the 2024 election cycle by saying that Montana is one of the GOP's top targets.

**Now:** I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection next year, and Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies are already raising big money to attack me. We need to be ready to respond.

[_**We can’t — and won’t — win without the support of this grassroots team. So if you can, split a donation now between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us overcome the attacks and defend Montana. Friend, I've been in politics a _long_ time.

I got my start in local politics in Baton Rouge in the 1980s, worked my way up to Bill Clinton's 1992 presidential campaign, and since then I've worked on campaigns around the U.S. and the world. **But here's the thing:**
**I have never seen a political party as cuckoo as the GOP today.**
From extending Trump's tax breaks for the wealthy to chipping away at our fundamental rights like voting and accessing health care, **the GOP of today is threatening our very democracy.**
But, friend, it gets worse. Republicans took back the House last year, so a lot of what they're planning _could actually happen._

**That's why this is urgent.** **We NEED to take back the House and hold on to our Senate majority next year, and in order to do that, we have to start NOW.**

At American Bridge, our mission is to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them at the ballot box. **But we can't do it without you, friend.****[That's why I set a goal to raise $20,000 by midnight, so I am asking personally: Please, can you rush $15 or more to American Bridge right now to build up our resources so we can stop Republicans like Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis and Kevin McCarthy in their tracks?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62039413/402112591/1983311359?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2500-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxMDA4YmYzLTdiZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bekISjoZXnxtHbUcc-V7B6zdUL0EvodoyOeq4nYfxMo=)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za0so9a7ukm1mggtkhioagattgflrrvgu4f8fvng_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv79ib1j2mhobc8e2kpk8lcj7jtjpccjpsulsqpo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrvrtcburq2f9unc4pe3cntgt6e3dh5vf02v8ppo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4nf26fsd011g4c3i50lunchjd49td8e2v2c1190_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znls6uohrsu2qbplov0msi2sloj0vro9th242uj8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5pd0v2njk2dti139vuc0ml08mvlcv4na2ijr3og_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztoadrhocrj5hgo4s3mci5csaoke6gfvsh02seo0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpt2lbvh35vvb0onj6s0b0rdgm2lpil21b535eg8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt2qroln1brj0475b9j241g7n0pv5g9dcvt5e25g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3jmust8nqirnlp1ipgkmlrd7u477ijpb39qf838_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z38qa5a36ef5e8qnpp1phhsji9ivmcgdng44jt9o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1ioesluf5k0oq6unt0uckbdcrp908s10bkcj5vg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60o36c9h2bs)

---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2r7d0hns4acijghbmlarfv4pd2ndf6norj8k4ug_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60p74cjh2bs)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk1rf60fna6ugbmcej1pec48rb2mum6564mosvno_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i60p74cjh2bs "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

---

name: Tom Fitton
subject: FWD Biden’s Scandals Demand Accountability!
body:
You and our other members have helped Judicial Watch take an historic leadership role in forcing states to follow federal election laws that are our last line of defense against voter fraud and corrupt elections.

| Dear Fellow American,

I want to be sure you saw my recent email.
We are investigating serious scandals to bring accountability where it is long overdue!
[Please help us in this critical fight with your best gift today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63040&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
Thank you for all you do for Judicial Watch and for America.
Tom Fitton
President
Judicial Watch

* * *

**From:** Tom Fitton
**Date:** Thursday, April 6, 2023 at 9:14 AM
**Subject:** Biden’s Scandals Demand Accountability!
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Thanks to our members’ commitment****, Judicial Watch has become the American people 's true "independent counsel." **
We are the unrivalled national leader with _independent research and uncompromisingly thorough investigations concerning government corruption_. Our aim is to challenge government secrecy more aggressively this year than we ever have...but [we need you to join the Judicial Watch team!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63040&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63040&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

We are investigating these serious scandals to bring accountability where it is overdue:

* The _disastrous and lawless failure_ of the **Biden administration** to enforce **U.S. immigration law** , creating an historically unprecedented wave of out-of-control illegal immigration at our southern border

* The **mounting scandals surrounding President Joe Biden** , ranging from his stonewalling (**with the complicit University of Delaware**) our open-records request and lawsuit for his U.S. Senate records; his mishandling of classified documents; and significant evidence of sleazy overseas business deals engineered by his son, **Hunter** , which may have well enriched the president himself

* The**ongoing corrupt politicization of the U.S. Department of Justice** under Biden Attorney General Merrick Garland -- who has "weaponized" the Department and is targeting parents who opposed **Critical Race Theory** as potential terrorists and suing states that have enacted commonsense election reforms to protect ballot integrity

* And unlike the mainstream media, _we have not walked away_ from **digging into federal government contacts with, and grants given to the controversial Wuhan Institute of Virology in China** , now conceded by the federal government to be the likeliest source of the Covid-19 pandemic.

I ask you to endorse our essential investigative work designed to get to the facts and share what we learn [with the American people [by supporting our work with a special contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63040&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63040&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**Your support right now is especially important because...**
...no matter who is in the White House or who controls Congress, _America needs Judicial Watch as an independent non-partisan watchdog whose loyalty is to the rule of law, the U.S. Constitution and the American people 's right to know what its government is up to_.
Although it is gratifying that the Republican House leadership is now following our lead on investigating _some_ of these issues, _we cannot let up_ ...on our own independent investigations _or_ on keeping pressure on Congress to fulfill its oversight responsibilities!
And that's why I am asking you _[to help underwrite our independent investigations with a generous tax-deductible gift today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63040&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)_ ...because our investigations come with real price tags!
[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63040&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

As you know, far too many scandals have been ignored or swept under the rug by "business as usual" **Republican** _and_**Democratic** politicians on Capitol Hill.
That's why we do what we do...and why we are "the only game in town" that Americans can rely on to break through the walls of government secrecy and investigate, expose and, when necessary, prosecute public corruption.
**_Day in and day out, we fight hard in local, state and federal courts for transparency and accountability from our government_ ...._and we 're accustomed to winning these fights_!**
Few have fought as hard...or as successfully...as Judicial Watch to enforce laws that support honest elections, _especially those that help guarantee that only eligible U.S. citizens vote in our elections_.
_And we are exposing the abuse of taxpayer dollars in funding Critical Race Theory (CRT) in schools and other public institutions_ ...while also suing school districts and administrators on behalf of teachers fired from their jobs because they dare to criticize CRT propaganda and other leftist policies in schools.
We are also taking on the radical Left by challenging unconstitutional quota programs and laws (in **California, Minnesota** and **North Carolina**) that attempt to divide Americans based on race, gender, ethnicity and sexual orientation!
[**But we need your help to stay on track with all our investigations, as well as our lawsuits!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63040&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63040&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Supported with your best gift today, I can promise you we will keep working successfully to honor the trust you place in us as _America 's most effective government watchdog_!
Thank you, in advance, for making a tax-deductible contribution to Judicial Watch today!
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton

### 2023 Earth Day Roanoke -
### Apr 22
---
Earth Day Roanoke is an environmental and cultural celebration of the Valley's people and our planet.
This year's in-person street fair style event will take place on Saturday, April 22nd from 11 am to 3 pm in the Grandin Road Village. This event is free and open to the public!

---
This fun run will be un-timed and have a leisurely start of 9 am. In lieu of the standard race shirt, every runner will receive a Slow-K coffee mug, free coffee, and well-earned donuts at the finish line.
The 5K course along the Roanoke River Greenway will also include a few other surprises to keep participants from overexerting after running mountains the day before.
Arrive early for free goat yoga!

---
At the 62nd International Street Fair you will have a chance to experience 40 countries in one day!
Learn about customs and traditions from international and cultural student organizations here at Virginia Tech. Visit the booths and be transported to countries with demonstrations, cultural displays, music, and displays of beautiful traditional wear. There will be interactive presentations from international groups, traditional games, arts, crafts, and other items available for purchase from the students.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztvoc4i2am9lfgh8eo7ku42lbbl6g098o3u42iao_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4po2u8pv7tajcveg2nv5graim2p3hmvrm17qf38_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpq324kqdb9pbflk40pa6ijmf8go5i8ua0vo1no8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfb5njl0glvn6cj0jg55tlm6roirns7c8idr14ig_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvop4ricdsfso5iab1ip5051fu43cvjj7eo1treg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1idc90q5r20617bflq4gspn61sf7s664amoo0lg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1hoq62tbafpn7ive0s5ht67ds6qbvuh4vesv50o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zike5snqetsrmglifbruqqu7a8974s8fuku99n6g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr665fcp6l1bqcqjhfkv2g6sj2r30pjf1khei3e8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj63gmcjipcpqf49478k8sqkke7jo1b039kiofc8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znc46k7cag0ki8ghdvm5f8vsj48p936e36ndidj8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr55gugqcgvb4vohmiitg2aai76s87uv8mu57gq0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1i68o72cdh2bs)

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you. | That's our average donation this month, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Chaney, Team Haley
subject: Throwback to that time Nikki let me stay with her
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Haley for President
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here Peter, Hi, it’s Chaney. I want to introduce myself and share some stories about my time with Nikki. Ten years ago, when I first moved to South Carolina to work for Nikki, my moving truck was delayed by a week. I called Team Haley in a panic. I had nowhere to go, none of my things, and didn’t know anyone in a new city. That’s when I received a text I couldn’t believe. “Hi, it’s Nikki. I heard your movers were delayed. You’re more than welcome to stay with our family until your things arrive. We’d love to have you for dinner tonight!” Most bosses would say “not my problem” or just hope something worked out. Not Nikki, she’s different. She offered to let me live with her family for as long as I needed too. It was incredible that she opened her home to me. But that’s who Nikki is. She cares. As I’ve worked for Nikki, I’ve had a front row seat to some amazing moments – her leadership as governor, standing up for America at the UN, fighting for conservatives, and now, her run for president. Every week, I want to reach out to you and give you some behind the scenes throwback stories from my time with her. I heard your movers were delayed. You’re more than welcome to stay with our family until your things arrive. We've extended the deadline to activate your membership with The
Heritage Foundation.

Deadline
Extended

Dear Fellow Patriot,

2023 is a
critical year for America's future, as we have limited time to
correct course and take back our country from the radical Left.

That's
why we've extended the deadline to activate your membership with
The Heritage Foundation.

You can
use this secure link to activate your membership right now:
https://secured.heritage.org/activate/

By
becoming a Heritage member, you will join the ranks of half a
million card-carrying constitutionalists who believe in our
mission to go on offense against the radical Left, and win.

But we
cannot do this without your help.

By
activating your membership today, you will ensure Heritage has
the resources to advance conservative policy solutions across the
country while providing aggressive and meaningful oversight and
accountability to the Biden administration and leaders of the
leftist regime.

Join us
today by clicking this secure link before the deadline:
https://secured.heritage.org/activate/

Thank you
for your consideration. I hope to stand alongside you in the
fight to defeat the radical Left - there is no time to waste!

Best,

Kevin D.
Roberts, Ph.D.
The
Heritage Foundation

P.S. We
are counting on your support to continue winning policy battles
in Washington and across the country. Please don't miss out on
the deadline to join us. Use this secure link now:
https://secured.heritage.org/activate/

D.C. 20002

| | Take a moment to glance into the future — April 2024 to be exact. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62045432/402135658/-1668222451?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230419_e_countdown_v1s1&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230419_e_countdown_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2UyNjAxZi04NGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fm4brWzrFRACPADRfNF6vArreIRe7pKsdc-zcZpsW88=&emci=00e2601f-84df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=03e2601f-84df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) Maybe you see your family in a new place, or yourself in a new job, or maybe you expect your life to remain pretty much the same. A year from now, at Fair Fight, we see ourselves in full election mode, with all hands on deck to elect pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot. We see volunteers working together to fight back against voter suppression attempts and reach voters with accurate and timely election information. And we see our entire team working hard alongside partners to defend free and fair elections in Georgia and across the country, in what will be another critical election year. Now, come back to the present. It’s April 2023, and we’re laying the groundwork for the critical fights we’ll face between now and the next election cycle. Anti-voter extremists have continued their coordinated attack on our freedom to vote this year in states across the country, and we expect these attacks to continue between now and next year’s election. But we’re fighting back with the most powerful tools we have: education and mobilization. **The truth is this: The actions we take in April 2023 will directly impact how we can protect the freedom to vote in April 2024.** And the scope of our fight against voter suppression depends on the strength of our grassroots team. [_**That’s where you come in! We’re counting on your dedication as a Fair Fight voting rights champion. Can you pledge to continue fighting alongside us as we approach another critical election cycle? Sign your name here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62045434/402135660/-1668222451?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230419_e_countdown_v1s1&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230419_e_countdown_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2UyNjAxZi04NGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fm4brWzrFRACPADRfNF6vArreIRe7pKsdc-zcZpsW88=&emci=00e2601f-84df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=03e2601f-84df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62045436/402135662/-1668222451?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230419_e_countdown_v1s1&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230419_e_countdown_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2UyNjAxZi04NGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fm4brWzrFRACPADRfNF6vArreIRe7pKsdc-zcZpsW88=&emci=00e2601f-84df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=03e2601f-84df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

It’s 4/20, team, so let’s talk about cannabis — bluntly. I know the U.S. has the highest incarcerated population in the world partially due to jailing individuals with minor non-violent drug offenses. I also know that the majority of overdose deaths involve opioids, and that cannabis is _not_ an opioid. The fearmongering we see from the GOP over cannabis is just a show to distract us from the real problem Big Pharma — and all the cash they give to GOP politicians — in our country. **After I served overseas in combat, I witnessed the barriers veterans faced in accessing medical cannabis because of its strict federal regulations.** Many veterans use cannabis to treat physical injuries and mental health conditions like PTSD and anxiety. After all they have given to our country, struggling to find adequate medical care isn’t a hit my brothers and sisters in uniform should have to take. **[Cannabis legalization and decriminalization are public health issues. If you agree, celebrate 4/20 by donating $4.20 to our people-powered movement →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62047164/402142077/-227468080?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230420cannabis_ae_actives_xx_l1&express_lane=true&amount=4.20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDk0ODA2Yi04NmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XtdCOtZXNU55cmz4mkEnVJvEY-QQFz7Tp3bDojc25M8=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:
America's military is unprepared for our age of advanced technology. Here's what we can do about it.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=46458c9f076c4344bfb74acd4fe6b319&_e=l2kbpxZ_oNpNbgmOIogo03YUYck9iVoRasszvA96bEo-d6iRHSUUz2tGeT3NJI5be5w9P4-yEkqlvirCKZ2Mb-AI4s8jvJ_fnFNzSNGjFCye1QC-0PQw53-qcTD6PCWRgjQzKiYUOueIFF-DCaC8RQV3ACYyM71s0D0FAOfYebzLlT1yLPva-yGplUfUXC2OPGrWChzXtLHGh5VSqJZ4AA%3D%3D)
---
Peter, I co-authored a [new op-ed for TIME](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=46458c9f076c4344bfb74acd4fe6b319&_e=l2kbpxZ_oNpNbgmOIogo0xnqdX1CPMf5FzY4Xqe5xW5qYGF7tjkq3jM7wciYV5k6xZY2x0Nu1KfXeU00hLyA9qfRtA-wyR1brd1vyjXHkybpE1shns3BWGNIDZg9Zi9dl6jBWJO37E8f9rF0s4BGREex30ir510DFbHDC71JeGqClOed36SULnS4voePo9NFekZAUGEqpy9NyCKmMAzebBJdyeuxpEdJ8AlVLzBq2VYKkvhs0sUljlsMb7vgwbja05XEVttTnzyAW4HdhGJ-1Q%3D%3D) with retired Admiral William Owens and wanted you to be among the first to read it. One of the best ways to heal the divisions in our country will be for our elected leaders to find ways to work together to offer real policy solutions to our greatest challenges. While much is being written today about the runaway national debt, our leaders in Congress should be thinking in terms of reform of spending in critical areas such as our national defense. This means eliminating stifling bureaucratic delays and inefficiencies, and solving supply-line and procurement problems that hold back American defense superiority. [**READ:** America's Military is Unprepared for Our Age of Advanced Technology](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=46458c9f076c4344bfb74acd4fe6b319&_e=l2kbpxZ_oNpNbgmOIogo0xnqdX1CPMf5FzY4Xqe5xW5qYGF7tjkq3jM7wciYV5k6xZY2x0Nu1KfXeU00hLyA9qfRtA-wyR1brd1vyjXHkybpE1shns3BWGNIDZg9Zi9dU6ugOgimqfBIocDdch95DrSiJxIfj00IT4svV-rdOqYchISi_HYqqBK5OxbufuY93hBq1WUdP1WFMF4IIVp2fBCAGo-no3GdqOTfOh-g19H2-FPBJkQXLe443VRGs9htDTYoisC7MCykaO9zT49vcw%3D%3D)

name: Club for Growth Action
subject: The biggest threat to your privacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I am reaching out with an URGENT warning about the future of our financial system.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17070%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zvf3kF0jF1%2fUrzAbwlTWKw&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, I am reaching out with an **URGENT** warning about the future of our financial system.

The Biden administration has been researching a "digital dollar.” If implemented, **it could mean the end of privacy as we know it**.

Unlike other digital currencies, Biden’s “digital dollar” is a **central bank** digital currency (CBDC) that will give the government the ability to track **every single transaction you make** right down to the lemonade stand run by the neighborhood kid.

Not only will it give them unprecedented access to your financial life, but in the wrong hands, **it could even be used to punish people for particular political views by freezing their accounts.**
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17071%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rq%2bzvAsc5R%2bElqXsCPwJJw&sysid=1)
---
| | At Club for Growth Action, we are fighting to save digital currencies and protect your financial freedom. **But we cannot do this alone. ** Most Americans are still unaware of the threat of Biden’s “digital dollar,” and we need your help to get the word out and warn them. **[_Stand with Club for Growth Action to Protect your Privacy - rush an urgent donation now >>_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17072%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vYScPjDbhE9D4RQtyHj5OQ&sysid=1)**
---
| | [**PROTECT YOUR PRIVACY**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17073%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pyzWpXU7yuZ3yEy8JDzgdw&sysid=1)
---
| | Thank you
Club for Growth Action
---
|
---

We want you to become a member of the Club for Growth, the leading free-enterprise advocacy group in the nation. Please join the Club for Growth by contacting the Club for Growth at [www.clubforgrowth.org](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17074%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2Kkm1RDwbYs4Vtxbc3IQ8A&sysid=1) or by making a contribution to Club for Growth Action or to any other federal candidate on a Club for Growth Action hosted Win Red page. | Hanover Sheriff Stuart Cook (Retired) Endorses John McGuire
---
| Dear Friend,
I'm honored to have the support and endorsement of very respected Hanover Sheriff Stuart Cook (Retired). He spent 45 years in law enforcement and was Hanover's Sheriff for 20 years. Without our men and women in law enforcement we would not have a country. Thank you for keeping us safe!
---
| | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010mDU8oHbZobTKuBW081_IIvpS4HNMFpyeqOq6-kOvwPQrscjFgX53bCebxUsRqaGhqiTPm00py34RLqnyMUmGFmnkSgMwf59G2j4eeUQpulxtp-S03vZj3lOEXQTe40K_JcZDYw6cFQSP9h4n6yF4-2wRBoRdHQgmikHWxFO_IU-ICyzuXyJCQ==&c=ckfTQrHn1piLorB4yPfJzAj8sO7PPx78T_6Rt8Uhtz7RmDYJaGyZ0g==&ch=pL5yImUZozt7VexaCmXzVqIz7_aEGdOcedQdr_2XDrNDElci-sor9A==)
---|---
|
I am proud to endorse Delegate John McGuire for Virginia State Senate District 10. As a Navy SEAL he is relentless in all he does. I don't normally get involved in nominating contests, but there is too much at stake in our country and our Commonwealth. John is a true partner in law enforcement with a strong track record of supporting law enforcement in the General Assembly. Please join me in supporting Delegate John McGuire to be our next Senator at the Convention May 6!

-Hanover Sheriff Stuart Cook (Retired)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Uihlein-Funded PAC Pays Consultants 38 Times More than Support Given to Candidates
body:
Only 3 school board candidates benefited from a perfunctory endorsement letter clearing the way for 3 consultants to cash in $142,000.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/e3e57c89b3a6/breaking-uihlein-funded-pac-pays-consultants-38-times-more-than-support-given-to-candidates?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Uihlein-Funded PAC Pays Political Consultants $142,000 While Spending Just $3700 to Support Conservative School Board Candidates, Disclosures Reveal (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/uihlein-funded-pac-pays-political-consultants-142000-while-spending-just-3700-to-support-conservative-school-board-candidates-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/uihlein-funded-pac-pays-political-consultants-142000-while-spending-just-3700-to-support-conservative-school-board-candidates-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Parents, some with children, took to the street outside of an Illinois State Board of Education (ISBE) meeting on Wednesday, Aug. 18, 2021. (Source: WICS/Aaron Brown)

The Richard Uihlein-funded People Who Play By The Rules PAC, in recent quarterly disclosures, reported $1.3 million cash-on-hand – but the disclosures also reveal that the PAC paid three political consultants (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/why-a-grading-scale-for-political-campaign-consultants-to-include-online-reviews-and-star-ratings-can-help-candidates-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) $142,000, while spending just $3,725.56 to support conservative school board candidates over the last several months, records reveal.

The founder, president and treasurer of the PAC received the majority of the consulting fees, totaling
$75,000 (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedExpenditures.aspx?FiledDocID=b0OdOIkpqpvSieWU0B0i2A%3d%3d&ExpenditureType=7PO3RGHF2W%2fsyStv1naW9vd6PLmRT8u2mEDnPt%2bcsAk%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to Starfish Consulting LLC (https://search.sunbiz.org/Inquiry/CorporationSearch/GetDocument?aggregateId=domp-p22000083002-94abc188-b195-45c5-9ba2-c8db36cc1ecc&transactionId=p22000083002-304b1e96-638f-4bc2-8f19-ef0e9559bdd4&formatType=PDF&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , while the rest went to a consulting firm owned by Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/tag/keith-pekau?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , who was paid $26,000 (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedExpenditures.aspx?FiledDocID=b0OdOIkpqpvSieWU0B0i2A%3d%3d&ExpenditureType=7PO3RGHF2W%2fsyStv1naW9vd6PLmRT8u2mEDnPt%2bcsAk%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) through Fahrenheit Consulting Group (https://disclosures-clerk.house.gov/public_disc/financial-pdfs/2022/8219040.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , while $41,000
(https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedExpenditures.aspx?FiledDocID=b0OdOIkpqpvSieWU0B0i2A%3d%3d&ExpenditureType=7PO3RGHF2W%2fsyStv1naW9vd6PLmRT8u2mEDnPt%2bcsAk%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) went to a consulting firm owned by Michael Koolidge (TMKS, LLC (https://disclosures-clerk.house.gov/public_disc/financial-pdfs/2021/10044273.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ), who also serves as the PAC’s communications director (https://dekalbtimes.com/stories/628308281-koolidge-on-joining-pbr-pac-why-i-ran-for-congress-was-to-move-beyond-words-and-into-real-action?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and chief spokesperson.

Records also reveal that $3,725.56 (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedExpenditures.aspx?FiledDocID=b0OdOIkpqpvSieWU0B0i2A%3d%3d&ExpenditureType=0DRMB2gagDDbZFFPreE7EDnJ6MLHB4FmaPdG52A4WnCTi%2foeECaOftL7kyGahqF83H5IVyuPwQw%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) was spent in support of three Lyons Township school board candidates, district 204. The money was spent on a letter that was mailed to voters and signed by the president of the PAC.

Unfortunately, the candidates did not win.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/uihlein-funded-pac-pays-political-consultants-142000-while-spending-just-3700-to-support-conservative-school-board-candidates-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A copy of a letter that was mailed in support of three school board candidates in Lyons Township, signed by the president of the PAC. Records reveal that the letter cost $3,725.56 to print and mail to local residents.

During the 2022 Illinois Republican Primary, Koolidge ran for US Congress in the 14th congressional district, and was endorsed (https://dekalbtimes.com/stories/623268654-koolidge-announces-jeanne-ives-endorsement-at-campaign-headquarters-opening?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) by Jeanne Ives, who called Koolidge a “bold leader, and I have every confidence he can take on Lauren Underwood and flip this seat.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/uihlein-funded-pac-pays-political-consultants-142000-while-spending-just-3700-to-support-conservative-school-board-candidates-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Jeanne Ives endorsing Michael Koolidge for Congress. (Source: Koolidge for Congress)

In the 5-person race, Koolidge came in third (https://ballotpedia.org/Mike_Koolidge?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) with just 20 percent of the vote, losing the primary to Republican Scott Gryder.

Gryder would go on to lose the general election to US Rep. Lauren Underwood, D, by
6 points (https://ballotpedia.org/Mike_Koolidge?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Ives is also a close confidante and senior political advisor to Pekau, and she also
endorsed (https://patch.com/illinois/orlandpark/orland-park-mayor-congressional-candidate-scores-key-endorsement?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his campaign for Congress in January of 2022, stating, “I trust Keith Pekau. He is the best mayor in Illinois.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/uihlein-funded-pac-pays-political-consultants-142000-while-spending-just-3700-to-support-conservative-school-board-candidates-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Jeanne Ives endorsed Keith Pekau for Congress. (Source: Keith Pekau/Facebook)

Although Pekau won the primary, he would lose the general election to US Rep. Sean Casten, D, by more than 9 points (https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2022/11/08/us/elections/results-illinois-us-house-district-6.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . Pekau also recently lost 9 of the 10 (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/orland-park-voters-reject-keith-pekaus-power-grab-delivering-the-mayor-humiliating-defeats-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) school board and fire district races that he had been supporting this past election cycle.

In 2018, Ives ran for governor against Republican incumbent Gov. Bruce Rauner, and Uihlein funded her campaign, donating
$2.5 million (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/dick-uihlein-illinois-governor-primary-ives-rauner/139996/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Ives would
lose (https://ballotpedia.org/Jeanne_M._Ives?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) the primary to Rauner, and Rauner would lose the general election to Democratic billionaire JB Pritzker.

Ives has remained a close friend and confidante of the chairman, president and treasurer of the People Who Play By The Rules PAC, and during her gubernatorial race, that individual served as her chief
campaign consultant (https://www.cbsnews.com/chicago/news/jeanne-ives-controversial-ad/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

During the April 4th election cycle, Gov. Pritzker and the Democratic Party of Illinois spent $800,000 to support their extremist, liberal school board candidates, while at the same time, using that funding to viciously attack conservative school board candidates – every day moms and dads, who just wanted to serve their community; reverse falling test scores; and remove inappropriate sexual education curriculum and divisive concepts that only further deepen racial divides from the classrooms.

During the pandemic, school board meetings were flooded with angry parents, advocating on behalf of their children – and demanding a return to in-person learning.

In response, these parents were demonized, silenced, and they were even labeled as “
domestic terrorists (https://www.texasattorneygeneral.gov/news/releases/ag-paxton-sues-biden-administration-silencing-parents-labeling-them-terrorists?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ” by senior officials within the Biden administration.

But as it turns out, the parents were right – they were always right.

In a paper published in
2022 (https://caldercenter.org/sites/default/files/CALDER%20Working%20Paper%20267-0522_0.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on the consequences of remote and hybrid learning during the pandemic, the research concluded that the shift away from classroom instruction during the pandemic, “had profound consequences for student achievement.”

School board
races (https://www.newsmax.com/markvargas/school-boards-republicans-woke/2023/02/02/id/1107041/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) generated widespread attention throughout the country and in Illinois as liberal districts are promoting a sexual education curriculum (https://www.newsweek.com/republicans-declare-war-sex-education-seek-restrictions-public-schools-1777650?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that teaches young children about gender identity and hormone blockers – subjects completely inappropriate for children.

These same school districts are also teaching about
critical race theory (https://www.foxnews.com/us/what-is-critical-race-theory?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – a divisive concept that teaches about race superiority and that the United States is fundamentally a racist country, among other things. Often, it is titled “culturally, responsive teaching,” “social/restorative justice,” “equity/gender support plans” and “social emotional learning.”

In February, Gov. Pritzker went on the attack during a
press conference (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5FPkUhtMAs0&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , calling Illinois-based conservative grassroots organizations that recruit and support local school board candidates’ “racists” and “anti-LGBTQ.”

With very little funding out there to support conservative school board candidates, Gov. Pritzker and the Democratic Party of Illinois won 84 out of 117 races and the Illinois Education Association reported that they won 90 percent of their races.

The Democrats also controlled the narrative, painting conservative candidates as “extremists” – but unfortunately, there wasn’t any funding available to help them fight back against the vicious attacks and lies.

And the election results proved that.

https://youtu.be/WUDlN08On9Q?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Terry Newsom, father and president of Parents Involved in Education, joins Mark Vargas live on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer to discuss how his school board activism has resulted in him being placed on TSA watch lists.

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=471a571661-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_20_01_31&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-471a571661-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Caroline Colarusso
subject: Election Recount in Reading this Weekend
body:
There will be a hand count
| | | |
---
---
Friends,
Have you heard about the recount taking place this Saturday in Reading, Massachusetts. Read about it here: [Reading Recap - Recapping Everything in Reading, MA -🧾 Election Recount Next Weekend](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K23x2hhmn8EC-rqrbcddlhOVY9rknXeAOMQ7oVWGL0ZECrbHTdbrkFdCQkR8fXP9QRkne_r9OnoTJKxrjZYqoSIeF1905zfTGiPhNOD_NJ56gQbDF-BazWZTrSEN7awdt6yk2O4wk9NLFSjVTPDNO31sCBISvh4KQLiAbmzOXXv4MVJi6yxNq-rP5BjIbPKxbMGHWAdsWefRlnJGQD9t3wdESyAAxrwa4BXeQRlAPiHJwuie3jkjsyDuUOs47ZR18pu3euyJ9Ski4BIZGnTOZBGzSmar6kPwV1fLP-GBHg-SGg3rK6Qg1Q==&c=yN688oDXT_oQ8Do3iBhbMFrT_U7cy1m3hf8CaghWioutDpb5GAH9ng==&ch=sWleEYfIBanAlr4p6_FL_7kQOIMLEUC3Ep-4v-f8BAg__fUVrM91IQ==)
Congratulations to the candidates who had to collect signatures from Reading voters to initiate a hand count. These brave candidates cared enough to take the time to ensure that the very close election results are both accurate and affirmed by hand counting the ballots.
We all want to have confidence in our election system especially when it comes to the cities and towns in which we live and play, however when an election is decided by a 4 vote margin, there needs to be a mechanism for residents to authenticate the results. Thankfully this will take place in Reading this weekend.
If you are interested in contacting the candidates, or would like more information, please feel free to reach out by email at [CarolineColarusso@gmail.com](mailto:carolinecolarusso@gmail.com) and we will put you in touch with the folks involved.
We must take every opportunity to ensure that people have confidence in our election system. Efforts such as this are important in instilling trust in the election process.
Thank You, Caroline Colarusso
---
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180
---

clean_body: There will be a hand count | | | | Friends, Have you heard about the recount taking place this Saturday in Reading, Massachusetts. Read about it here: == Congratulations to the candidates who had to collect signatures from Reading voters to initiate a hand count. These brave candidates cared enough to take the time to ensure that the very close election results are both accurate and affirmed by hand counting the ballots. We all want to have confidence in our election system especially when it comes to the cities and towns in which we live and play, however when an election is decided by a 4 vote margin, there needs to be a mechanism for residents to authenticate the results. Thankfully this will take place in Reading this weekend. If you are interested in contacting the candidates, or would like more information, please feel free to reach out by email at mailto:carolinecolarusso@gmail.com and we will put you in touch with the folks involved. We must take every opportunity to ensure that people have confidence in our election system. Efforts such as this are important in instilling trust in the election process. Thank You, Caroline Colarusso | | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180 | | Sent by mailto:carolinecolarusso@gmail.com in collaboration with

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We don’t have a moment to lose
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | | | | | | | [DOUBLE YOUR GIFT FOR THE NEXT 58 HOURS ONLY](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1730591?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, I had to personally reach out to you early, ahead of the Earth Day rush Saturday, and share this important update on our planet-saving work.
No matter what greedy corporations say, or how many millions of dollars they spend on PR and misinformation campaigns, Friends of the Earth is committed to fighting back. **Corporate pollution is a choice, and we CAN hold companies accountable for that choice. **
**Right now, mega-manufacturing plants are pumping out single-use plastics that end up in our oceans to the tune of two huge garbage trucks per minute. Corporations are aggressively working to expand mining, logging and drilling operations on our public lands. The resulting habitat loss threatens the survival of endangered species – who are now in more danger than EVER. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is worsening from out-of-control fossil fuel greed. **
**The fact is this: We don't have to live like this, and our only Earth doesn't have to die like this.** We have the power to stop catastrophic outcomes for our planet and all its inhabitants if we fight back together now. And what more powerful moment than Earth Day to take action?
**That’s why this is such heartening news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day up to our goal of $180,000 but only until midnight Saturday. Because you've been such a committed supporter, we created a custom match link you can use to be the first to DOUBLE your Earth Day impact. So please hurry and make your gift for our planet now! Here’s your personal link: **
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1730591?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This goal means so much to our organization and the planet – and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early-bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators and stop the climate crisis before it’s too late.
**Matches like this don’t come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. **That’s why we must seize this opportunity for our planet, friend. With all our futures on the line, getting complacent or giving in to despair is simply not an option. So we’re counting on committed environmentalists like you to set the pace for the rest of our community.
**With time running out, we need to make this Earth Day really count. Please, make your membership gift and be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our planet while we still can. Your personalized Earth Day match access link is right here – donate now to have every dollar doubled:**
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1730591?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you,

Erich Pica
President
Friends of the Earth
|

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: The Democrats Don't want you to Read This
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
We must stand together to stop the woke, radical left. As your Senator in Richmond....
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/010001879f1d4c78-f103408a-842b-4dbc-8154-17f185173511-000000/3aFwir3dYI_VB0PXwhXh-WXpD4I=318)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Peter, will you stand with Governor Youngkin and myself against the radical left?
---
| | [ENDORSE BRYCE REEVES HERE](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fendorse/1/010001879f1d4c78-f103408a-842b-4dbc-8154-17f185173511-000000/kmgm_z_Omb2A2Ny-S56T5SZeD9A=318)
---
| Fellow Virginians, We must stand together to stop the woke, radical left. As your Senator in Richmond, I have seen the Democrats push bills to legalize or decriminalize dangerous psychedelic drugs and advocate to loosen restrictions on our parole board. I have seen them fight tooth and nail to release cop-killers from prison and to spend the Virginia taxpayer's dime on bloated government departments and programs. But I know for a fact _that isn't what Virginians want!_ I have struggled alongside my Republican colleagues in Richmond to ensure these dangerous policies do not see the light of day and never make it into the Virginia codebooks. Now, after taking the fight to Richmond, after serving as your voice in our Commonwealth's capitol, _I NEED YOUR SUPPORT_. My primary election is a mere 16 days away, and as Senate Republican Whip, I am committed to ensuring we flip the Virginia Senate red this coming November! I am counting on your vote, your endorsement, and your financial contributions to succeed in my mission. Every single dollar is another letter we can send, another few seconds of radio or tv time to ensure we energize Republicans throughout the Commonwealth to show up _IN DROVES_ this November. With 16 days left until the date of my primary on Saturday, May 6th, I am asking that you consider contributing _$16_ , _$160_ , or _whatever you may be able to spare_. I would also ask that you keep myself, my team, and our families in your prayers. It will take each and every one of us to stand up to the _ultra-progressive woke agenda_ that has been pushed by the left. Please, help me in ensuring your friends, family, and neighbors show up on Saturday, May 6th and again in November to ensure the left does not damage our Commonwealth any further. Yours in service,
---
| | |
---

clean_body: We must stand together to stop the woke, radical left. As your Senator in Richmond.... | | | | | | | | | | Peter, will you stand with Governor Youngkin and myself against the radical left? | | | Fellow Virginians, We must stand together to stop the woke, radical left. As your Senator in Richmond, I have seen the Democrats push bills to legalize or decriminalize dangerous psychedelic drugs and advocate to loosen restrictions on our parole board. I have seen them fight tooth and nail to release cop-killers from prison and to spend the Virginia taxpayer's dime on bloated government departments and programs. But I know for a fact that isn't what Virginians want! I have struggled alongside my Republican colleagues in Richmond to ensure these dangerous policies do not see the light of day and never make it into the Virginia codebooks. Now, after taking the fight to Richmond, after serving as your voice in our Commonwealth's capitol, I NEED YOUR SUPPORT. My primary election is a mere 16 days away, and as Senate Republican Whip, I am committed to ensuring we flip the Virginia Senate red this coming November! I am counting on your vote, your endorsement, and your financial contributions to succeed in my mission. Every single dollar is another letter we can send, another few seconds of radio or tv time to ensure we energize Republicans throughout the Commonwealth to show up IN DROVES this November. With 16 days left until the date of my primary on Saturday, May 6th, I am asking that you consider contributing $16 , $160 , or whatever you may be able to spare. I would also ask that you keep myself, my team, and our families in your prayers. It will take each and every one of us to stand up to the ultra-progressive woke agenda that has been pushed by the left. Please, help me in ensuring your friends, family, and neighbors show up on Saturday, May 6th and again in November to ensure the left does not damage our Commonwealth any further. Yours in service, | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | P.O. Box 7021 Fredericksburg, VA 22404, United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES | | or

name: Ted Cruz
subject: My case to ABOLISH THE IRS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
Fellow Conservative, For decades - really almost since its inception - the IRS, a bureaucracy with the power to crush lives and livelihoods, has been weaponized for political purposes. **It's one of many reasons I've led the charge to ABOLISH it altogether.** In Chapter Two of [_**_Justice Corrupted_**_](http://trk.libertyledger.) , I detail the long history of U.S. presidents abusing the power of the executive branch to punish their real or perceived enemies with audits, harassment, and coordinated leaks of private financial information, from Franklin Roosevelt to John Kennedy to Richard Nixon. Then, I do a deep dive on the rise of the Tea Party movement in the early 2010s and how the Obama administration targeted liberty-loving conservatives in an attempt to silence us. If you haven't ordered and read Justice Corrupted yet, [_**I'd urge you to do so today**_](http://trk.libertyledger.).
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
In early 2014, I introduced amendments during a session of the Senate Judiciary Committee that would have made it illegal for the IRS to target individuals based on their politics.

Both of these amendments were REJECTED unanimously by the Democratic colleagues. This issue should not be partisan. But it's clear that it has become so.
** **
**In [__Justice Corrupted__](http://trk.libertyledger.-YZ_G0RwO9vzh4cv7rqWNg) , I make the case for why we need to abolish the IRS and move toward a simple flat tax for everyone: **
---
"Inside the Internal Revenue Service, you'll find hundreds of thousands of rules and regulations that even the most advanced supercomputers in the world have trouble working through. If you're an adult person in the United States, it's entirely possible (likely even) that you've violated some obscure provision of this code without even knowing it. That is why the IRS does not seek to track down every small violation and punish those who commit those violations. Instead, it conducts routine and usually random audits of certain taxpayers, reviewing that person's tax return to make sure that he or she hasn't done anything wrong.

"Officially, the IRS is supposed to decide whom it audits based on a complete and semi-random computer algorithm. There is a points system for violations, and if a taxpayer gets a certain number of "points," that person gets audited. If the IRS goes after a person for anything other than those reasons, it is in violation of the law.

"Of course, there are so many potential violations - more than 70,000 pages of them - that it often isn't hard for an IRS employee to get an investigation going.

"So, if another president - say Joe Biden, who has already advocated for a new law that would empower the IRS to track every single banking transaction over $600 - wanted to sic the IRS on his political opponents, he wouldn't need much justification to do so. The tax code is so complicated that it can be weaponized against virtually anyone at any time."
---
You can read more on the weaponization of the IRS and the details of the flat tax plan I proposed during my 2016 presidential campaign in _Justice Corrupted_. [__](http://trk.libertyledger.)[__](http://trk.libertyledger.)[_**Take a moment today to order your copy >>>**_](http://trk.libertyledger.-qRHvg) If you already have a copy of Justice Corrupted, THANK YOU and [_**please consider pitching in a special contribution**_](http://trk.libertyledger._bqvA) to fuel our fight at Team Cruz.

For Liberty,
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._2GLe1JpOw)
---
Ted Cruz
---
| | | **Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
---
| | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701
---

---
|
---

---
