body:
It has been over 40 years since Marcy Kaptur was first elected to the US House of Representatives, and her time in Washington has become a reflection | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8123517?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=742b0e2052&e=0426928d91)
Peter,
**It's time to face the facts:** Career politicians like Kaptur are not working for us, the American people.

Instead, they are beholden to special interests and dark money, making deals behind closed doors that hurt our communities and leave us behind. We need leaders who put our country and our needs first, not China's or any other foreign country.

It has been over 40 years since Marcy Kaptur was first elected to the US House of Representatives, and her time in Washington has become a reflection of the career politicians who are muddying the swamp and failing to represent our best interests.
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=762acd07d8&e=0426928d91)
| [CHIP IN $20.24 OR MORE TODAY TO FIRE CORRUPT KAPTUR >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=19c0a93b18&e=0426928d91)
---
Ohio's 9th district needs real leadership. Violent crime is out of control, and skyrocketing inflation is crushing the working class. We cannot afford leaders who think this is okay or even worse, ignore these pressing issues altogether.

We need innovative ideas that will make America great again. We need leaders who are willing to get their hands dirty and do what's right for our communities. We need leaders who will stand up for our values and put America first.
**That's why I'm running for Congress, and I'm asking for your support. Select an option below to chip in any amount towards our goal to Save Ohio and take America Back. With your support, we will give Ohio’s 9th District the representative we deserve.

**[**Donate $20.24 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate ANY amount to SAVE OHIO >>>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=2a6dfa572c&e=0426928d91)
Together, we can make a real difference in Ohio's 9th district. We can drain the swamp in Washington and elect America-first leaders who will work tirelessly to make our communities safer, our economy stronger, and our country better for everyone.

Thank you for your continued support!
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=bdd79a745d&e=0426928d91)

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01aea5a4428a4117b1cfeedb3e0cea0d&_e=IlM8FAVivC6f-2ZMK09HS98OElD20rsN4rlOB6PnLJnrQsv9HabudCfYawSHFZT4tj55nNtYVZW2tz5_Z5tmhCS0Y2Gxd3e3-Mjsq2Tk2ijvTzs-jcFH8yrPUEfpdSVmjQlm1Dj-gDQ8y0uODMGLminZINkBxxiEV15sF0HhPwweXs4ve-CgKBZpEh001Y-QbP8HhsGkbHGJ14RUlznFE5HOHV4o2zDEERoaV6_cN872zkMQKZnMRjrZa5kWvwEfqAd__OO_KcDSsSRaAjmIiWr2AqpTMh0GM9w1UJO7GemIJixu6_gKtuWMu3BF4SAj)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01aea5a4428a4117b1cfeedb3e0cea0d&_e=IlM8FAVivC6f-2ZMK09HS98OElD20rsN4rlOB6PnLJnrQsv9HabudCfYawSHFZT4tj55nNtYVZW2tz5_Z5tmhCS0Y2Gxd3e3-Mjsq2Tk2ijvTzs-jcFH8yrPUEfpdSVmjQlm1Dj-gDQ8y0uODMGLminZINkBxxiEV15sF0HhPwz9JPKkpJBqWg0T54qAjdKwPoDBkRT7h4p9ptayrCLqp_P70aJaO7t94NAgghFaXi_Xor-6y35si_6vPoHi-nY8OQNXnVzCw5xzUSWRSDo726XzkYNEea0newm98YMYIhz6T2RHQlqJxxpWKWJO9deF)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01aea5a4428a4117b1cfeedb3e0cea0d&_e=IlM8FAVivC6f-2ZMK09HS98OElD20rsN4rlOB6PnLJnrQsv9HabudCfYawSHFZT4tj55nNtYVZW2tz5_Z5tmhCS0Y2Gxd3e3-Mjsq2Tk2ijvTzs-jcFH8yrPUEfpdSVmjQlm1Dj-gDQ8y0uODMGLminZINkBxxiEV15sF0HhPwy3UrydNVYLcOnFFgY36kXOIp03DBIs7CY6SlMzoQD8ErZdHzIe-atKHlKgzYrD1-N2ZHPUHTxbe-WIA9Bx4XwEb3bHTaTk2MpeULkh9QzDwG9wVM5gUs4i0PmsetCaB2srjOH7CH_OAobLP4Wd5gEc)
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01aea5a4428a4117b1cfeedb3e0cea0d&_e=IlM8FAVivC6f-2ZMK09HS98OElD20rsN4rlOB6PnLJnrQsv9HabudCfYawSHFZT4tj55nNtYVZW2tz5_Z5tmhCS0Y2Gxd3e3-Mjsq2Tk2ijvTzs-jcFH8yrPUEfpdSVmjQlm1Dj-gDQ8y0uODMGLminZINkBxxiEV15sF0HhPwz_6AASSTJm2FCUDSoXBtWqvJXwask4kJhOLGDeSs4Zp-aaOREUQM6wbJzOgxBhQYltCw1QS2s5c2ARG3hN2W4__aESV-BaejUIUfSCwxmzEIdYtcI1wlhXzg4TweDPS7X_naQSJWWoFYpo_88H0YjS)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation 's heroes deserve.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01aea5a4428a4117b1cfeedb3e0cea0d&_e=IlM8FAVivC6f-2ZMK09HS98OElD20rsN4rlOB6PnLJnrQsv9HabudCfYawSHFZT4tj55nNtYVZW2tz5_Z5tmhCS0Y2Gxd3e3-Mjsq2Tk2ijvTzs-jcFH8yrPUEfpdSVmjQlm1Dj-gDQ8y0uODMGLminZINkBxxiEV15sF0HhPwwwjemsR9epe2Q90JCu4u82agzm9UR694gK4P0hwjQZY1d2KHtC_TezSEcOIWJlPkfJg8coDPskpbU45LUgJDiTRr6WtzT8WFkTewzBvepZrUl1W4cgVb6Moc1zvmduh0kRWuDjkgOzHn61HZEnPdA2)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01aea5a4428a4117b1cfeedb3e0cea0d&_e=IlM8FAVivC6f-2ZMK09HS98OElD20rsN4rlOB6PnLJnrQsv9HabudCfYawSHFZT4tj55nNtYVZW2tz5_Z5tmhCS0Y2Gxd3e3-Mjsq2Tk2ijvTzs-jcFH8yrPUEfpdSVmjQlm1Dj-gDQ8y0uODMGLminZINkBxxiEV15sF0HhPww397fWp4Cz0ImjPpC3wnDVrf5mgqoMrR6T93uMB_lxoJvuuaPvWSWKnfXncBZ9wON5DyuAA83vm3A7POd801rH6lh87KID4gzMibqYHbICTR5UA6-M4e5xS2oOrcv1Mf-1oO0Vw5dup0NTw2ju9Oa7)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01aea5a4428a4117b1cfeedb3e0cea0d&_e=IlM8FAVivC6f-2ZMK09HS98OElD20rsN4rlOB6PnLJnrQsv9HabudCfYawSHFZT4tj55nNtYVZW2tz5_Z5tmhCS0Y2Gxd3e3-Mjsq2Tk2ijvTzs-jcFH8yrPUEfpdSVmjQlm1Dj-gDQ8y0uODMGLminZINkBxxiEV15sF0HhPwyClBDqEukYxneKRrW1feznBAMgsennClzdr4NbfNyL3oTxnfpEy00c_SelabSMJmjaYYcZhBt20aAEc5DHgRoCmPICLWA45NxNTd13N02RMlkiz1WFU-Dxu5D6JmiI-SjJpF08DYKRR19-9QD0h9VV) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01aea5a4428a4117b1cfeedb3e0cea0d&_e=IlM8FAVivC6f-2ZMK09HS98OElD20rsN4rlOB6PnLJnrQsv9HabudCfYawSHFZT4tj55nNtYVZW2tz5_Z5tmhCS0Y2Gxd3e3-Mjsq2Tk2ijvTzs-jcFH8yrPUEfpdSVmjQlm1Dj-gDQ8y0uODMGLminZINkBxxiEV15sF0HhPwxUwwND3CImn1pDU5b0tCwlPDPf975nn3V3yWYed_IFVoyfTaMHQ68va0k0pHqaLkRUTm8zeqAZXW198QnT40961TsW7mpQqB1OVCeGfqP9yL2TLyWBu8J1WkBQfnbgY3o6kLe1RYD82j6iOGUnPPGp)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01aea5a4428a4117b1cfeedb3e0cea0d&_e=IlM8FAVivC6f-2ZMK09HS98OElD20rsN4rlOB6PnLJnrQsv9HabudCfYawSHFZT4tj55nNtYVZW2tz5_Z5tmhCS0Y2Gxd3e3-Mjsq2Tk2ijvTzs-jcFH8yrPUEfpdSVmjQlm1Dj-gDQ8y0uODMGLminZINkBxxiEV15sF0HhPwyL2d3NW1arAGqZlOuwnOh_ol9N9sKK124enQmZyb0tf5UuJekjTTFHB_GssBIPE3079D2jVjs0lgi6KAFxkdswv93aENBHw2awotldag8mBTk4HS_lQ-Zs0YC1bnESKlNbKdWHiSBslIQGJxr39HCV)

---

body:
In case you missed it, I made a HUGE announcement.| | | Friend,

---
President Trump has once again promised to release a list of names from which he will choose future Supreme Court justices as your next President.

---
**But he’s going one step further than that...**

---
_...Not only does he want you to know the sort of justice he’ll pick, he wants YOU to have a say in the whole process._

---
That’s why he’s put together a survey for you to tell President Trump the type of values, principles, and philosophy you want his Supreme Court nominee to embody.

---
_But, as of the last time we checked the survey, we didn’t see that you had taken it yet..._

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Stand with Chloe against “gender-affirming care” for children
body:
Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was “trans...”

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, [**Will you take a moment right now to send a heartfelt note of support to the brave young woman leading the fight against the radical Left’s push normalize “gender affirming care” for young children? **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17081%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RZ1oU8n7TRXDa7jih4l1GA&sysid=1) Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was “trans...” ... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente’s multi-billion-dollar industry to “transition” her from a girl to a boy. She was given weekly testosterone injections. She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders. And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe’s breasts in a radical double mastectomy. You read that correctly, Chloe was 15 years old! **Chloe and her parents were coerced by doctors into believing that absent a surgical transition plan, Chloe would die. Doctors gave Chloe’s parents the false dilemma --_would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son_? ** And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to test “gender affirming care” on a vulnerable young girl. But Chloe grew out of her gender dysphoria and is now heroically fighting back with a landmark lawsuit against the hospital and doctors that mutilated her healthy body for profit. [**I hope you can see why I’m asking you to send a heartfelt note of support to Chloe.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17082%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DygPeD1OP9dpoGwunz23hw&sysid=1) Just a brief “I’m thinking of you” or “you’re in my prayers” will let Chloe know she’s not alone in this fight. Chloe is an inspirational young woman and I’m so proud to be her attorney - but this nightmare has taken a toll. For the rest of Chloe’s life, her voice will always be deeper, she’ll never have breasts or be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone density concerns, and more lurk in her future. **Worse, Chloe has been called a “liar” and told de-transitioners like her “don’t exist.”** So, I know reading your kind words will mean so much to her. [**Can I count on you to send a note of support to Chloe right away?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17083%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R8KDdcWwUHmAYCp748Dn1Q&sysid=1) Sadly, Chloe is not the only child to fall prey to radical doctors pushing these barbaric procedures on children. This is happening to kids across America. That’s why my non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently mutilating her body... ...and finally bring hope for those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. [**So, after you send your note to Chloe, I’m asking you to support her landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation of $35 to the case’s legal fund.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17084%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KeJ9Lr5Q0DazQmGvmiURog&sysid=1)
---
| | [**SEND A NOTE OF SUPPORT TO CHLOE TODAY**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17095%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=68AqLNSCqVn1HJ0kIMuS%2fA&sysid=1)
---
| | Winning this case won’t be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They’re going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. But making the radical Left pay through litigation is the only way we’ll shut down these predatory barbaric medical procedures. [**Can I count on you to join me in Chloe’s fight today by sending her a special note and supporting our legal battle with a tax-deductible $35 donation to our legal fund?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17096%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XXPPcCcAEeTeAx7BAgcczg&sysid=1) Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves. Thank you for standing up for Chloe and for kids like her across the country.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | P.S. Despite everything she’s been through physically and emotionally, 18-year-old Chloe Cole is bravely leading the charge to protect vulnerable children from dangerous “gender affirming care” procedures being pushed upon them. [**Will you let Chloe know she can count on you by sending her a heartfelt note of support today?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17097%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S41BUBmsZz0Nn7l27BR%2flA&sysid=1) After sending your brief message, please make a special one-time, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to support Chloe’s landmark lawsuit against Kaiser Permanente and her radical doctors today.

She was given weekly testosterone injections. She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders. And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe’s breasts in a radical double mastectomy. You read that correctly, Chloe was 15 years old! Chloe and her parents were coerced by doctors into believing that absent a surgical transition plan, Chloe would die. Doctors gave Chloe’s parents the false dilemma --would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son? And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to test “gender affirming care” on a vulnerable young girl. But Chloe grew out of her gender dysphoria and is now heroically fighting back with a landmark lawsuit against the hospital and doctors that mutilated her healthy body for profit. Just a brief “I’m thinking of you” or “you’re in my prayers” will let Chloe know she’s not alone in this fight. Chloe is an inspirational young woman and I’m so proud to be her attorney - but this nightmare has taken a toll. For the rest of Chloe’s life, her voice will always be deeper, she’ll never have breasts or be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone density concerns, and more lurk in her future. Worse, Chloe has been called a “liar” and told de-transitioners like her “don’t exist.” So, I know reading your kind words will mean so much to her. Sadly, Chloe is not the only child to fall prey to radical doctors pushing these barbaric procedures on children. This is happening to kids across America. That’s why my non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently mutilating her body... ...and finally bring hope for those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. | | | | Winning this case won’t be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They’re going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. But making the radical Left pay through litigation is the only way we’ll shut down these predatory barbaric medical procedures. Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves. Thank you for standing up for Chloe and for kids like her across the country. | | Sincerely, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | P.S. Despite everything she’s been through physically and emotionally, 18-year-old Chloe Cole is bravely leading the charge to protect vulnerable children from dangerous “gender affirming care” procedures being pushed upon them. After sending your brief message, please make a special one-time, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to support Chloe’s landmark lawsuit against Kaiser Permanente and her radical doctors today. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 | Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Team Pramila
subject: Ending the War on Drugs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today, let’s reaffirm our collective commitment to ending the War on Drugs and making marijuana federally legal once and for all.
#
Hi Peter,
**Today is 4/20!** While many states celebrate legalized recreational and medicinal marijuana, today we want to recognize the fight we have before us in ending the racist War on Drugs.
Black people are over four times more likely to be arrested and prosecuted for marijuana possession, despite white people partaking at the same rate.1 And while business owners in legal states are able to enjoy the economic benefits of legal marijuana, there are still thousands of people who are in prison for nonviolent marijuana-related crimes.
Our communities have been historically deeply affected by the War on Drugs — predominantly and disproportionately Black, poor, and young folks in our own neighborhoods. And it’s clear that this political tool has been used to propagate our deeply broken prison systems.
[**If you stand with Pramila and our collective progressive movement to build a just and equal democracy for us all, please consider chipping in $4.20****to help us build momentum for this fight.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41610?refcode=em20230420-2392&t=21&akid=2392%2E420207%2EJh8Gt_)
**[Chip in $4.20](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41610?refcode=em20230420-2392&t=22&akid=2392%2E420207%2EJh8Gt_)**
**As the chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, Pramila stood by President Biden in his efforts to pardon people convicted of marijuana possession in October.** Pramila knows that the only way to rebuild the communities hit hardest by this War on Drugs is by continuing to expunge the records of nonviolent offenders, federally legalize marijuana, and work to bring new jobs into the market to economically benefit us all.
Peter, it will take all of us to end this War on Drugs, and we can start by demanding federal legalization and decriminalization of cannabis, and make way for transformative criminal justice reform.
[**So today, let’s reaffirm our collective commitment to ending the War on Drugs and making marijuana federally legal once and for all.****If you stand with our progressive movement, please chip in $4.20 to help us continue our fight.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41610?refcode=em20230420-2392&t=24&akid=2392%2E420207%2EJh8Gt_)
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
* * *
1 - [NORML](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41599?t=25&akid=2392%2E420207%2EJh8Gt_)

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230420-2392-footer&t=26&refcode2=2392_420207_Jh8Gt_&akid=2392%2E420207%2EJh8Gt_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=27&akid=2392%2E420207%2EJh8Gt_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2392%2E420207%2EJh8Gt_)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83b11c4fa633445095c6d010cab70eff&_e=JuQvPALtt5hqnmGwzS8nF7UCFD6I1JEI_TJ6VpzJdPwzFhniO24gSwfeOfk-WnJ6H4MwDxrWMQ8xsaIdQw4vP1W0DLLwQkjJcstjY7NHI5Hdi6OAkFOE0fZhAueTnNojfDiU5YTZSaymXjeY3IWHhjkajNYksm4QFdJR3uSkcpVPtOQ9V_xSGHA7pH11K9lvvKkVwN5LWYDzm6eVo-9jvgrneuMey0DoJOsVFR2zgyUXEy6Hki0HKTMy_Thc84RZ1QpHSyXNl_f9Z7-KPo_167hYgvpzXRz9_Jd_lgNvKcfhYZSP5WlBI7sZliFc50eM)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83b11c4fa633445095c6d010cab70eff&_e=JuQvPALtt5hqnmGwzS8nF7UCFD6I1JEI_TJ6VpzJdPwzFhniO24gSwfeOfk-WnJ6H4MwDxrWMQ8xsaIdQw4vP1W0DLLwQkjJcstjY7NHI5Hdi6OAkFOE0fZhAueTnNojfDiU5YTZSaymXjeY3IWHhjkajNYksm4QFdJR3uSkcpUmiqCdweIZLIHDqrJM6rD18FJqcUox4AUKoyNoS3FU5ItSBzpr113xzj_5DdTzPui3PD9i8Ns-Y7xZ436asz8EyDVXHTliMw7lHVLeHh_YjNkf8ljlviZ2aUUwJNwmzkh4y9jCPK-UyITrqFKlVhep)

When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation 's heroes deserve.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83b11c4fa633445095c6d010cab70eff&_e=JuQvPALtt5hqnmGwzS8nF7UCFD6I1JEI_TJ6VpzJdPwzFhniO24gSwfeOfk-WnJ6H4MwDxrWMQ8xsaIdQw4vP1W0DLLwQkjJcstjY7NHI5Hdi6OAkFOE0fZhAueTnNojfDiU5YTZSaymXjeY3IWHhjkajNYksm4QFdJR3uSkcpXqEsKNii6PTZUhmo6L33wz1Afk3lDcRAXwZ8NiKWw-Vb0IsukyLPffXOHVb7CsdSBJPUEI0vwJj5qCqdLxwwJORiOe3IpXFKuzlEz2x8J9bTb7KyA8e3qgQddYC4yK7aRv6b6kjTQcyjBPkJYMaqzQ)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83b11c4fa633445095c6d010cab70eff&_e=JuQvPALtt5hqnmGwzS8nF7UCFD6I1JEI_TJ6VpzJdPwzFhniO24gSwfeOfk-WnJ6H4MwDxrWMQ8xsaIdQw4vP1W0DLLwQkjJcstjY7NHI5Hdi6OAkFOE0fZhAueTnNojfDiU5YTZSaymXjeY3IWHhjkajNYksm4QFdJR3uSkcpWUgmotySx_6Ae8TyR8jbvaTB5dpb5va1wRb2pPXYHEEXOWz4bDP0BI3oS862c3hRFMRh-bE_oKAUzRDBuGKqxoEaKe-4tOibXeKyGHhc91NOwcNtijIVdfQloXmlUosFjHCq-AXOm0dToVQLARfERX)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83b11c4fa633445095c6d010cab70eff&_e=JuQvPALtt5hqnmGwzS8nF7UCFD6I1JEI_TJ6VpzJdPwzFhniO24gSwfeOfk-WnJ6H4MwDxrWMQ8xsaIdQw4vP1W0DLLwQkjJcstjY7NHI5Hdi6OAkFOE0fZhAueTnNojfDiU5YTZSaymXjeY3IWHhjkajNYksm4QFdJR3uSkcpWRJ2vOGeClB6yDSEhAqABdJto7u9frdRYDyJ_ELR0S1qHpYMm_4VhvJwNBfunhZvthxcH2Bk8XV-EneqhB0wBwnZD8de5S2CwVVu05lXgmaxFrPKiSOqF_y-TCB5hNif3yaRWm8yQr-Mvd9FyGZ_kz) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83b11c4fa633445095c6d010cab70eff&_e=JuQvPALtt5hqnmGwzS8nF7UCFD6I1JEI_TJ6VpzJdPwzFhniO24gSwfeOfk-WnJ6H4MwDxrWMQ8xsaIdQw4vP1W0DLLwQkjJcstjY7NHI5Hdi6OAkFOE0fZhAueTnNojfDiU5YTZSaymXjeY3IWHhjkajNYksm4QFdJR3uSkcpVgNgFKXoQTgcvfQn5Jx6zbNvMyTr7FHYO-utTUojn0qewiXg3KjPwiCSagxztCzUEjwGgMh6YiImJHbP88sg9sqZ1FK8RszBJnA8Qv-wEJDYI_6jgH1BiZjPUYXi_8zBHqm0ujnzdGOCTbGl-XtRpz)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade

Friend,
In 2019, the youth vaping epidemic peaked in Minnesota and across the country. JUUL began deceptively attracting young people who quickly became addicted to the dangerous nicotine in the e-cigarette devices.
Nothing is more important than the health and safety of our children, so I stepped in and filed a lawsuit against JUUL for using aggressive marketing in order to hook thousands of minors on e-cigarettes.
**After weeks of trial, I am happy to announce we reached a settlement with JUUL in the best interest of Minnesotans. **
When I was re-elected in November, I promised that I would always stand up to powerful special interests seeking to take advantage of us and our children. This outcome is yet another example of how I’m keeping that promise. Thank you for powering my work and making it possible.
[**If you haven’t already, take advantage of your PCR and make a refundable $50 contribution to my campaign today so we can keep fighting together to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62055827/402163093/-725745858?refcode=body&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc2YjM1Ni05MGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jePDlYnra5wn6MG0sq6jkTq4PdyB3gXeZxOs64WxlSY=)

JUUL began deceptively attracting young people who quickly became addicted to the dangerous nicotine in the e-cigarette devices. Nothing is more important than the health and safety of our children, so I stepped in and filed a lawsuit against JUUL for using aggressive marketing in order to hook thousands of minors on e-cigarettes. After weeks of trial, I am happy to announce we reached a settlement with JUUL in the best interest of Minnesotans. When I was re-elected in November, I promised that I would always stand up to powerful special interests seeking to take advantage of us and our children. This outcome is yet another example of how I’m keeping that promise. body:
I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e0b6c947d83443d2b5a6e750287b1d9b&_e=KLS4m89-yhjv8dIbX_VmDdp0Pv8kl3rapV4iLxD9Ee_RSXQmowZmy1iC0ccghjc5r3CF2Vc2LSq7YLxnVQJrr49sjPX-mZvEa2hTxYaHrdOeeeib6jcHlrb6ojUgchfOJwI0cMVo2Pc8XQfrRITaREQAD3rM7py1Gr0Zmp0GmBON39kHbSyPbqjX-v6r2ETWNlMhrjFCb6sobMtI_0ekyUNyeXQVYJdVzRqBmodk16rs1vw1sHSjGNwtKaON3sVPPaVscsfjoL9GdSgzReV_S6ZCwOcsajtI2xeXpycmTeAvi-TzkQCHnhG3hZRJlXftNgv5llSsoTqfl3CyrjbT3CXCHXdrOamYAckugToFQxzthJrAFKq7JVlddtFEZ0zDE7pwASGMKceLsCKO4tfTPUgGpBzIIDlSqlXeSI4xYMM%3D)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e0b6c947d83443d2b5a6e750287b1d9b&_e=KLS4m89-yhjv8dIbX_VmDdp0Pv8kl3rapV4iLxD9Ee_RSXQmowZmy1iC0ccghjc5r3CF2Vc2LSq7YLxnVQJrr49sjPX-mZvEa2hTxYaHrdOeeeib6jcHlrb6ojUgchfOJwI0cMVo2Pc8XQfrRITaREQAD3rM7py1Gr0Zmp0GmBON39kHbSyPbqjX-v6r2ETWNlMhrjFCb6sobMtI_0ekyUNyeXQVYJdVzRqBmodk16rs1vw1sHSjGNwtKaON3sVPx4mgqlngIXXjfZQ38sHNjLqgbj8vxvz0swBrofibKGlJqWn0MRby-sOB__OixhyBEQY5dNpwIraG7tpEMrVo3x291V0w4KIn-vKYobjp9R0XmzpVqdZo71JU6kQs_JjCmjBHcLkbsCtt4cmLIDclunc_0vKf9uLOUZGVxIAIaXo%3D)**

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e0b6c947d83443d2b5a6e750287b1d9b&_e=KLS4m89-yhjv8dIbX_VmDdp0Pv8kl3rapV4iLxD9Ee_RSXQmowZmy1iC0ccghjc5r3CF2Vc2LSq7YLxnVQJrr49sjPX-mZvEa2hTxYaHrdOeeeib6jcHlrb6ojUgchfOJwI0cMVo2Pc8XQfrRITaREQAD3rM7py1Gr0Zmp0GmBON39kHbSyPbqjX-v6r2ETWNlMhrjFCb6sobMtI_0ekyUNyeXQVYJdVzRqBmodk16rs1vw1sHSjGNwtKaON3sVPSP5PUiDvdhrq7fQZoyht9H_31PoyKFHBcbD46unb5kCts2LTEnqOdGsTefg2m86KWI987cyUIUwlw3gFxPRnbnL1eXdHtddoCIwfcDNv0c9bnER5tPYvmehqpSZR8oDQ0nas4dOi1k3GmV4yzL42QQ9AipCO9A4zW0CtExsfSGQ%3D)**

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you. | That's our average donation this month, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Governor Sununu Speaks with Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | |
---
# Governor Sununu Shares His Story...
---
Dr. Mansharamani's most recent conversation was just posted earlier today and will be aired on The Pulse of New Hampshire this weekend. His guest was Christopher Sununu, the 82nd Governor of New Hampshire. You can listen to the show on the Pulse of New Hampshire app or wherever you get your podcasts (links to several sites are at the end of this email).
---
---
EPISODE 6: GOVERNOR CHRIS SUNUNU
In the most recent episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Chris Sununu, Governor of the State of New Hampshire. Governor Sununu shares what it was like growing up as the seventh of eight children as well as a bit about his time at MIT. They discuss how the Governor navigated his early career decisions, the three ingredients he believes are responsible for New Hampshire's successes, and why he now prefers french toast to pancakes.
---
EPISODE 5: COMMISSIONER FRANK EDELBLUT
In the fifth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Education for the State of New Hampshire. An accountant turned successful businessman, Commissioner Edelblut shared how he has navigated uncertainty in his personal life as well as his thinking around several important education topics. Topics addressed include charter schools, education financing, parental rights, and the increasing importance of lifelong learning.
---

EPISODE 4: COMMISSIONER TAYLOR CASWELL
In the fourth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Commissioner Taylor Caswell, head of the Department of Business and Economic Affairs for the State of New Hampshire. A native of Littleton, Commissioner Caswell shared his philosophy around navigating a career in the public and private sectors, his hopes for a restoration of civil civic engagement, and his love of the outdoors (and cookies)!
---

EPISODE 3: VIVEK RAMASWAMY
In episode three, Dr. Mansahramani speaks with entrepreneur, one-time stand up comic, and prolific author Vivek Ramaswamy about the American dream and what it was like growing up in Ohio. In addition to exploring the power of annoyance, they discuss the key decisions that took Vivek from the Ivy League to a very successful biotech company (with a stint as a comedian along the way)...and his recent announcement to enter the US Presidential contest as part of his quest to help restore an American identity.
---
EPISODE 2: GENERAL LORI ROBINSON
In the second episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with General Lori Robinson, USAF (Ret), a New Hampshire native who served as the Commander of North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD). General Robinson was also America's first female Combatant Commander and served as head of Northern Command. She is an awesome leader, dedicated America who has served the United States for decades, and all around amazing person. She has also faced (and successfully navigated) many forms of uncertainty on her path to becoming a four-star general.
---
EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS
In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010yahpc5V-OawwKQKI_ERcufhqyTQAOqZDZRqgzp95GqsSGJIMQQTKmLEEF1G12jf7EncN8kMERbyNBmtbzQN9jMkWbhtIqKein_6j_UALdeo2zgPftXKB77TrYQef8XI8jXC8aprx5i7cUcomvS3_g==&c=bWV5wKDUo-iRhvY49BO3splUd8gueO_NJVSq5HM02mg5Xudt-W-F0w==&ch=BHP7oOiS78X5Cz-sAhfQ4Umof8CjTdHkO70T50Xc5k79FXaG2xiZXg==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!
To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at [www.mansharamani.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010yahpc5V-OawwKQKI_ERcufhqyTQAOqZDZRqgzp95GqsSGJIMQQTKmLEEF1G12jf7EncN8kMERbyNBmtbzQN9jMkWbhtIqKein_6j_UALdeo2zgPftXKB77TrYQef8XI8jXC8aprx5i7cUcomvS3_g==&c=bWV5wKDUo-iRhvY49BO3splUd8gueO_NJVSq5HM02mg5Xudt-W-F0w==&ch=BHP7oOiS78X5Cz-sAhfQ4Umof8CjTdHkO70T50Xc5k79FXaG2xiZXg==).

clean_body: Podcast, radio show, conversations... | | | | Governor Sununu Shares His Story... Dr. Mansharamani's most recent conversation was just posted earlier today and will be aired on The Pulse of New Hampshire this weekend. His guest was Christopher Sununu, the 82nd Governor of New Hampshire. You can listen to the show on the Pulse of New Hampshire app or wherever you get your podcasts (links to several sites are at the end of this email). EPISODE 6: GOVERNOR CHRIS SUNUNU In the most recent episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Chris Sununu, Governor of the State of New Hampshire. Governor Sununu shares what it was like growing up as the seventh of eight children as well as a bit about his time at MIT. They discuss how the Governor navigated his early career decisions, the three ingredients he believes are responsible for New Hampshire's successes, and why he now prefers french toast to pancakes. EPISODE 5: COMMISSIONER FRANK EDELBLUT In the fifth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Education for the State of New Hampshire. An accountant turned successful businessman, Commissioner Edelblut shared how he has navigated uncertainty in his personal life as well as his thinking around several important education topics. Topics addressed include charter schools, education financing, parental rights, and the increasing importance of lifelong learning. EPISODE 4: COMMISSIONER TAYLOR CASWELL In the fourth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Commissioner Taylor Caswell, head of the Department of Business and Economic Affairs for the State of New Hampshire. A native of Littleton, Commissioner Caswell shared his philosophy around navigating a career in the public and private sectors, his hopes for a restoration of civil civic engagement, and his love of the outdoors (and cookies)! EPISODE 3: VIVEK RAMASWAMY In episode three, Dr. Mansahramani speaks with entrepreneur, one-time stand up comic, and prolific author Vivek Ramaswamy about the American dream and what it was like growing up in Ohio. In addition to exploring the power of annoyance, they discuss the key decisions that took Vivek from the Ivy League to a very successful biotech company (with a stint as a comedian along the way)...and his recent announcement to enter the US Presidential contest as part of his quest to help restore an American identity. EPISODE 2: GENERAL LORI ROBINSON In the second episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with General Lori Robinson, USAF (Ret), a New Hampshire native who served as the Commander of North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD). General Robinson was also America's first female Combatant Commander and served as head of Northern Command. She is an awesome leader, dedicated America who has served the United States for decades, and all around amazing person. She has also faced (and successfully navigated) many forms of uncertainty on her path to becoming a four-star general. EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future. | | | | Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist == dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available! To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at ==. LINKS TO THE SHOW | | == | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | Vikram Mansharamani | P.O. Box 1376, Concord, NH 03302 | | Sent by mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com in collaboration with

body:
As a doctor and congresswoman, Kim will always fight to ensure every person has access to the reproductive care they need. Are you with her? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62056957/402168189/994456261?ms=em23_230419_repro_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230419_repro_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230419_repro_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230419_repro_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=5jwkgPOfQq7Hm5aDpPHNRzsPAYHlK1fQPXjKXUMmKbpVSV5jKP67iTVg8BoiodC8jhRsSfMBzcmuYxhHemD69YGYdr/+9cJ3WHhQQbPbOEE8bNzDna6P7/Ytv02ZQimRN67u0VTSW2Cb0SGo2UxNTtfFRui/230OKB6ObqojiRM=&refcode2=d4b4f164-94df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI0ZjE2NC05NGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmTtxrQF3rHDRKtUKZ5w3NEY6nfFrSt2PA_r2PWSp3c=&emci=f640e0f0-c2de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d4b4f164-94df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338) **"House Dems introduce bill responding to Texas abortion pill ruling"** Peter,

Earlier this month, a Trump-appointed judge in Texas reversed an FDA approval for a safe and commonly-used abortion drug, mifepristone. Make no mistake: this decision was a purely political one, and has no scientific or medical basis.

While this pill is still legal and accessible at this time, it's clear that far-right judges and legislators will stop at nothing to ban this pill nationwide.

Kim knows we need to act now to protect access to reproductive care. That's why she is proud to support the **Protecting Reproductive Freedom Act**. This legislation would clarify that the FDA has final say on medication abortion and ensure health care providers can prescribe abortion pills via telemedicine.

As a doctor and congresswoman, Kim will always fight to ensure every person has access to the reproductive care they need. Are you with her?

name: Replace Sinema
subject: 🚨NEW POLL: Sinema gains ground
body:
New poll shows Sinema gaining ground with Independents and Republicans | | | Peter – **NEW polling** by Morning Consult shows Krysten Sinema is gaining ground among Independents and Republicans in Arizona – two groups she needs since she left the Democratic Party. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7ZOAOcej8gq-4-xLF2WSuXYxaJshs1Bqn9GQQC6KefIRlxQSR_lSg0LhZKEA4jFhcOuXE6zuHmZGoDsNZGMGcKYqAeu6pUjKUd62cumfgDr4blc91NFoZPkmiLuCqqu2S8jzAkJDxXOMrn76j4hJBExrkl0NowFcSdJBDwfxGpbL6c6Y1e7SrkFDzdWl5fJD44OfibjOSPpA5dPt2RQJvBu2lk8zuglY4LEVLZ3_R898qoVIjzVHxtMFx927fslycglESKsTgGpB5hS25uMfsQl84uL1be7Xomw3LtNId4Q/3vi/bg9yiAWuSoy2d7DsoKrwiw/h0/G3eFEfy8kUkBPP8wAREGkIeTBqIY2QFBEx94IpTGMI8)
**Sinema left the Democratic Party because she alienated Democrats and knew she would lose the primary.** Now she's **cozying up to Republicans and trying to appeal to Independents** to find votes wherever she can. Most despicably, her allies have even floated a potential deal with Mitch McConnell in the press. The polls consistently put Sinema in third. But we still need to do everything we can to close off any path for her to win – or for her to help the Republicans win. **We can’t let Sinema or a Republican like Kari Lake win this seat. subject: [LIVE IN A FEW] Bringing Common Sense to the Senate
body:
Peter, I'll be LIVE IN A FEW MINUTES at 4:30PM EDT for my Common Ground Podcast, and my guests for the day are Pat Johnson, M
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link009.com/v2/click/0494f09ecd27774bef46a1e99440717d/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRE8mbSIhoHqLOsblDLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jjUAomaSUQwh3eriuBxZoLIUSKCluJLHy9XX9teM5FlRC3hLddArC8Wt4AebzxvcsoEGhIQ77KM7SIjnlaZEZUDFtKv7SBIG_aLa7KM1hmn56sRa07Y26hZB0h_MeLswmOurK8Fci1Ya2XTZ13ciL6ZB8VVbd2a5Ej0bAlELJP9szHN6a6QmKwWKI)

| Peter, **I'll be LIVE IN A FEW MINUTES at 4:30PM EDT for my Common Ground Podcast, and my guests for the day are Pat Johnson, Mike Pappas and Fred Rubino.** Today's show is about how common sense is on its way to the New Jersey Senate. Common sense beliefs include limited government, personal responsibility, and free enterprise. They involve cutting taxes, reducing regulations, and investing in infrastructure to promote a strong economy that creates jobs and opportunities. They mean supporting law enforcement, as well as valuing the sanctity of life, family, and hard work.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO OPEN THE COMMON GROUND STREAM NOW (I'LL BE LIVE AT 4:30PM EDT)](https://xtz223.keap-link009.com/v2/click/e13dc071eca1b3df02bc57f50f2f6b23/eJyNj8EKglAQRf9l1pJoieROREQ0F1HrMB3qkT4fz1Ey8d8bK1wVtJ0591zuCIQylxSX4MGdHra9BgM0FkIJlBQ0kvLi9bWdjbW2DKiEvEW66RR449fwAsznrcMRGhQycdj7QRJn0SmNs4RBlWuu-Evjus6iCXd-nMI0_fRiLSjsWd2CR7rDeU8peBMddcX8lUi1nmkWTV038sIdslwVVXc2K9EjC3KlUJaf7QkOb830BIktYoY=)
---
|
---
| **Patricia (Pat) Johnson,** successful small businesswoman and entrepreneur, is a conservative New Jersey Senate Candidate in District 14. Known as a candidate for the people, Pat believes in our Constitutional rights and will fight to protect them. She's tired of the empty promises, is a strong advocate for small businesses, and is committed to bringing a hard working honest, citizenry government back to politics in New Jersey.
**Mike Pappas,** a former Member of Congress, is seeking a seat in the New Jersey State legislature in the 16th District to address the struggles the people of New Jersey face each day. Pappas' campaign is based on fighting inflation, challenging unfunded state mandates that result in increased property taxes, increasing school security, and fighting state directives that “shift educational instruction in favor of philosophical indoctrination of value systems that parents may not support” in New Jersey public schools. **Fred Rubino** is a stand up comic from Brooklyn New York who has been called the voice of American Italians and the voice of reason. This Saturday, April 22nd, Fred will be headlining The Common Sense Comedy Show at The Comedy Cove in Springfield, New Jersey (which I'll be hosting). **[Click here now](https://xtz223.keap-link009.com/v2/click/e761590d6cad63ec9d82014a24ddea03/eJyNkM1qwzAQhN9FZxPbSiT_QCkhhGCc5lDas5HlFRFOZCFv4rrB7165KTm10OvuzLc7cyMIRhgsGpKTD_ykdEkC4kBqq8HgpjMo5PeWslW8jANy0qbdue5iSX771fwQzONslQUERwte8fa63pTFYVfti0PphVY4f-JfmCRhD8z2ZV3syTT9yYWzxu3Vo3uSo7vAnKfRPhO-u5PXHxFtn4fhMAyL2nWDscKCQy1bwH4hu3MIsztkCY04Z8_aqErei6haGJ8axdNI8pTFinJVx5lsfDM0ixRXWZ2m_gVhLZjmp70Sxvsj0xeDXHc3) or call (973) 376-3840 to secure your tickets and join us for an evening of laughs that will be unforgettable!** Building a better America starts with giving common sense a voice in the Senate. Let's embrace our values, stand up for what we believe in, and work to make our nation the best it can be (while enjoying a few good comedy shows along the way).
Make sure you [**join us now (we'll be live right at 4:30PM EDT),**](https://xtz223.keap-link009.com/v2/click/7f72df57a8328b57a623ac165c980014/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0viF5I7ERHRXEStw8ZHDek4jE_JxP_eWOGqoO17557LnYBQlILSCgK408O2HTBAIeOSo6CoFVSy19f2XMuxDKi5uCWq7SUE09fwCiznresbQKNETRz2YZSlRXLK0yLToCyVrvhL4_veqol3YZrDPP_0YsMpHrS6g4BUj8ueiutNdFS15q9EsgtMk7VN04qL7hDVhtX92az5gFpQSomi-mzPcHxr5ieNHmKL) Bill

---
I recently spoke at an RNC donor retreat.
---
My message was simple: **_“The old Republican Party is gone, and it’s never coming back.”_**
---
In its place is a NEW America First movement that defends America’s interests, secures our borders, protects our jobs, looks after our hardworking citizens, and vehemently opposes illegal immigration, pointless wars, and rigged globalist trade deals that rob our country.
---
**Patriots like YOU are the new leaders of our Party.**
---
Don’t forget that it was __OUR__ America First message that won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin – states that Republicans hadn’t won since the _1980s_.
---
The Republican nominees in 2008 and 2012 couldn’t win Florida, Ohio, or even Iowa.
---
_We forever revolutionized the electoral map for Republicans. We paved a path to victory._
---
_America First is our Party’s only hope at survival._
---
And in 2024, the survival of our entire country is being put to the test. Either we win – or we lose America for good.
---

clean_body: | | | | The GOP has set its sights on Oregon. National Republicans released their top targets, and two of our own made the list: Val Hoyle and Andrea Salinas. The Republican establishment is pledging to come after them with everything they've got. We've seen the damage Republicans can do with their majority in Congress, which is why it's all-hands-on-deck to expand our majority with progressive leaders who will fight to protect our constitutional rights, not undermine them. Now more than ever, we must ensure Val and Andrea have our movement behind them to remain in Congress. = Val and Andrea are proven champions for women's reproductive freedom, ensuring the wealthy and big corporations pay their fair share, and have worked to create good-paying clean energy jobs across our state. They are the progressive leaders Oregon families deserve. The GOP and dark money donors are desperate to expand its narrow majority in the House, and they believe that path runs straight through Oregon. Let's show them they couldn't be more wrong. It's going to take all of us to build the resources and people power Val and Andrea need to fend off attacks by the national Republican establishment. = Together, we can keep right-wing extremism out of Oregon. name: Chris Deluzio
subject: The MAGA agenda is hurting working families and degrading American values.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
I need your help to fight back.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62057684/402170679/-908155246?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWVmMTcxYi05NWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rd5NR3YWv2PnYRBGzddQE4Cs5AWhMxbHgmRmXi3ba7Q=) Hi Derek,

I wanted to reach out because we’re quickly approaching the end of April, but we’re still behind on our monthly fundraising. I already have a Republican opponent, and **[falling short could mean losing the momentum we need for 2024, so is there any amount you can chip in to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62057685/402170680/-908155246?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWVmMTcxYi05NWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rd5NR3YWv2PnYRBGzddQE4Cs5AWhMxbHgmRmXi3ba7Q=)**

Derek, it’s been over 100 days since Kevin McCarthy became Speaker, and in that time he and his fellow Republicans have pushed forward with a radical agenda. From helping the 1% and mega corporations evade taxes, to calling for massive cuts to veterans’ care, Medicare, and Social Security, **it’s clear that the MAGA party is doing everything it can to hurt working families and degrade American values.**

**_Beyond that, they’re working hard to strip away the reproductive and healthcare freedom of women and girls across the country._**

It’s so important that in 2024 we defeat dangerous extremists across the country and take back control of the House, and Derek, that work begins right here in western PA. **Right now, nonpartisan election experts are predicting PA-17 will be one of the most competitive races in the country, so we can’t afford to waste any time.**

**[This is a grassroots-funded campaign, so I’m counting on your support. Can you chip in $15 or whatever you can today to help us get our monthly fundraising back on track before it’s too late?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62057687/402170682/-908155246?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWVmMTcxYi05NWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rd5NR3YWv2PnYRBGzddQE4Cs5AWhMxbHgmRmXi3ba7Q=)**

Thank you so much for your support,

Chris Deluzio | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. [Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62057689/402170685/-908155246?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_cd_all&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWVmMTcxYi05NWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rd5NR3YWv2PnYRBGzddQE4Cs5AWhMxbHgmRmXi3ba7Q=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: Important: Debt limit fight update
body:
We’re seeing our steadfast work pay off | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10352527?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

Months ago in the fight for the Speakership, Citizens for Renewing America worked with conservatives in Congress to secure historic concessions from Speaker McCarthy, paving the way for America First legislative priorities.

Now, as the debt limit fight intensifies, **we’re seeing our steadfast work pay off**.

This week, House Republicans proposed debt limit legislation that would rein in both the unsustainable levels of federal spending and the woke and weaponized bureaucracy waging war on the American people.

The McCarthy proposed legislation is very positive.
* More than $4.5 trillion in cuts in the next 10 years
* Defunding woke and weaponized bureaucracy
* The repeal of Biden’s army of 87,000 IRS agents

---
|
---
| **My full[statement](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=d2f065bdef&e=17913c7d6d) on House GOP’s Debt Limit Legislation **
---
|
---
| **CRA President Russ Vought Discusses Debt Limit Fight on War Room**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=1fbc99b47f&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---
| As I said on _[War Room](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=b712c11a3c&e=17913c7d6d)_ , House conservatives have real power and are leveraging it in conjunction with Speaker McCarthy.

_“Conservatives are no longer backbenchers and are participating in what the demands will be, and they’re putting that forward to be able to get the votes and start this process.”_

The debt limit fight is in the third of nine innings, but so far House Republicans are seizing the initiative.

_“This is how, if we’re trying to win, to be able to use this leverage point in the summer, to crush woke and weaponized bureaucracy, this is part of how you would structure that fight.” _

_Translation_ : **As the debt limit fight heats up, this is a positive footing by House Republicans.**
---
|
---
| **Crushing the Washington Cartel**
---
| You know conservatives are making gains when “mainstream” press reporters like Jake Sherman shed all pretense of objectivity and openly attack the House GOP for embracing America First legislative priorities.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5de33eb0a1&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Friends, at the risk of sounding like a broken record, I’ll say it again: when conservatives refuse to cave and fight on principle we can move mountains.

The D.C. cartel is cracking. Their days are numbered. [Your support is making this possible](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5b77390c89&e=17913c7d6d).
---
|
Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Citizens for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=594dd0d20e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=2615bc1a07&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=50beee73a4&e=17913c7d6d)

300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Insanity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
If you want to see the outcome of Ron DeSantis’ Stop W.O.K.E. Act, look no further than changes made to a First Grade Social Studies text about Rosa Parks.

Friends -
If you want to see the outcome of Ron DeSantis’ Stop W.O.K.E. Act, look no further than changes made to a First Grade Social Studies text about Rosa Parks.
**Old Version:** “The law said African Americans had to give up their seats on the bus if a white person wanted to sit down.”

**Changed to:** “She was told to move to a different seat because of the color of her skin.”

**Further edited to:** “She was told to move to a different seat. She did not. She did what she believed was right.”
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-fl-dems/?refcode=em230420-1-full&refcode2=1309_4767699_Tn0X0a&akid=1309%2E4767699%2ETn0X0a)
That’s right. She was just told to move to a different seat. That’s it. It’s insane.
When asked, the publisher said they made the change in response to their "interpretation" of Ron DeSantis’ bill.
Just two weeks ago, I was in Alabama at the Dexter Avenue King Memorial Baptist Church, the place where the Montgomery Bus Boycott was organized in 1955 — the day after Rosa Parks was arrested for refusing to follow a law requiring Black riders to give up their seat to whites.
It is at the same time a chilling reminder of how far we’ve come and a reminder of how people like Ron DeSantis are so eager to take us back.
If this is as enraging for you as it is for me, here’s something you can do about it today:
[**Please contribute $3, or whatever you can afford, directly to the Florida Democratic Party where they are working every day to replace far-right Republican legislators who support the Stop W.O.K.E. Act with Democrats who will fight against the DeSantis agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-fl-dems/?refcode=em230420-1-full&refcode2=1309_4767699_Tn0X0a&akid=1309%2E4767699%2ETn0X0a)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[CONTRIBUTE $3 TO FLORIDA DEMOCRATS](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-fl-dems/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em230420-1-full&refcode2=1309_4767699_Tn0X0a&akid=1309%2E4767699%2ETn0X0a)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER TO FLORIDA DEMOCRATS](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-fl-dems/?express_lane=true&refcode=em230420-1-full&refcode2=1309_4767699_Tn0X0a&akid=1309%2E4767699%2ETn0X0a)
Thank you,
Gavin Newsom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1309%2E4767699%2ETn0X0a).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62058680/402174291/-1306387819?refcode=X_042023_Murphy_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmVjYTQ3Yy05NmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXdB2kYm0LgTpFDCJU2fOjjVnoqYIyfaajJZ_VEOoGk=) Friends — My re-election campaign is up and running, so my friend Michael Bennet suggested I reach out — I need your help to make sure this seat is not in play for Republicans in 2024. Our Senate majority is incredibly slim, and the truth is the map is even tougher for us than it was last year. The experts at Cook Political say Democrats are “almost entirely on defense” because there really aren’t any seats we can flip blue. That means holding every single seat is going to be that much more important. So I’m not willing to take anything for granted. There’s a real danger if any of our opponents think we’re asleep at the wheel and vulnerable to attacks. **Last time I was up for re-election, Republicans pumped millions of dollars into Connecticut to try to make gains in our state. We saw the same thing last cycle when Republicans dumped huge amounts of money trying to pick up Senate seats in states like Colorado.** And frankly, the reason we didn’t hold the House last year is because Republicans made significant inroads in New York. That’s why it’s so important that we demonstrate we are ready for anything that comes our way — whether from Mitch McConnell’s super PACs, the gun lobby or another self-funding billionaire that wants to try to buy this seat. So I am asking you to please have my back today: [**Will you split a $20 contribution between my re-election and Michael Bennet's campaign to hold this seat and defend Democrats’ Senate majority in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62058681/402174292/-958813753?refcode=X_042023_Murphy_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmVjYTQ3Yy05NmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXdB2kYm0LgTpFDCJU2fOjjVnoqYIyfaajJZ_VEOoGk=)[**We need to start the second quarter as strong as we possibly can, so every single donation helps us demonstrate the depth of support for our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62058682/402174293/-958813753?refcode=X_042023_Murphy_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmVjYTQ3Yy05NmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXdB2kYm0LgTpFDCJU2fOjjVnoqYIyfaajJZ_VEOoGk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Chris Murphy & Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62058684/402174295/-958813753?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_042023_Murphy_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmVjYTQ3Yy05NmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXdB2kYm0LgTpFDCJU2fOjjVnoqYIyfaajJZ_VEOoGk=)******

clean_body: | = Friends — My re-election campaign is up and running, so my friend Michael Bennet suggested I reach out — I need your help to make sure this seat is not in play for Republicans in 2024. Our Senate majority is incredibly slim, and the truth is the map is even tougher for us than it was last year. The experts at Cook Political say Democrats are “almost entirely on defense” because there really aren’t any seats we can flip blue. That means holding every single seat is going to be that much more important. So I’m not willing to take anything for granted. There’s a real danger if any of our opponents think we’re asleep at the wheel and vulnerable to attacks. Last time I was up for re-election, Republicans pumped millions of dollars into Connecticut to try to make gains in our state. We saw the same thing last cycle when Republicans dumped huge amounts of money trying to pick up Senate seats in states like Colorado. And frankly, the reason we didn’t hold the House last year is because Republicans made significant inroads in New York. That’s why it’s so important that we demonstrate we are ready for anything that comes our way — whether from Mitch McConnell’s super PACs, the gun lobby or another self-funding billionaire that wants to try to buy this seat. So I am asking you to please have my back today: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Chris Murphy & Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** I’m grateful to have you on this team. Please know that your support not only means the world to me but is truly important to our success. Thank you. Every best wish, Chris Murphy Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
TN state law requires a special election to be held for these vacancies, so Reps. Jones and Pearson will have to face ANOTHER election. | | |
---
| | **FIRST:** GOP lawmakers expelled two Democrats from the Tennessee House for participating in protests calling for gun safety legislation after a devastating mass shooting in Nashville. **THEN:** The Nashville Metro Council and the Shelby County Board of Commissioners voted to reappoint Reps. Jones and Pearson to the TN House. **BUT NOW: Tennessee state law requires a special election to be held for these vacancies, so Reps. clean_body: TN state law requires a special election to be held for these vacancies, so Reps. Jones and Pearson will have to face ANOTHER election. | | | | | FIRST: GOP lawmakers expelled two Democrats from the Tennessee House for participating in protests calling for gun safety legislation after a devastating mass shooting in Nashville. THEN: The Nashville Metro Council and the Shelby County Board of Commissioners voted to reappoint Reps. Jones and Pearson to the TN House. BUT NOW: Tennessee state law requires a special election to be held for these vacancies, so Reps. Jones and Pearson will have to face ANOTHER election after their GOP-led, anti-democratic expulsion. And these special elections won’t be easy – the Tennessee GOP hasn’t backed down at all from their anti-democratic attacks. So it’s critical that we mobilize now to give state Democrats the resources they need to defeat their Republican opponents in special elections like these and across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Special elections represent critical opportunities to stand up to the GOP’s extremism – every Democratic win proves the strength of this people-powered movement to elect state Democrats. **But Republicans are still targeting Sharice and Kansas as a state to expand their slim House majority and continue their all-out assault on our rights._In fact, Sharice is already on the Republicans’ top target list for 2024, which means new GOP attacks could start at any time._**

body:
https://www.georgewhitesides.com/ [https://www.georgewhitesides.com/]
Hey Peter —
We're thrilled to announce the first round of California congressional endorsements for George's campaign!
We are building a campaign to support working families and turn CA-27 blue. Can you rush $10 and help us elect Geoge Whitesides in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?refcode=X_042023_Endorsements_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?refcode=X_042023_Endorsements_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?refcode=X_042023_Endorsements_act]
Like us, these California leaders know that George is the type of candidate who will actually get things done for the people of CA-27 — whether that's combating climate change and wildfires in Southern California, building more affordable housing units, or passing common-sense gun legislation nationwide.
However, George's opponent, Rep. Mike Garcia, has shown that he would rather pander to partisan politics than support his constituents.
That's why we need a proven leader like George in Washington.
Will you join us in supporting George by donating anything you can to his campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?refcode=X_042023_Endorsements_act]
Thank you for your continued support,
— Team Whitesides
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90153/images/George%20Bio.png] It’s time we have bold, new leadership in this district. As a former NASA Chief of Staff and community leader of wildfire mitigation efforts, George Whitesides is ready to deliver.
