name: =?utf-8?B?SmFoYW5h4oCZcyBpUGhvbmU=?=
subject: The fate of abortion access…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
Friends,
Yesterday, we expected a decision from the conservative-dominated Supreme Court about the fate of Mifepristone, an abortion pill that is used in more than half of U.S. abortions that was first approved by the FDA over twenty years ago. However, they pushed back their decision and have allowed the drug to remain available until Friday.
This abortion pill is safe, and removing it from the market would drastically limit families' ability to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions. Right now, this medication is still available, but if the Supreme Court agrees with lower courts, mifepristone will remain available but with certain conditions. For example, it will no longer be available by mail.
This would also set a dangerous precedent for the court to override the FDA’s approval. Typically, courts look to the FDA when it comes to scientific or medical considerations, and legal experts fear this ruling could open the door for challenges of other approved medicines in the U.S.
I am proud to stand with the vast majority of Americans – yes, even a majority of Republicans – who agree that decisions about reproductive healthcare should be made by families, not the courts and not the government.
_Help me keep up the fight for reproductive rights by chipping in whatever you can to my re-election campaign. Our race will be one of the top in the country in 2024, and we can’t afford to lose our voice in Washington!_
Here’s a link you can use: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCT-05-Email-April2023-FR-April-ReproRights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62059453/402177740/-1930090685?refcode=E20989-20230420-AbortionPills-SL-AbortionReproductiveRights-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGUwYjc5ZS05OGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EmnhKn94qYjRn9cJfR-zYcgRjG8pe3BfSyWbyyA6jcc=)
Thanks so much,
Jahana
_Sent from my iPhone_

Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: DeSantis is drowning Florida with neglect, but Maxwell Frost isn’t giving up on his state!
body:
Even Marco Rubio is tired of Ron DeSantis
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T872767e8-b381-4a7a-a9e4-433e97c765dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **It's been quite an awful week for awful, sloppy autocrat Ron DeSantis. ** **_While Ft. Lauderdale was under water--due to policies worsened by his willful ignorance on climate change--gas lines in numerous areas of the Sunshine State began to form that looked like something out of the oil crisis in the 1970s._**_ Even right-wing soulmate Marco Rubio is complaining and calling for action._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3bc635b0-8510-4109-b6f0-6bfee52bdce8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Meanwhile, permitless-carry shootings are also occurring at a frightening pace and DeSantis is ignoring it all because he's a power-craving ghoul who won't leave his book tour to launch a presidential bid._**_ DeSantis did fly back in the dead of night when he hoped nobody was looking, however, to sign a cruel and dangerous abortion ban._** **__On the latter point, we got the perfect contrast to DeSantis. In response to his evil act signing the abortion ban, Florida Congressman, Maxwell Frost, got up and gave both an inspiring and blistering response.__** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7678445-da67-41d6-90ff-9075d013cb89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Frost's only 26, the youngest Congress member. He's the future; part Latino, part Lebanese, part Black, wholly passionate equality and opportunity for all. Frost is what gives the GOP cold sweats in the dark of night: They know from the midterms & WI Supreme Court race they can't beat him--or those like him--in a fair fight._ [**_We need Frost and many more like him to run for public office. To be the face of opposition to greedy, gross DeSantis-ites. For his incredible speech--and for our future--will you give Rep. Maxwell Frost $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a41e509-336f-4e0f-8361-b13458713186/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for ensuring our future is democratic. And Democratic._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5650f515-7f19-4f20-9a84-30fef873eed5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, It's been quite an awful week for awful, sloppy autocrat Ron DeSantis. While Ft. Even right-wing soulmate Marco Rubio is complaining and calling for action. Meanwhile, permitless-carry shootings are also occurring at a frightening pace and DeSantis is ignoring it all because he's a power-craving ghoul who won't leave his book tour to launch a presidential bid. DeSantis did fly back in the dead of night when he hoped nobody was looking, however, to sign a cruel and dangerous abortion ban. On the latter point, we got the perfect contrast to DeSantis. In response to his evil act signing the abortion ban, Florida Congressman, Maxwell Frost, got up and gave both an inspiring and blistering response. Frost's only 26, the youngest Congress member. He's the future; part Latino, part Lebanese, part Black, wholly passionate equality and opportunity for all. Frost is what gives the GOP cold sweats in the dark of night: They know from the midterms & WI Supreme Court race they can't beat him--or those like him--in a fair fight. Thank you for ensuring our future is democratic. And Democratic. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: [Fight Back] Big Ag is still using bee-toxic chemicals
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | Friend, do you think greedy corporations should be allowed to DESTROY our food system and planet for profit? We don't either. But right now, **the pesticide industry's profit-hungry tactics are putting our precious bees at EXTREME RISK. Skyrocketing bee deaths could soon threaten our food supply, which means some of our most nutritious foods could soon be scarce and expensive. MILLIONS of families could be priced out of essential foods -- unless we fight back now!** **And to make matters worse, pesticide companies and Big Ag are STILL contaminating our environment with chemicals that are TOXIC to bees.** These neurotoxic pesticides -- called neonics -- cause major neurological damage to our tiny pollinators. Even in small doses, neonics severely damage bees' ability to communicate, reproduce, fight pests and disease, and forage for food. **In higher doses, bees just don't stand a chance! **
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1730802?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Neonics are the most widely used insecticides in the world. **But here's the bombshell truth: Studies show little to NO BENEFIT to crop yields for neonic seed coatings on soybeans -- one of their biggest uses! **What's more, neonics can damage soil health, worsen harmful pest problems and contribute to MASSIVE bee die-offs. Ecological methods like organic farming can save precious bees and protect our food security.**But the pesticide industry is doing everything it can to BLOCK bee-saving policies and sway public opinion AGAINST these crucial alternatives.** We need your urgent help to fight back! **Right now, a group of generous donors is matching all gifts up to our $180,000 Earth Day goal, so we can protect precious bees, stop the pesticide corporations from contaminating our ecosystem for profit and protect our planet for generations to come. But this rare match EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT ON SATURDAY, and we're falling behind on our critical goal! ** **We need 10 more gifts from supporters in your area to stay on track for our Earth Day goal. So please: ** [**Will you make a membership gift of $27 or more now -- while $27 becomes $54! -- to help Friends of the Earth protect precious pollinators, hold Big Polluters accountable, and achieve a healthy, sustainable future for our planet?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1730803?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1730804?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1730805?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth **

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We need to talk about 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House –

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9h92rgkkjnigrpbuopjfelmbenokl69rrmg5tg0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h64or6chh2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7lkj0tchck04ja7b85v32668p5292tnpi6hhqng_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h64or6chh2bs)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you're with me. Use my special Speaker's link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi13dh9e7vbb9qccug98ejev4eo4dt2r6hsuqedo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h64or6chh2bs "Confirm you’re with me, %%First_Name__c%%. Use my special Speaker’s link to active your membership at 50% OFF:")**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zeob7ar17rd8ucnmbahnrji5avguq413dev0skeo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h64or6chh2bs)
---

I can't do this without you. My team will update me with the names of those who heed my call to action today. I hope to see your name.

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs52p15adp7vdpnnirddr45sbav0lmn7equsudh8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h64or6chh2bs)
---
Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Together, we can overcome anything.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
If we come together like we did last year, we can build a campaign strong enough to overcome any obstacle in our path.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62059808/402178957/-388004332?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTU3NzkyMC05YWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Noul2E0Tw56llASA9Tgib4muuklUSxwCIMWj7mFJDQ=) Hi there, it’s Andrea here. Right now, my team is working hard to raise **[$3,000 by midnight,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62059809/402178958/-388004332?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTU3NzkyMC05YWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Noul2E0Tw56llASA9Tgib4muuklUSxwCIMWj7mFJDQ=)** and I wanted to take a moment to share with you why reaching this goal is so critical for our campaign. Last year, our grassroots team came together to overcome every challenge we faced. When outside dark money came pouring in, we stood together and proved that Oregon’s Sixth District isn’t for sale. It wasn’t easy, but it was possible because of _each and every one of you._ We’re only 4 months into the year, but we’ve already faced our first challenge: **National Republicans named me as one of their top 2024 targets.** With this much attention on us this early in the race, we know this is just the beginning of what they’ll throw our way. **But if we come together like we did last year, we can build a campaign strong enough to overcome any obstacle in our path.** [**That’s why I’m personally asking: Can you chip in today and give this team the grassroots support we need to reach our goal and keep up our momentum?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62059810/402178959/-388004332?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTU3NzkyMC05YWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Noul2E0Tw56llASA9Tgib4muuklUSxwCIMWj7mFJDQ=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _ | _[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62059811/402178960/-388004332?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_as_all-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTU3NzkyMC05YWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Noul2E0Tw56llASA9Tgib4muuklUSxwCIMWj7mFJDQ=)_ | _[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62059812/402178961/-388004332?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_as_all-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTU3NzkyMC05YWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Noul2E0Tw56llASA9Tgib4muuklUSxwCIMWj7mFJDQ=)_

clean_body: If we come together like we did last year, we can build a campaign strong enough to overcome any obstacle in our path. = Hi there, it’s Andrea here. Right now, my team is working hard to raise = and I wanted to take a moment to share with you why reaching this goal is so critical for our campaign. Last year, our grassroots team came together to overcome every challenge we faced. When outside dark money came pouring in, we stood together and proved that Oregon’s Sixth District isn’t for sale. It wasn’t easy, but it was possible because of each and every one of you. We’re only 4 months into the year, but we’ve already faced our first challenge: National Republicans named me as one of their top 2024 targets. With this much attention on us this early in the race, we know this is just the beginning of what they’ll throw our way. But if we come together like we did last year, we can build a campaign strong enough to overcome any obstacle in our path. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you so much, Andrea Salinas | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. body:
I am reaching out with an URGENT warning about the future of our financial system.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2382fda5d3ab4f168235cf4555e7fb6f&_e=l7b9Q8HaPIr63D_YNRlxwpUG-MkYKuLpTBI4NWOHnFbNOwCUQHU8ki6Y_NUlMu7k_In_6ozEIxndywVlrRmz5V0S-VInjA1SbatAXCa2gWNAD6fg-xofCgled5kRzbBYPHyUbop779wPFL6-Fz-W-9YMflv9-tRgzArREJm_BOdXAPIh8DR6n7D3xorupIIufeJnBU4kWFeaHHk24JGki8osxkImmaVk_oLZGKsOo9O82civh3P_dW0eOCYyoeKkeDQsRKhzBSgMKPsHvJ9BtljjjyL4NvHRxzOl8NvS9Dr9hj6OxmZlLqyDG5LxLArtZZiS5AAW1WB2eVaDv_VtyFLa-kswJLfFNubhgdClPyi9IAtfLEka1bNcf9anF9ZI5x74fPDKc1etq6YQs77AbfEV4KV294Q2aWHO2sgH6_Y%3D)
---
| | Friend, I am reaching out with an **URGENT** warning about the future of our financial system.

The Biden administration has been researching a "digital dollar." If implemented, **it could mean the end of privacy as we know it**.

Unlike other digital currencies, Biden's "digital dollar" is a **central bank** digital currency (CBDC) that will give the government the ability to track **every single transaction you make** right down to the lemonade stand run by the neighborhood kid.

Not only will it give them unprecedented access to your financial life, but in the wrong hands, **it could even be used to punish people for particular political views by freezing their accounts.**
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2382fda5d3ab4f168235cf4555e7fb6f&_e=l7b9Q8HaPIr63D_YNRlxwpUG-MkYKuLpTBI4NWOHnFbNOwCUQHU8ki6Y_NUlMu7k_In_6ozEIxndywVlrRmz5V0S-VInjA1SbatAXCa2gWNAD6fg-xofCgled5kRzbBYPHyUbop779wPFL6-Fz-W-9YMflv9-tRgzArREJm_BOdXAPIh8DR6n7D3xorupIIufeJnBU4kWFeaHHk24JGki8osxkImmaVk_oLZGKsOo9O82civh3P_dW0eOCYyoeKk4lITsNb4ljgeHbgjwBJZ1eesBgQzc_4QFfvJ9ppsFMRGAjLOp033Kp7UiaGVzgjVlxfie5prnnalBrW7z_GUNHCP4vVMQl_WeiZvu-LRC1olhKAvemKPy0gcrO64vtl788LklTb3RoZ_ZzK9Fks45qveudRCSn4x6b5sPr5xNyc%3D)
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: By this time in 2021
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Earlier this week, we were looking over our fundraising numbers to make
plans for the rest of 2023. When we compared the number of individual
contributions we’ve gotten so far this year to the amount we’d gotten by
this time in 2021, we were shocked. Check it out:

2021 2023

35,732 contributions 18,073 contributions

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134002?refcode=em20230420-28567&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28567%2E1203867%2EKjolvu ]Peter, we’re
asking you to chip in $3, or any amount, to help us get our
fundraising back where it needs to be this year. Will you rush a donation
now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134002?refcode=em20230420-28567&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28567%2E1203867%2EKjolvu ]Contribute $3

The support we got in 2021 led to huge wins for Summer Lee and more
Justice Democrats in 2022, and what we raise right now is critical to our
candidate recruitment efforts and success in 2024.

The work we’re planning to do this cycle — searching for, recruiting,
training, and helping to elect progressive candidates — is not going to be
easy, and it’s not going to be cheap either.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134002?refcode=em20230420-28567&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28567%2E1203867%2EKjolvu ]Every single donor is crucial to our movement, and with individual
contributions down, our budget is increasingly in danger. Please, make a
donation now to help us find the next slate of progressive challenger
candidates and grow the Squad in Congress.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28567%2E1203867%2EKjolvu ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28567%2E1203867%2EKjolvu ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230420-28567-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28567_1203867_Kjolvu&akid=28567%2E1203867%2EKjolvu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28567%2E1203867%2EKjolvu

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcei4sniqk6e3rarjvnqi6mmnsimcp4nnjflbnv8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h6cp71c3h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhq77ht9po879mp806eqpopdstic6qingg1e49ao_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h6cp71c3h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk802n1a8qhvbubu2njlkd3mt40icdsdh955um18_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h6cp71c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zna22fhb9g1orssp2q755hr4ku7e05scub4ntm30_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h6cp71c3h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztq5cpg8uc1pqu7l9n0lqob9l0op0lg4d63sib6o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h6cp71c3h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkg84cl61pve3ihmb6v4kt6ncs6eaubib38ve4eg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h6cp71c3h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztbmjt1gsuo45vac3056e56l65efnefo6tn3v2l8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h6cp71c3h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zigj5evi5433jkjt5eva9rv4sv4hfmbhb3ad2lag_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h6cp71c3h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2k6gdetts8j8mtv063f8j0s4jpnu6npi7fnkod0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h6cp71c3h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z21a990ton8qge6pjaubjjal60ejnc6qqpcb1fg0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1h6cp71c3h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

### Candidate Schools
---
| The WSRP is teaming up with several organizations to host candidate trainings to help us set the stage for wins in 2023 and 2024!

Candidates - **[join us](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=995adb5bff&e=6a281f566d)** , the BIAW, and other partner organizations at upcoming candidate trainings on April 29th or May 13th of this year. These schools will cover the following topics:
* Voter Contact and Identification
* Voter databases
* Fundraising Techniques
* Budget Allocation
* Campaign Planning
* Importance of effective messaging
* Role of media in a campaign
* Responding to attacks from opponents

## Olympia Watch
---
|
---
|
### SB 5599
---
| SB 5599 is a deeply concerning bill getting national attention right now, and rightly so. This bill allows shelters to hide runaway or homeless youth without parental permission. This effectively bypasses parental consent, separating loving parents from their children without even notifying the parent.

This bill removes a parent's ability to protect and make important decisions for their children. Moreover, the bill allows host homes to house youth without parental permission if the youth is seeking or receiving protected health care services, including gender reassignment services, further undermining parental authority. This bill diminishes the essential role that parents play in their children's lives and upbringing.
---
|
### SB 5770
---
| Introduced late in the session, SB 5770 aims to overturn a voter-approved law by increasing property taxes. Titled "Providing state and local property tax reform," this bill proposes changing the property tax growth factor for the state and local governments from 1% to 3% and adjusting the definition of inflation to grow faster by using the CPI instead of the IPD measure.

This proposed tax increase undermines the will of the voters and takes advantage of a loophole in the state constitution to avoid the 2/3 vote requirement for late-session bills. The session is scheduled to end on April 23, and taxpayers should remain vigilant as the debate unfolds.
---
|
### HB 1240
---
| HB 1240 is a misguided attempt to increase public safety by prohibiting the manufacture, importation, distribution, selling, and offering for sale of so-called "assault weapons." This legislation not only fails to address the root causes of gun violence but also infringes on the constitutional rights of law-abiding citizens. We must oppose this ineffective and unconstitutional rifle ban for the following reasons:
1. Ineffectiveness in Reducing Gun Violence: The majority of gun-related crimes are committed with illegally obtained firearms, and handguns are the weapon of choice in 98% of gun deaths. This rifle ban does not address these facts and, as a result, will not significantly impact gun violence rates. Additionally, previous bans on assault weapons, such as the federal ban that expired in 2004, have had no measurable impact on gun violence.
2. Unconstitutional Infringement on Second Amendment Rights: HB 1240's rifle ban targets some of the most commonly owned firearms used for self-defense, violating citizens' constitutional rights. This legislation is likely to be found unconstitutional under the Supreme Court's new history, text, and tradition test, resulting in costly legal battles for the state and taxpayers.
3. Discrimination Against Women and People with Disabilities: Modern sporting rifles, such as the AR-15, are the preferred choice for self-defense among women and some people with disabilities due to their adjustable stocks, low recoil, and availability of self-defense ammunition. By banning these firearms, HB 1240 unfairly discriminates against these vulnerable groups.

Instead of focusing on ineffective and unconstitutional bans, we should address the real problems contributing to gun violence. This includes implementing tougher sentencing guidelines, holding criminals accountable, and providing increased support to law enforcement agencies to prevent dangers before they occur. Reject HB 1240 and pursue meaningful solutions to reduce gun violence while respecting the rights of law-abiding citizens.
---
|
### Blake Fix
---
| Engrossed Second Substitute Senate Bill 5536 (ESSSB 5536) aims to address drug possession and substance use disorders in response to the February 2021 ruling in State v. Blake. However, this bill does not go far enough in its approach to criminalization, treatment, and overall effectiveness in supporting those struggling with addiction.

Rep. Gina Mosbrucker, R-Goldendale, offered an amendment that would have increased consequences to a gross misdemeanor classification, which would provide more time for addicts to detox and allow for plea bargaining to cater to the individual's needs. However, this amendment failed under the Democrat majority.

Adding to the opposition, local mayors, including several Snohomish County mayors and Spokane Mayor, are expressing concern over the House-amended bill. The combined dissent from both Republican lawmakers and local mayors underscores the need for a more comprehensive approach to effectively tackle drug possession and addiction issues in the state.
---
|
### SB 5082
---
| SB 5082 is the Democrat majority's way of forgetting about the voters, and removing their opinion from being heard on the ballot. This bill is currently sitting on the Governor's desk and could be signed at any time. It will remove advisory votes, which were added to law via Citizen Initiative in 2001. Advisory votes are important for public engagement and accountability, as they allow the voice of the public to be heard on tax increase legislation. Removing these votes weakens the voting process and undermines the will of the people.
---
|
### Capital Gains Tax Ruling
---
| The recent Washington State Supreme Court ruling on the capital gains tax has shown its true partisan nature by redefining a capital gains tax as an excise tax, ignoring all precedent, and blatantly disregarding the tax structures in all 49 other states and countries around the world. This clearly partisan ruling has opened the floodgates for Democrats to target specific industries and incomes with new taxes, without explicitly calling them income taxes.

In the wake of this ruling, Democrats have swiftly moved to propose SB 5767, the so-called "excess compensation tax." This bill aims to impose a 7.5% "excise tax" on hospital administrator jobs that Democrats arbitrarily deem overpaid. By pursuing such a tax, they are exploiting this ruling and setting a dangerous precedent for future taxes on other industries and incomes. This blatant abuse of our system of government and dramatic overreach by Democrats raises the question: **who will they target next? **
---

These schools will cover the following topics: Voter Contact and Identification Voter databases Fundraising Techniques Budget Allocation Campaign Planning Importance of effective messaging Role of media in a campaign Responding to attacks from opponents Time management and discipline Creating a campaign calendar to achieve set goals | Can't attend a BIAW Candidate School? Let us know about your intent to run as a candidate in the 2023/2024 election cycle by filling out and we will let you know about future candidate schools as they are scheduled! | "Register for upcoming Candidate School" | "Let us know you are interested in running!" | | Grassroots Leadership Trainings | Get involved - join our Political Director at one of his upcoming volunteer trainings, through the clicking the image below, or contact Matthew Frohlich at mailto:matthew@wsrp.org for more information! Upcoming dates and locations include: April 20th at 6PM in Kent April 22nd at 10AM in Tumwater April 22nd at 3:30PM in Okanogan April 29th at 3PM in Okanogan May 2nd at 6:30PM in Bellevue May 9th at 6PM in West Seattle May 10th at 6:30PM in Marysville May 13th at 10AM in Ocean Shores With more dates and locations being scheduled! | | "Join the Team - Sign up for a Grassroots Leadership Training Today!" | | Olympia Watch | | SB 5599 | SB 5599 is a deeply concerning bill getting national attention right now, and rightly so. This bill allows shelters to hide runaway or homeless youth without parental permission. This effectively bypasses parental consent, separating loving parents from their children without even notifying the parent. This bill removes a parent's ability to protect and make important decisions for their children. Moreover, the bill allows host homes to house youth without parental permission if the youth is seeking or receiving protected health care services, including gender reassignment services, further undermining parental authority. This bill diminishes the essential role that parents play in their children's lives and upbringing. | SB 5770 | Introduced late in the session, SB 5770 aims to overturn a voter-approved law by increasing property taxes. Titled "Providing state and local property tax reform," this bill proposes changing the property tax growth factor for the state and local governments from 1% to 3% and adjusting the definition of inflation to grow faster by using the CPI instead of the IPD measure. This proposed tax increase undermines the will of the voters and takes advantage of a loophole in the state constitution to avoid the 2/3 vote requirement for late-session bills. The session is scheduled to end on April 23, and taxpayers should remain vigilant as the debate unfolds. | HB 1240 | HB 1240 is a misguided attempt to increase public safety by prohibiting the manufacture, importation, distribution, selling, and offering for sale of so-called "assault weapons." This legislation not only fails to address the root causes of gun violence but also infringes on the constitutional rights of law-abiding citizens. We must oppose this ineffective and unconstitutional rifle ban for the following reasons: 1. Ineffectiveness in Reducing Gun Violence: The majority of gun-related crimes are committed with illegally obtained firearms, and handguns are the weapon of choice in 98% of gun deaths. This rifle ban does not address these facts and, as a result, will not significantly impact gun violence rates. Additionally, previous bans on assault weapons, such as the federal ban that expired in 2004, have had no measurable impact on gun violence. 2. Unconstitutional Infringement on Second Amendment Rights: HB 1240's rifle ban targets some of the most commonly owned firearms used for self-defense, violating citizens' constitutional rights. This legislation is likely to be found unconstitutional under the Supreme Court's new history, text, and tradition test, resulting in costly legal battles for the state and taxpayers. 3. Discrimination Against Women and People with Disabilities: Modern sporting rifles, such as the AR-15, are the preferred choice for self-defense among women and some people with disabilities due to their adjustable stocks, low recoil, and availability of self-defense ammunition. By banning these firearms, HB 1240 unfairly discriminates against these vulnerable groups. Instead of focusing on ineffective and unconstitutional bans, we should address the real problems contributing to gun violence. This includes implementing tougher sentencing guidelines, holding criminals accountable, and providing increased support to law enforcement agencies to prevent dangers before they occur. Reject HB 1240 and pursue meaningful solutions to reduce gun violence while respecting the rights of law-abiding citizens. | Blake Fix | Engrossed Second Substitute Senate Bill 5536 (ESSSB 5536) aims to address drug possession and substance use disorders in response to the February 2021 ruling in State v. Blake. However, this bill does not go far enough in its approach to criminalization, treatment, and overall effectiveness in supporting those struggling with addiction. Rep. Gina Mosbrucker, R-Goldendale, offered an amendment that would have increased consequences to a gross misdemeanor classification, which would provide more time for addicts to detox and allow for plea bargaining to cater to the individual's needs. However, this amendment failed under the Democrat majority. Adding to the opposition, local mayors, including several Snohomish County mayors and Spokane Mayor, are expressing concern over the House-amended bill. The combined dissent from both Republican lawmakers and local mayors underscores the need for a more comprehensive approach to effectively tackle drug possession and addiction issues in the state. | SB 5082 | SB 5082 is the Democrat majority's way of forgetting about the voters, and removing their opinion from being heard on the ballot. This bill is currently sitting on the Governor's desk and could be signed at any time. It will remove advisory votes, which were added to law via Citizen Initiative in 2001. Advisory votes are important for public engagement and accountability, as they allow the voice of the public to be heard on tax increase legislation. Removing these votes weakens the voting process and undermines the will of the people. | Capital Gains Tax Ruling | The recent Washington State Supreme Court ruling on the capital gains tax has shown its true partisan nature by redefining a capital gains tax as an excise tax, ignoring all precedent, and blatantly disregarding the tax structures in all 49 other states and countries around the world. This clearly partisan ruling has opened the floodgates for Democrats to target specific industries and incomes with new taxes, without explicitly calling them income taxes. In the wake of this ruling, Democrats have swiftly moved to propose SB 5767, the so-called "excess compensation tax." This bill aims to impose a 7.5% "excise tax" on hospital administrator jobs that Democrats arbitrarily deem overpaid. By pursuing such a tax, they are exploiting this ruling and setting a dangerous precedent for future taxes on other industries and incomes. This blatant abuse of our system of government and dramatic overreach by Democrats raises the question: who will they target next? | | Join the Team! | Become a Sustaining Member of the Washington State Republican Party and help us build a stronger, more vibrant conservative movement in our state. Your contribution is crucial in supporting our ongoing efforts to promote Republican values and candidates throughout Washington. When you sign up as a Sustaining Member, you'll receive a personalized membership card that signifies your commitment and support for the Republican Party in Washington State. This card represents your dedication to advancing our shared goals, and your role in shaping a brighter future for our communities. | | "Become a Sustaining Member Today!" | Your monthly contribution will help us bring the fight to the Democrats in key 2023 local races across our state and in 2024 fight to end the Democrat majority, Take back the 3rd Congressional District and Flip the 8th, and bring Republicans back into statewide offices! | | WSRP Storefront | | | In the News: | National Local WAGOP in the news | | "Contribute to our efforts to elect Republicans in 2023 and beyond!" | Contact: Benjamin Gonzalez Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 mailto:ben@wsrp.org | | | Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved. Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates Our mailing address is:** Washington State Republican Party11811 NE 1st St Suite 306Bellevue, WA 98005 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | | Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party. 11811 NE 1st St, Bellevue, WA 98005. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Instead of using their majority to deliver for working families across the country, Washibgton Republicans have leveraged their power to advance their extreme, out-of-touch MAGA agenda.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62061542/402186089/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_kob2024vlfcdc_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWQ0N2U5ZC05ZGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QgR5sOwIuhvrMIRs0V-W8X4_p8SxH3c5dzSYN9Jgit8=)

Team, one week ago today marked the 100th day of the Republican House Majority.

And after only just 100 days in control of the House, it couldn’t be more clear that **Washington Republicans are more interested in using their majority to advance their extreme, out-of-touch agenda** , rather than deliver for working families across the country. _Take a look >>_
| _**House Republican priorities over the last 100 days:**_
1. Banning books about civil rights, the Holocaust, and the LGBTQ+ community, instead of banning assault weapons.

2. Passing anti-abortion legislation.

3. Fighting for handouts for major oil and gas companies.

4. Plotting ways to slash Social Security and Medicare.

5. _And so much more._

---

**Republican extremism has reached new heights.** For the sake of children and families across the country, it is essential that we restore the Democratic Majority.

[**But to do so, we need to ensure we have what it takes to keep Democrats like Greg Landsman in office. The path to taking back the House Majority runs through Southwest Ohio, so we have to ask: Is there any amount you can pitch in to help keep OH-01 blue and ensure Democrats can take back the House in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62061544/402186091/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.20_b1_kob2024vlfcdc_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWQ0N2U5ZC05ZGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QgR5sOwIuhvrMIRs0V-W8X4_p8SxH3c5dzSYN9Jgit8=)

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: We need to take climate action now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62062100/402187852/-2014283537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhMmI5NzM1LTllZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CyNy-11OZEKvHR9OFca2CQoKw-1E0aKzI8jH00CXQzM=&emci=1cba3c7a-92df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ca2b9735-9edf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Hello Peter, Our state is missing its climate pollution reduction targets. In 2020, we missed our climate pollution reduction goal by 13% and in 2021, by 19%. The numbers are clear: **we need to do more, and we need to do more now**. In our state, our homes and buildings are the second largest source of climate pollution. Climate activists are in Salem today for Building Resilience Lobby Day, where they’re advocating for passing the Resilient, Efficient Buildings Package (SB 868 - 871). **Passing these bills will help us reduce climate pollution created by our homes and buildings, save money on utility bills, and create more clean energy jobs in our state. ** [**Will you write to your lawmakers today telling them that we need to invest in new climate programs and pass the Resilient, Efficient Buildings Package now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62062101/402187853/-2014283537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhMmI5NzM1LTllZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CyNy-11OZEKvHR9OFca2CQoKw-1E0aKzI8jH00CXQzM=&emci=1cba3c7a-92df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ca2b9735-9edf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The Resilient, Efficient Buildings Package includes the following four bills:
* **Healthy Heating and Cooling for All (SB 868)** : Provides Oregonians with financial assistance and other help to purchase and install heat pumps, prioritizing low-income households and those at highest risk from extreme weather. Also sets a target to install half a million heat pumps for efficient heating and cooling by 2030.
* **Build Smart from the Start (SB 869)** : Ensure new buildings are constructed efficiently to save Oregonians' money on energy bills, improve indoor air quality, and reduce climate pollution.
* **Building Performance Standards (SB 870)** : Set standards for energy efficiency and pollution reduction for large, commercial buildings with flexible requirements and financial incentives for owners to make the upgrades.
* **Smart State Buildings (SB 871)** : Reduce climate pollution from state-owned buildings, helping to reach our pollution reduction goals and making sure that our government leads by example.

The Resilient, Efficient Buildings Package will help us prepare for worsening climate harms like extreme heat, drought, stronger storms, and a longer wildfire season. Better windows, doors, and insulation in the places we gather reduce drafts and waste less energy. They keep clean air and comfortable temperatures inside, helping us save money and protecting us from air pollution, wildfire smoke, and extreme temperatures. Low-income households, rural Oregonians, and BIPOC communities disproportionately bear the brunt of climate harms due to economic disinvestment. **These bills help ensure that everyone can access safe, healthy, affordable, and resilient communities and reduce the amount of climate pollution that our homes and buildings generate.** **[Join all the voices in the State Capitol today that are calling for climate-friendly homes and buildings by](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62062102/402187854/-2014283537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhMmI5NzM1LTllZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CyNy-11OZEKvHR9OFca2CQoKw-1E0aKzI8jH00CXQzM=&emci=1cba3c7a-92df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ca2b9735-9edf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** [**writing to your lawmakers urging them to pass the Resilient, Efficient Buildings Package.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62062103/402187855/-2014283537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhMmI5NzM1LTllZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CyNy-11OZEKvHR9OFca2CQoKw-1E0aKzI8jH00CXQzM=&emci=1cba3c7a-92df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ca2b9735-9edf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Thank you for taking action, Julia DeGraw

clean_body: | | | Hello Peter, Our state is missing its climate pollution reduction targets. In 2020, we missed our climate pollution reduction goal by 13% and in 2021, by 19%. The numbers are clear: we need to do more, and we need to do more now. In our state, our homes and buildings are the second largest source of climate pollution. Climate activists are in Salem today for Building Resilience Lobby Day, where they’re advocating for passing the Resilient, Efficient Buildings Package (SB 868 - 871). Passing these bills will help us reduce climate pollution created by our homes and buildings, save money on utility bills, and create more clean energy jobs in our state. The Resilient, Efficient Buildings Package includes the following four bills: Healthy Heating and Cooling for All (SB 868) : Provides Oregonians with financial assistance and other help to purchase and install heat pumps, prioritizing low-income households and those at highest risk from extreme weather. Also sets a target to install half a million heat pumps for efficient heating and cooling by 2030. Build Smart from the Start (SB 869) : Ensure new buildings are constructed efficiently to save Oregonians' money on energy bills, improve indoor air quality, and reduce climate pollution. Building Performance Standards (SB 870) : Set standards for energy efficiency and pollution reduction for large, commercial buildings with flexible requirements and financial incentives for owners to make the upgrades. Smart State Buildings (SB 871) : Reduce climate pollution from state-owned buildings, helping to reach our pollution reduction goals and making sure that our government leads by example. The Resilient, Efficient Buildings Package will help us prepare for worsening climate harms like extreme heat, drought, stronger storms, and a longer wildfire season. Better windows, doors, and insulation in the places we gather reduce drafts and waste less energy. They keep clean air and comfortable temperatures inside, helping us save money and protecting us from air pollution, wildfire smoke, and extreme temperatures. Low-income households, rural Oregonians, and BIPOC communities disproportionately bear the brunt of climate harms due to economic disinvestment. These bills help ensure that everyone can access safe, healthy, affordable, and resilient communities and reduce the amount of climate pollution that our homes and buildings generate. Thank you for taking action, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters. | ---|---

| | Why Bob Lorinser is concerned:
* The bill fails to specify the agencies and programs to cut or eliminate. Still, it must target federal healthcare, science, education, housing, transportation, energy/environment, climate, labor, and research programs. It would leave the defense and Veterans' services untouched.

* Over 10 million people could be kicked off Food Stamps, amounting to one in four current SNAP beneficiaries, including our children, seniors, and Veterans.

Nationwide, nearly 1.4 million households with veterans — about 7% percent of all veteran households — use SNAP benefits, providing the purchasing power necessary to buy food. The program helps veterans put food on the table, reduces poverty, supports economic stability, and improves health outcomes.
* Independent agencies have yet to assess the economic impact of the legislation.

* Repealing portions of the Inflation Reduction Act addressing health, climate, and tax law would increase the deficit, according to the Congressional Budget Office (CBO).

* Reverse the additional IRS funding to improve the collection of taxes on those making over 400,000 would contribute to the deficit per CBO.

"I worry, and so should you," said Doc. "There are other options to address our national deficits. "[Can you contribute to my campaign](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/2bOUVNuB1/c?w=SUQb7QCbKHjhjPic_bBalstgdyZJFbcKimhlfeJIQX4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2JpdC5seS9GdW5kRHJCb2IiLCJyIjoiOTQzNGQ0NTItNjg4YS00NmYyLTg5NzItZmEzZmIyODJjMzY2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) for US Congress so I can advocate for a more reasonable and transparent approach to balancing the budget while still providing critical services to American citizens? name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Correcting Marjorie Taylor-Greene’s climate nonsense.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62062525/402189280/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThlMWE5Ny05ZmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzyBRSr32Gjwiw9rZ6OiWWBZXd1cU-oCx7Q8yQA3AUU=)
Peter,

As the only meteorologist in Congress, my ears perk up when I hear colleagues talk about extreme weather or how to handle climate change. I also feel a responsibility to call out climate misinformation when I see it.

A few days ago, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (I know...🙄) tweeted out a ton of nonsense and outright lies about climate change. Here’s one claim she made:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62062526/402189281/-665437442?refcode=em-4.20.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThlMWE5Ny05ZmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzyBRSr32Gjwiw9rZ6OiWWBZXd1cU-oCx7Q8yQA3AUU=)
I’ll admit, it can get a little exhausting rehashing science that’s been settled for decades, but here we are. In case it isn’t clear: emissions from greenhouse gases DO warm the planet, which causes climate change. The sooner we can stop emitting so much, the better off we’ll be in avoiding its worst impacts.

[**I'm working to help end the climate crisis to give our children a livable world. Help me take on climate deniers in Washington by chipping in a donation to my campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62062527/402189282/-665437442?refcode=em-4.20.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThlMWE5Ny05ZmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzyBRSr32Gjwiw9rZ6OiWWBZXd1cU-oCx7Q8yQA3AUU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62062528/402189283/-665437442?refcode=em-4.20.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThlMWE5Ny05ZmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzyBRSr32Gjwiw9rZ6OiWWBZXd1cU-oCx7Q8yQA3AUU=)

| [Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62062533/402189288/-665437442?refcode=em-4.20.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThlMWE5Ny05ZmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzyBRSr32Gjwiw9rZ6OiWWBZXd1cU-oCx7Q8yQA3AUU=)
---

Look, it’s easy to call out nonsense from extremists like Greene. What’s not easy is getting to the core of this issue: **Democrats are facing a communication crisis on climate change.**

We often frame the climate change debate around things like the dwindling polar bear population or dire warnings of a global catastrophe in “20 or 30 years.” While both are very real outcomes, the climate crisis is impacting our day-to-day lives _right now._

Notice extreme weather events becoming much more severe in recent years? For local farmers, even tiny temperature swings can have a devastating impact on crop yields. If you're in a town near the river like Moline, IL, serious heat could mean serious flooding and damage to local businesses.

**In Congress, it's my goal to frame climate change through the lens of how it impacts our _daily_ lives. The ‘here and now’ can't be denied, and we need to paint that picture if we’re going to undercut climate deniers like Greene.**

**[I'm ready to treat climate change with the urgency it deserves, and a big piece of that means changing how we talk about this issue. Please send in a donation to support my efforts today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62062534/402189289/-665437442?refcode=em-4.20.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThlMWE5Ny05ZmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzyBRSr32Gjwiw9rZ6OiWWBZXd1cU-oCx7Q8yQA3AUU=)**
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62062535/402189290/-665437442?refcode=em-4.20.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThlMWE5Ny05ZmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzyBRSr32Gjwiw9rZ6OiWWBZXd1cU-oCx7Q8yQA3AUU=)
---

Thank you, Peter.

-Eric

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Heads he wins, tails we lose. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62072650/402228181/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13E_GOP_E_20230420_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzVmNTljOS1jMmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4KgBb9TPTFbRDOdDwR8W3atVsgSFD8appfYcuFj0H8=&emci=fb1a3108-c2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c75f59c9-c2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Once in a while, Republican politicians put all their cards on the table. That’s exactly what Kevin McCarthy did on Monday. As he celebrated 100 days since (eventually) getting elected House Speaker, he went to the New York Stock Exchange, and he basically told everyone in America to be afraid — to be very afraid. Why? Because he’s willing to crash the economy. He’s demanding job-destroying budget cuts in exchange for avoiding a job-destroying default on the national debt. In other words: Heads he wins, tails the working people of America lose. **I’m holding firm for a clean bill to prevent a debt ceiling crisis, just like Kevin McCarthy and Republicans voted to raise the debt ceiling repeatedly under Donald Trump. Let’s link arms on this.** [_**Add your name if you agree: Congress must pass a clean bill to avoid a national default without negotiating ANY cuts to Social Security, Medicare, or other programs that serve the American people.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62072651/402228182/-1958264913?refcode=EMZ13E_GOP_E_20230420_V1S2&ms=EMZ13E_GOP_E_20230420_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzVmNTljOS1jMmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4KgBb9TPTFbRDOdDwR8W3atVsgSFD8appfYcuFj0H8=&emci=fb1a3108-c2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c75f59c9-c2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62072652/402228183/-1958264913?refcode=EMZ13E_GOP_E_20230420_V1S2&ms=EMZ13E_GOP_E_20230420_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzVmNTljOS1jMmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4KgBb9TPTFbRDOdDwR8W3atVsgSFD8appfYcuFj0H8=&emci=fb1a3108-c2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c75f59c9-c2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

We’ll keep fighting for a government that works for everyone — not just the rich and powerful — while Kevin McCarthy keeps spreading the out-of-touch Republican gospel to Wall Street bankers.
You see, in his speech, he was laying out a dangerous vision, where working people pay to keep our country running while corporations pay as little as possible in taxes.
Where Republicans slash funding that supports working families while making the IRS government look the other way as the ultra-rich cheat on their taxes.
Where hundreds of thousands, and potentially millions, of Americans lose their jobs — the jobs they’re counting on to make rent, to pay the mortgage, to put food on the table — while CEOs laugh all the way to the bank.
And if he doesn’t get his way on making that vision a reality, he’s willing to flush the global economy down the toilet by triggering the first-ever default on our debt — by not paying the tab he and Donald Trump ran up with massive tax breaks for billionaires and giant corporations.
**Kevin McCarthy’s plan is a non-starter, and I’ll keep working to make sure Democrats don’t give an inch.**
[_**But now is the moment for you to raise your voice, too. To say you oppose a job-destroying default AND that you oppose job-destroying budget cuts. Add your name if you’re in this fight, and let’s win it side by side.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62072653/402228184/-1958264913?refcode=EMZ13E_GOP_E_20230420_V1S2&ms=EMZ13E_GOP_E_20230420_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzVmNTljOS1jMmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4KgBb9TPTFbRDOdDwR8W3atVsgSFD8appfYcuFj0H8=&emci=fb1a3108-c2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c75f59c9-c2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

As he celebrated 100 days since (eventually) getting elected House Speaker, he went to the New York Stock Exchange, and he basically told everyone in America to be afraid — to be very afraid. Why? Because he’s willing to crash the economy. He’s demanding job-destroying budget cuts in exchange for avoiding a job-destroying default on the national debt. In other words: Heads he wins, tails the working people of America lose. I’m holding firm for a clean bill to prevent a debt ceiling crisis, just like Kevin McCarthy and Republicans voted to raise the debt ceiling repeatedly under Donald Trump. Let’s link arms on this. | We’ll keep fighting for a government that works for everyone — not just the rich and powerful — while Kevin McCarthy keeps spreading the out-of-touch Republican gospel to Wall Street bankers. You see, in his speech, he was laying out a dangerous vision, where working people pay to keep our country running while corporations pay as little as possible in taxes. Where Republicans slash funding that supports working families while making the IRS government look the other way as the ultra-rich cheat on their taxes. Where hundreds of thousands, and potentially millions, of Americans lose their jobs — the jobs they’re counting on to make rent, to pay the mortgage, to put food on the table — while CEOs laugh all the way to the bank. And if he doesn’t get his way on making that vision a reality, he’s willing to flush the global economy down the toilet by triggering the first-ever default on our debt — by not paying the tab he and Donald Trump ran up with massive tax breaks for billionaires and giant corporations. Kevin McCarthy’s plan is a non-starter, and I’ll keep working to make sure Democrats don’t give an inch. name: Team Lizzie
subject: Building a foundation for success
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Gun violence. Abortion bans. Anti-trans laws. Voter suppression.
We see every day how important it is to elect leaders—across our district, state, and country—who will fight for solutions to the issues we care about.
That’s what #TeamLizzie’s work together is all about. We mobilize around elections to make the change we want to see happen at every level of government. And our work doesn’t just come about on Election Day—it’s a year-round effort.
That’s why today we’re asking if you’ll make a recurring contribution to our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230418?refcode= folf230418&recurring=1]
We’ve won elections in TX-07 three times now on the strength of the coalition we’ve built together. Those victories took months of planning, organizing, and fundraising.
In 2024, we need to replicate our winning strategy as we face a competitive primary election, during what’s sure to be a closely watched and expensive presidential year, and with the additional challenge of winning back the House majority.
You know by now that your contributions power our organization —from canvassing to printing campaign literature and yard signs to running ads online and on TV. While some of those efforts won’t start in earnest for a little while longer, it’s crucial that we raise the resources now to ensure we can do it when we need to—and that we can help Democrats up and down the ballot.
We helped flip the House in 2018 so we know we can do it again, but we need to start by building a strong foundation for making that happen. Monthly contributions are a great way to help us build a sturdy foundation for our campaign. Any amount you can give—like $5 or $10 a month—would be greatly appreciated. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230418?refcode= folf230418&recurring=1]
Thanks for being part of the team!
Team Lizzie
P.S. If you can’t pledge a recurring contribution today, we understand! Contributions of all types and sizes support our campaign and are appreciated. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230418?refcode= folf230418]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230418?refcode= folf230418]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf-footer]
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC.

subject: Door Knock Event - April 29
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Quill for Virginia
body:
I need your help...

Dear,

I NEED YOUR HELP!

Join Team Quill on April 29th from 10 am - 1 pm for a Super Saturday Door Knock as we complete our first round of knocking the entire 21st District! We will gather at the QBE Parking Lot 14604 Washington St. Haymarket, VA.

Afterwards join me at the Great Mane Brewery (https://www.facebook.com/GreatManeBrewery?__cft__[0]=AZXxbYj2ZbZefsV6XcYmU0x1P85NGbfbfh0uVKZhO1mg9c3_GU7LQRJv9hd6h6uNuXSygVs4dXHlZ6jwx6FlhhkE7kg8G_gmVFxL_IePLovelx_KBuUaCKMrv3mrWS2hzxLSqcz4I9ikfGFG0oqaK8dXj2g4yOttTyW0uMywvMZioh95I5Pu52_dkumrRN_AZ78&__tn__=-]K-R) and support an amazing small business here in the District!

Early voting starts in two weeks. Help me get the word out about our campaign and our journey to defend our Republican Majority in the House of Delegates! I can’t do this without you.
RSVP HERE (https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.signupgenius.com%2Fgo%2F10C0A4AA5A72EA7F58-super%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR25YEQ9SK6-XrtbIsZOAmysu0SP2tRr2tfj5EJ8EaqVPx_qj7fV799fLXU&h=AT2P70CummFMZQsgN_MPyz_Mu7UrTNnm48m_9KazQE6AziNhTWOVhmAT5mvL67_2eyPjjltNMAacus4nmln7hOZDDCMirvOIo3IBBiubx6ylfVnjv6n4hyGGiDL07Mvly9eLHyA&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT1psXW-tisWxzvsjHFhz2LglIZ2KjJkjCaX1FBz7XpLmtU8hImsF_TjTI6dXsSJSFO1tJpScyQO-BwanNDoCvPYs5RJjNQVgGyBmfCWT8m4qNjxiHcmDeabvEiFgfhLCDAjQolVa8n3O6taBX46iuthBGKGcIFdU6UC8vDvTsaQ0iFqS_8WePQoGJmc4a-8lx0O8w7uZht3)

Sincerely,

Josh Quill
Republican Candidate
Virginia House of Delegates, District 21

name: PA Democrats
subject: Help protect reproductive rights in PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
Our courts on on the line this year | | |
---
| | Hey Peter, In the latest attack on reproductive rights, a Trump-appointed federal Judge on a US District Court in Texas ruled to restrict access to mifepristone, commonly known as the abortion pill.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62063402/402193089/1978883179?refcode=march31email&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk4NjVkZi1hM2RmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKf74I5mCpEvzdbFbo2MpZdyC34taVo_t6SJjxg69Lo=)
---
This poses a major threat to reproductive healthcare in the United States, and while the pill is still legal and available in Pennsylvania, that could change with an upcoming Supreme Court case. This is in regards to a pill that is used for over 50% of abortions in the United States and has been proven safer than common drugs like Viagra or penicillin. The best way for us to protect our reproductive rights here in Pennsylvania is to ensure we have a court system that respects a woman’s right to choose. **A strong Democratic Supreme & Superior Court are our best firewall against dangerous anti-choice policies, and the elections to decide these seats will be held this year.** [**Will you help us elect Judge Dan McCaffery to the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, as well as Judge Timika Lane and Jill Beck to the Pennsylvania Superior Court?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62063403/402193090/-1836988056?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk4NjVkZi1hM2RmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKf74I5mCpEvzdbFbo2MpZdyC34taVo_t6SJjxg69Lo=)
---

clean_body: Our courts on on the line this year | | | | | Hey Peter, In the latest attack on reproductive rights, a Trump-appointed federal Judge on a US District Court in Texas ruled to restrict access to mifepristone, commonly known as the abortion pill. = This poses a major threat to reproductive healthcare in the United States, and while the pill is still legal and available in Pennsylvania, that could change with an upcoming Supreme Court case. This is in regards to a pill that is used for over 50% of abortions in the United States and has been proven safer than common drugs like Viagra or penicillin. The best way for us to protect our reproductive rights here in Pennsylvania is to ensure we have a court system that respects a woman’s right to choose. A strong Democratic Supreme & Superior Court are our best firewall against dangerous anti-choice policies, and the elections to decide these seats will be held this year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Democracy is on the line. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6408a1fc9984a4e9db88ef6561ddab1&_e=hJSWOA_BG1KkzobdkzJQyiXck05TNGv6WDdLUpEKwAhbbm4bKVrcPkUG7hivI2qY3vTplQ5AxksSxm57famyYtdzI9kVcULgo89DelQCG8kiPUTTE8Au2pNI_lhbks6CUwW32wNOJSpuZC4-wKu9a0FKIjML5NhAipLas33zm11ZYdCdgZ9b00Ytljtrg8EhrPS0TfG0kRAr4074_3H95KD9QT8mC-NKoPonlUnfErWAvy8JKqdWDjDtFIPq5UqgkOtMg0clBF_WoYT4BnfmHg%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6408a1fc9984a4e9db88ef6561ddab1&_e=hJSWOA_BG1KkzobdkzJQyiXck05TNGv6WDdLUpEKwAhbbm4bKVrcPkUG7hivI2qY3vTplQ5AxksSxm57famyYtdzI9kVcULgo89DelQCG8kiPUTTE8Au2pNI_lhbks6CeicVmT1Wg8PNVR_nTVXcERUZ1MCluI-pBLILcLSMYCcA_kfezX11RII-L3vn_Y_lTY1u4gmA2AM77XJLUpaV9RgfAWteCTPH1qpgyfBypASSGDT_UlphnYGLDRPpnZH8lzB-9n8neOFmA0lTWRzJ6Q%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6408a1fc9984a4e9db88ef6561ddab1&_e=hJSWOA_BG1KkzobdkzJQyiXck05TNGv6WDdLUpEKwAhbbm4bKVrcPkUG7hivI2qY3vTplQ5AxksSxm57famyYtdzI9kVcULgo89DelQCG8kiPUTTE8Au2pNI_lhbks6C_rdV8-2UPztnCnZTbne352Ao5Y4ZVSRwxkzTRB9OSbffx_wRe5JziAR5sBR8mkXBOKy8KcEPW9wzrEvcA7pXqGV_h9Qw73RCxpnL3npXncMwxZm-A-gGUnVdZPKdY3DlRfltNbCyI5yuNxABhf0-Hw%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6408a1fc9984a4e9db88ef6561ddab1&_e=hJSWOA_BG1KkzobdkzJQyiXck05TNGv6WDdLUpEKwAhbbm4bKVrcPkUG7hivI2qY3vTplQ5AxksSxm57famyYtdzI9kVcULgo89DelQCG8kiPUTTE8Au2pNI_lhbks6CVEFF2Ghvt4TOCMQekE5hb8lFBcIMkb_oSPwUbKdADvRsiZkkRcSMVCC_m5OcglvIJps8RL1wmkdIe-r9sOG00Os8TlMuBcwG_XW61g1V9xjqJNi-Qq7Wu82otuiylXpbO-xreDelVQmGBzqco9wBtg%3D%3D)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6408a1fc9984a4e9db88ef6561ddab1&_e=hJSWOA_BG1KkzobdkzJQyiXck05TNGv6WDdLUpEKwAhbbm4bKVrcPkUG7hivI2qY3vTplQ5AxksSxm57famyYtdzI9kVcULgo89DelQCG8mQxHya5V3azgE4VoJsYnUrQGgMpP88S61mu1LbzhNy2hC-qltwu9B7Ero-SH6wiXEeHDgaJQmMl5lpUr3oApz62hPwfmjQShkWO6SpaTXJY2r8lwcXZd1bHqotdeJPNXBQ2Gy72zZ9mtf6iVkzO8LBlnU6cXM3itmpqz6w9Y_raqIeRtAqT_s-aRvjmi8y4ss%3D)
