clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. name: Wisconsin Republicans
subject: Save the Little White Schoolhouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Help us defend the history and legacy of the Republican party
| [](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=e013302dec7a4de692b61b872e1fabdb&_e=MivpMgDBeFSBPoCO7HPJIi50uWaycOJKUiyPw-Ow_gVYPCA71EiXPMYwqpeC5px5thyMxQNFq5pvS7Ub44_R24sK0iXKY0_n_GilQACC7kDqWE8AYzek6sZWdW7PXjMWHDWrLDRdChYKBgVVgmId8bBwRy2P5URl0VX0UP87CMVyEFhP5MIfi2cAA3vfVun6OlKIZFsVapop6eqnrsWH6c1NO-DLc6xTt6IMSLdxrl3NrH8jgJBewNigEX2B4L_iNGfvMgDWPEH5QFPa9_oPZ19oOVfOarFbaVourn3HtZKW_CXx8NtScrZCho7vodTTpQOkkG1Ho4LbKK49AvHNmbOHapIkXf3APw8EJrLTMXc%3D)
---
Friend,
---
A meeting at the Little White Schoolhouse held on March 20, 1854, to protest the westward expansion of slavery, eventually led to the formation of the Republican Party.
---
**This schoolhouse, the birthplace of the Republican party, is an icon we are proud to have as a part of history here in our state.**
---
But earlier this week the Little White Schoolhouse was moved to a new location that no longer qualifies it for national historic monument status.
---
[](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=e013302dec7a4de692b61b872e1fabdb&_e=MivpMgDBeFSBPoCO7HPJIi50uWaycOJKUiyPw-Ow_gVYPCA71EiXPMYwqpeC5px5thyMxQNFq5pvS7Ub44_R24sK0iXKY0_n_GilQACC7kDqWE8AYzek6sZWdW7PXjMWHDWrLDRdChYKBgVVgmId8bBwRy2P5URl0VX0UP87CMVyEFhP5MIfi2cAA3vfVun6OlKIZFsVapop6eqnrsWH6dM1CTU-bWWaML5QRB2AFLoBmQaYAUZiWqc5ol0sGndqXgfh1RKMEd7vvXpnAJMswoFSoNgOkaPHbIxHSLBzMR9pnU1sSIF9mcdkd9HwVVz97yMK59coEU_SEcivjoiVryXAnLal9f3-MRU-XP9HYFg%3D)
---
_This has caused an uproar as many are disappointed and frustrated with some saying this move is an attempt to “erase the history” of the Republican party’s anti-slavery roots._
---
_We need to FIGHT BACK to defend our history and protect the legacy of freedom that our party has stood for since its founding in Ripon._
---
That’s why we need your help to keep this historic monument a part of Wisconsin and Republican history alive.
---
[**Please add your name to our Save the Schoolhouse petition to help us keep Republican history alive.**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=e013302dec7a4de692b61b872e1fabdb&_e=MivpMgDBeFSBPoCO7HPJIi50uWaycOJKUiyPw-Ow_gVYPCA71EiXPMYwqpeC5px5thyMxQNFq5pvS7Ub44_R24sK0iXKY0_n_GilQACC7kDqWE8AYzek6sZWdW7PXjMWHDWrLDRdChYKBgVVgmId8bBwRy2P5URl0VX0UP87CMVyEFhP5MIfi2cAA3vfVun6OlKIZFsVapop6eqnrsWH6Qt_2wBbO5Ij2ylOS8JtzDtM3cqKZKxnk1ojQVaWDr_c31FhgCa9Uyp-u5vfj04BbQH8YWAIPO7-pitRo1Tji3Yz7aUSDQRxDj_dy61twvo_dxDr4TuW03XZWB_OLpia8aBWpYQ-qCYH8IJFWlDU_Tk%3D)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=e013302dec7a4de692b61b872e1fabdb&_e=MivpMgDBeFSBPoCO7HPJIi50uWaycOJKUiyPw-Ow_gVYPCA71EiXPMYwqpeC5px5thyMxQNFq5pvS7Ub44_R24sK0iXKY0_n_GilQACC7kDqWE8AYzek6sZWdW7PXjMWHDWrLDRdChYKBgVVgmId8bBwRy2P5URl0VX0UP87CMVyEFhP5MIfi2cAA3vfVun6OlKIZFsVapop6eqnrsWH6UERGOH5oYD8okYT88bixYRv2ikcmIUcyJl0fL34CllvekupG5ttBGV_sSgVqxSGTQlxv4Oa6RvUBOx624wEfjA_1Owmb83Wczq1Q0hEB4SNno6QZUzGY5iFcXdNAiz_t6sDdbilyaxFNu8V2Z29pO8%3D)

clean_body: We need your help to build on this momentum | Peter, The radical-Left Democrats are continuing their relentless assault on America – But throughout our first 100 days in the majority, I have refused to back down, and I know YOU won't either. I have been working to STOP the destruction of America – and thanks to your unwavering support, we’ve achieved some remarkable victories over our first 100 days. Since retaking power last year, our conservative House majority has: Rescinded the 87,000 IRS agents that the Democrats funded through the Inflation Reduction Act. Blocked Biden's Energy Secretary from selling out the U.S. energy sector to appease Communist China. Boosted domestic energy production and reversed Biden's cancelation of the Keystone Pipeline Ended oppressive COVID emergency declarations and vaccination mandates. Protected the rights of parents to know what their children are learning. Exposed radical Soros-funded prosecutors and their soft on crime policies. We know the importance of tapping into our own natural resources, creating well-paying jobs, and protecting the freedom and sovereignty of U.S. citizens from overreaching government. But our work is far from over. The radical-Left Democrats are doubling down on their destructive agenda, and we need your help to continue building on our first 100 days so we can defeat them once and for all in 2024. Thank you, Scott Fitzgerald Congressman (WI-05) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress Po Box 5048 Elm Grove, WI 53122

| | The American people deserve to know that their elected leaders are working hard to serve them, not their stock portfolios. **_Members of Congress should NOT trade stocks. It's a corrupt practice and it has to end._** It's corrupt because members' portfolios have the potential to influence how they write legislation or vote on bills. And it's corrupt because members of Congress often have advanced notice of investigations, hearings, and legislation – information that is not available to the public – that can affect the stock market. **Why is that wrong? Because it gives them an advantage that ordinary Americans don't have.** Studies show that members of Congress on average beat the S&P 500 year after year. The American people know it's corrupt, too. In fact, 3 out of 4 Americans believe that stock trading by members of Congress should be banned. **The good news: I've got a plan to ban stock trading by members of Congress and their immediate family members entirely.** But to get this passed, we need to build massive nationwide grassroots momentum. name: Finance Team @ Engel for Congress
subject: Our opponent doesn't want you to know this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
In our district, folks want leaders who prioritize common sense solutions, not party agendas or extremist policies.
That's why our opponent has worked hard to convince the public that he's a moderate. But Juan Ciscomani's views — especially when it comes to issues like women's rights — are anything but reasonable.
In case you were looking for an example of how moderate he really is...
Majorie Taylor Greene has donated THOUSANDS of dollars to Juan Ciscomani.
As a reminder: Greene, a Congresswoman from Georgia, is a QAnon conspiracy theorist who has called the entire Democratic party pedophiles and suggested the Parkland, Florida school shooting was faked. She's so extreme that many Republicans in Congress have condemned her — but our opponent will still accept her support.
Kirsten will fight for issues that folks in southern Arizona ACTUALLY care about: water security, the rising cost-of-living, and reproductive rights.

name: CoriBush.org
subject: The push for marijuana reform explained:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Decriminalizing and legalizing marijuana would be a crucial step on the path toward restorative justice.
#
Peter,
On this 4/20, our movement is calling on Congress to finally act to end the failed "war on drugs," which for over 50 years has **_disproportionately_** targeted Black and brown communities across the country.
Last year, President Biden announced that he would pardon the nearly 6,500 people who were federally charged with simple marijuana possession. While this was welcome and long overdue, **this is just the first step** on the path toward restorative justice.
Now we must work to completely deschedule marijuana from the Controlled Substances Act, provide expungement and resentencing for past marijuana convictions beyond simple possession and address the substance abuse crisis with the urgency it demands.
Growing up, Cori saw Black people arrested for marijuana possession at three times the rate of white people even though usage rates were the same. Now, Cori is fighting to end this vicious cycle of pain and punishment.
[**If you're with us, will you chip in anything you can today to power Cori's work in Congress to end the failed 'war on drugs'?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230420.PSZVEZ&refcode=em20230420-2548&t=1&akid=2548%2E1082990%2Eru3weP)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230420.PSZVEZ&amount=5&refcode=em20230420-2548&t=20&akid=2548%2E1082990%2Eru3weP)**
In Congress, Cori and Rep. Bonnie Watson Coleman introduced the Drug Policy Reform Act in 2021 — the most comprehensive decriminalization bill introduced in Congress, which among other things would:
* Declare an end to the "war on drugs"
* Prohibits the denial of employment or termination based upon a criminal history for drug possession
* Decriminalize drug possession
* Ensures individuals with drug convictions can gain access to drivers’ licenses
* Promotes evidence-based drug education
* Re-invest in health-centered approaches to effectively address substance abuse
* Incentivize state and local governments to adopt decriminalization policies as well

For more than 50 years, the "war on drugs" has upended and destroyed the lives of too many communities and families, **_despite the fact_** that drug criminalization does nothing to help communities. **We're long overdue for comprehensive reform.**
As a nurse, Cori knows now is the time to adopt wellness and compassion over trauma and punishment.
[**The fight for comprehensive reform will continue. Will you stand with us today by pitching in $5 or anything you can to keep Cori in Congress organizing and legislating for the change we need?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230420.PSZVEZ&refcode=em20230420-2548&t=21&akid=2548%2E1082990%2Eru3weP)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230420.PSZVEZ&amount=5&refcode=em20230420-2548&t=40&akid=2548%2E1082990%2Eru3weP)**
In solidarity,
CoriBush.org

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230420?refcode=em20230420-2548-footer&t=41&refcode2=2548_1082990_ru3weP&akid=2548%2E1082990%2Eru3weP) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=42&akid=2548%2E1082990%2Eru3weP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=43&akid=2548%2E1082990%2Eru3weP)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Warrior=20Mom?=
subject: Do you have the best science & protocols for your family?
body:
Get Your Ticket Today! | | | **The American Health & Freedom Summit**
**_No Complaining - Just Solutions_**
---
| |
> | | | | **Are you ready to get the newest science, protocols, products and inspiration to keep your family on the cutting edge of Optimal Health & Well Being?**
> ---
|
> | | | | **LAST CHANCE**... Wednesday April 12th is the last day to take advantage of the discount sleeping room block and the early bird tickets. This Public Summit is a once in a lifetime historic event!!! You will never see these world renowned doctors, scientists, experts and advocates all together in one place again. ( View the attached graphic ) There has never been a more important time in history for everyone to gather together from around the country, to take back our health and freedoms. If you or your kids are struggling with a health issue, or you are an optimizer, you will want to get your tickets now. You will be kicking yourself if you miss this one. There are public events for parents and individuals, also functional medical doctors, chiropractors, nurses, autism/neurodevelopmental disorders and health freedom advocates that run from 8am-6pm on Saturday & Sunday. Additionally, there are preprograms that start on Friday for the Nurses, Chiropractors & Freedom Advocates, which continue all weekend. CME & CE hours available for doctors and health professionals. The fellowship with new and old friends and influencers, along with the support and networking that our conferences have been known for over the past 25 years will be tremendous. # Big week for 2024...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fee6ff8785&e=f6564bbe3b)
Pompeo has officially said he’s not running this year, DeSantis and Trump continue to take shots at each other and more. I went through all of that and more in Monday’s episode of “Beyond the Briefing” podcast.
And today there’s a brand new episode with my friend and conservative commentator, Erin Elmore. We talk about her first interactions with Donald Trump while she was on The Apprentice, what she learned from being on QVC, and more. Listen [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b79fa8b774&e=f6564bbe3b).

# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”
---
In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver.
Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.
If you go to the link: [bishopgoldgroup.com/Sean](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=31b41dc07f&e=f6564bbe3b), they’ll know I sent you.
Thanks to my friends at Bishop Gold Group for sponsoring this newsletter so I can continue to bring you content for free.

Thanks to my friends at Bishop Gold Group for sponsoring this newsletter so I can continue to bring you content for free. | | | | | | | | | | | | Join my team for PurpleStride... Every year I raise money for Pancreatic Cancer Action Network by captaining a team for their annual PurpleStride. subject: Shad White discusses crime in Jackson. Come listen!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132992?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Shad White first assumed the role of Mississippi State Auditor in 2018. Since then, he has worked diligently in cracking down on corruption and the mishandling of taxpayer dollars in our state. **

White has been a strong component of combatting crime in our capital city and has highlighted some of the key issues that lead to the ongoing high homicide rate in Jackson, such as the epidemic of fatherlessness in the state.

On May 4, he will be discussing ways in which he believes Mississippi's criminal justice system can improve.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5dcc492312&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_**
| **White will be joined by best-selling author Rafael Mangual. ****Tickets can be found[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=86161b05a2&e=5703353baa). **

Each ticket comes with a copy of Mangual's book, "Criminal (In)Justice." You don't want to miss out!
---

---
| |
---
All the Best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: The plan to corrupt our courts and force through a nationwide ban on the most commonly used abortion pill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Hawley thinks you’ll let him get away with this. Let’s prove him wrong.
#
Peter — six years ago, a plan was already in motion to corrupt our courts and force through a nationwide ban on the most commonly used abortion pill — in all 50 states, under any and all circumstances, without exception.
**And Josh Hawley thinks you’ll let him get away with it.**
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[rush a donation of any amount toward my grassroots campaign to defeat him.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31490?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3) But first, let me share a timeline of events explaining exactly how we got to this point.**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31490?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3)**
**IN 2017:** Matt Kacsmaryk is nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court. His confirmation stalled for years.
**IN 2018:** While his nomination languishes in the Senate, Kacsmaryk makes an investment in his future.
**Kacsmaryk became a campaign donor to Josh Hawley** , a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.
**IN 2019:** Now a U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley decides to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge. He confirms Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.
**IN 2022:** A lawsuit is filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions.
**Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31490?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3)
**APRIL 7, 2023:** Hawley’s DONOR judge rules in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s WIFE, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states.
**This is the first time a judge has _ever_ unilaterally tried to take a drug off the market against FDA objections.**
**AND NOW:** In his official capacity as U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley has filed an amicus brief asking the Supreme Court to end a temporary injunction that’s blocking the ruling (in his wife’s lawsuit) by the judge (his campaign donor) to ban America’s most commonly-used abortion medication.
**This is what corruption looks like — and in 2024, we’re going to make Hawley own it.[So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on abortion and send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31490?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31491?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31491?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31491?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31491?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31491?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31491?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31490?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3)
---
Senators shouldn’t be in the business of using their position to benefit their family’s legal careers and activism — especially if there’s financial incentive to do so. And there shouldn’t even be a _hint_ of campaign donations impacting who, when, and how a judge gets on a court.
When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll vote to restore Roe v. Wade. But I’ll also fight to end corruption like this by:
1. Barring Senators from voting on judicial nominees who’ve given to their campaigns.

2. Barring Senators from lobbying any court to benefit an immediate relative.

**Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will stand up and fight for their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve.**
**[If you’re with me, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley today. Real people like you are the only folks I ever want to be accountable to in the U.S. Senate, so your support means the world to me.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31490?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3)**
**[RUSH A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31490?refcode=em20230420-3022&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3)**
Thank you,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230420-3022-footer&t=14&refcode2=3022_614464_gvJhz3&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=3022%2E614464%2EgvJhz3). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: It’s time to bring cannabis policy into the 21st century
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The treatment of cannabis on the federal level remains embarrassingly behind the times.

It’s ridiculous that marijuana is still classified as a Schedule I substance, on par with heroin and LSD. This treatment stunts opportunity, ruins lives for those caught in the criminal justice system, and puts users at risk of ingesting a tainted product. By legalizing marijuana, we can ensure that the public has access to safe products and we can ignite a new spirit of entrepreneurship, as we’ve seen in the many states that have already legalized recreational cannabis.

There is no excuse for our outdated federal marijuana laws. Sign if you agree: It’s time to legalize marijuana on the federal level and bring cannabis policy into the 21st century. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/legalize-marijuana-petition?contactdata=AvSDu1WTtQ10z78bDUjKc57PRstqcOTE4MbSUOSIx8rqVxEFvwZGM3F8BltGYiaf/rfoPIxeVcIJW3GrVHdN2XCm/bQzI4AJgmzQw3UmT0vYXN4xNGAUtcgN1Z0RZGPo+/qejs/rawXgUJz7VMhy0Q==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/legalize-marijuana-petition?contactdata=AvSDu1WTtQ10z78bDUjKc57PRstqcOTE4MbSUOSIx8rqVxEFvwZGM3F8BltGYiaf/rfoPIxeVcIJW3GrVHdN2XCm/bQzI4AJgmzQw3UmT0vYXN4xNGAUtcgN1Z0RZGPo+/qejs/rawXgUJz7VMhy0Q==]

I have supported reform since my first campaign for Congress and was a lead sponsor of the Marijuana Justice Act. The federal approach to marijuana has caused irreparable harm to those who still face criminal records, particularly people of color.

We have years of evidence to show how legalizing marijuana would also be a boon for our economy. Washington State collected [https://www.mpp.org/issues/legalization/cannabis-tax-revenue-states-regulate-cannabis-adult-use/] $559.5 million dollars in legal tax revenue in 2021 from the cannabis industry. If we legalize it at the national level, economists estimate [https://newfrontierdata.com/cannabis-insights/cannabis-taxes-generate-106-billion-create-1-million-jobs-2025/] that we could create over 1 million jobs by 2025 and over $132 billion in tax revenue over the next decade.

The federal prohibition of marijuana has failed. It’s time to do the right thing and legalize it.

Sign the petition: Legalize marijuana nationwide. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/legalize-marijuana-petition?contactdata=AvSDu1WTtQ10z78bDUjKc57PRstqcOTE4MbSUOSIx8rqVxEFvwZGM3F8BltGYiaf/rfoPIxeVcIJW3GrVHdN2XCm/bQzI4AJgmzQw3UmT0vYXN4xNGAUtcgN1Z0RZGPo+/qejs/rawXgUJz7VMhy0Q==]

Onward,
Ro

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Clarence Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I want to hear from you
#

Hi there,
Last week, [**ProPublica reported**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2855?t=1&akid=1256%2E159979%2ECEPnfX) that for decades, Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas accepted -- and failed to disclose -- millions of dollars worth of gifts and luxury travel from a billionaire Republican mega-donor, including:
* Cruises on his multi-million dollar yacht 🛥️
* Trips on his private jet ✈️
* Attendance at an exclusive (all-male) private retreat in California 🏖️

Justices are responsible for upholding the law -- **and they must be held to rigorous and enforceable ethical standards.**
Accepting these lavish gifts from a right-wing mega-donor, and failing to disclose them, undermines faith in our judiciary and calls into question the Supreme Court’s ethical standards.
As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I wrote to Chief Justice Roberts calling on him to immediately open an investigation into how this came to pass and to take all needed action to prevent further misconduct from Supreme Court Justices -- including adopting the same code of conduct that _every other judicial body in the country_ is subject to.
So, what comes next?
The Judiciary Committee is going to hold hearings about the need to restore public confidence in the Supreme Court’s ethical standards. And if the Supreme Court doesn’t resolve this issue on their own, we’ll introduce legislation to do so.
Because we can’t afford to have a judicial system where the people at the very top — appointed for life — are not subject to the same ethical rules as the rest of us.
And friend, I want to hear from you. Do you believe that Supreme Court Justices should follow the same Code of Conduct as the rest of the federal judiciary? Do you think there should be a different, even higher standard?
[**Please take a minute to share your thoughts with me ahead of the upcoming hearings.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/april-scotus-survey-em/?source=em230420-1-sp50&refcode2=1256.159979.CEPnfX&akid=1256%2E159979%2ECEPnfX)
**[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/april-scotus-survey-em/?source=em230420-1-sp50&refcode2=1256.159979.CEPnfX&akid=1256%2E159979%2ECEPnfX)**
Thank you,
Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1256%2E159979%2ECEPnfX)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Double your planet-saving impact with EARLY ACCESS to our Earth Day match
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | | | | | | | [DOUBLE YOUR GIFT FOR THE NEXT 54 HOURS ONLY](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1731284?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, I had to personally reach out to you early, ahead of the Earth Day rush Saturday, and share this important update on our planet-saving work.
No matter what greedy corporations say, or how many millions of dollars they spend on PR and misinformation campaigns, Friends of the Earth is committed to fighting back. **Corporate pollution is a choice, and we CAN hold companies accountable for that choice. **
**Right now, mega-manufacturing plants are pumping out single-use plastics that end up in our oceans to the tune of two huge garbage trucks per minute. Corporations are aggressively working to expand mining, logging and drilling operations on our public lands. The resulting habitat loss threatens the survival of endangered species – who are now in more danger than EVER. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is worsening from out-of-control fossil fuel greed. **
**The fact is this: We don't have to live like this, and our only Earth doesn't have to die like this.** We have the power to stop catastrophic outcomes for our planet and all its inhabitants if we fight back together now. And what more powerful moment than Earth Day to take action?
**That’s why this is such heartening news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day up to our goal of $180,000 but only until midnight Saturday. Because you've been such a committed supporter, we created a custom match link you can use to be the first to DOUBLE your Earth Day impact. So please hurry and make your gift for our planet now! Here’s your personal link: **
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1731284?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This goal means so much to our organization and the planet – and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early-bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators and stop the climate crisis before it’s too late.
**Matches like this don’t come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. **That’s why we must seize this opportunity for our planet, friend. With all our futures on the line, getting complacent or giving in to despair is simply not an option. So we’re counting on committed environmentalists like you to set the pace for the rest of our community.
**With time running out, we need to make this Earth Day really count. Please, make your membership gift and be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our planet while we still can. Your personalized Earth Day match access link is right here – donate now to have every dollar doubled:**
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1731284?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you,

Erich Pica
President
Friends of the Earth
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | == Friend, I had to personally reach out to you early, ahead of the Earth Day rush Saturday, and share this important update on our planet-saving work. No matter what greedy corporations say, or how many millions of dollars they spend on PR and misinformation campaigns, Friends of the Earth is committed to fighting back. Corporate pollution is a choice, and we CAN hold companies accountable for that choice. Right now, mega-manufacturing plants are pumping out single-use plastics that end up in our oceans to the tune of two huge garbage trucks per minute. Corporations are aggressively working to expand mining, logging and drilling operations on our public lands. The resulting habitat loss threatens the survival of endangered species – who are now in more danger than EVER. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is worsening from out-of-control fossil fuel greed. The fact is this: We don't have to live like this, and our only Earth doesn't have to die like this. We have the power to stop catastrophic outcomes for our planet and all its inhabitants if we fight back together now. And what more powerful moment than Earth Day to take action? That’s why this is such heartening news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day up to our goal of $180,000 but only until midnight Saturday. Because you've been such a committed supporter, we created a custom match link you can use to be the first to DOUBLE your Earth Day impact. So please hurry and make your gift for our planet now! Here’s your personal link: | | == This goal means so much to our organization and the planet – and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early-bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators and stop the climate crisis before it’s too late. Matches like this don’t come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. That’s why we must seize this opportunity for our planet, friend. With all our futures on the line, getting complacent or giving in to despair is simply not an option. So we’re counting on committed environmentalists like you to set the pace for the rest of our community. With time running out, we need to make this Earth Day really count. Please, make your membership gift and be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our planet while we still can. Your personalized Earth Day match access link is right here – donate now to have every dollar doubled: | | == Thank you, Erich Pica President Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

Peter, today marks 24 years since the tragic school shooting in Columbine High School.
24 years since we watched the news – frozen in dread as the death toll continued to tick higher. 24 years since the lives of over a dozen teenagers and one teacher were cut tragically short. 24 years since we as a nation were forced to confront the horror of gun violence as we watched children lose their lives.
**But 24 years later, our nation has suffered through another 377 school shootings, and serious gun reform has not yet occurred.**
Peter, for nearly a quarter century, we have allowed our children to live in a nation where mass shootings at school are a tragic reality.

**_Now, it's up to us to put an end to this devastating cycle._**
As soon as I took office as your attorney general, I've fought to put an end to the gun violence epidemic once and for all. From holding the gun lobby accountable to working to get assault weapons off the street, I'm committed to this fight – and I hope you'll join me.
**That’s why I urgently need at least 10,000 supporters to recommit themselves to our fight against gun violence. So please, before midnight tonight, update your record:**
| | **Should military-style assault weapons be banned nationwide?**

| | Peter – The 13 days since a right-wing judge overturned the FDA approval of the abortion medication mifepristone have been chaotic, confusing, and dangerous. I've spoken to so many folks who are having trouble keeping up with all of the court decisions and appeals, and who just need to know what's going on. So, I thought I'd send this email to update you on what's happened so far, and where we're headed. **On April 7,** Matthew Kacsmaryk, an anti-choice federal judge in Texas, took the unprecedented step of reversing approval for mifepristone, a drug deemed safe and effective by the FDA for the past 23 years. **That same day,** a federal judge in Washington state issued a conflicting ruling, allowing mifepristone to be legally dispensed in the 17 states plus D.C., which sued in support of its legality. **Last week,** the Biden Administration appealed the Texas ruling. That appeal has two steps: A hearing (which hasn't happened yet) and A short-term decision about what the law is until the official hearing happens. On **Thursday, April 12** , a federal appeals court decided the second question, ruling that mifepristone will remain legal. **But the kicker here is that the prescribing guidelines were reverted back to what they were before 2016,** which means new and unnecessary burdens on patients that haven't existed for the past seven years – a shorter period of time to use the drug, three mandatory in-person doctor's appointments, and **crucially, mifepristone cannot be sent by mail, leaving women in rural areas or without reliable transportation few options for medication abortions.** So, for right now, the fate of this widely-used drug is winding its way through the appeals process that could very well end up at the Supreme Court – and we don't know how long it's going to take. But what we do know plainly is that even though they carry on long and loud about "states rights," the right wing extremist GOP never intended to allow abortion to be decided by the voters of each state. **They want a federal abortion ban and they appear willing to use any means to get there.** Via legislatures, or popular vote, or court rulings, or TRAP laws, if anti-choice radicals can place enough undue burden on patients, they'll effectively eliminate abortion. **It's a frightening outlook, but know that I will always oppose any kind of federal abortion ban, whatever it may look like. I'll continue this fight, until every state in the country recognizes our reproductive freedom** and the right to make our own medical decisions without government interference. It's a frightening outlook, but know that I will always oppose any kind of federal abortion ban, whatever it may look like. I'll continue this fight, until every state in the country recognizes our reproductive freedom and the right to make our own medical decisions without government interference. In solidarity with women everywhere, Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Tanner Hale, Young Democrats of Nevada
subject: YDA Convention |It’s been how long⁉️ 😲
body:
It’s been 50 years since the Young Democrats of America last held a convention in Nevada! | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZDxta_rmckKERplAGsr51uf9sCfvvDwOuoWGVoe3eh51iP3z2qebssiUH-ipnONmCuPoW-b7LPpdLJWfAW2eOGCOfYlkazuBTP9E8qMi38kFqHUEN5cWsEj_D8PR4PMm6ioUVMDI_CK1DvYqZNEPUU_pR8OyG8w9w3F6f501nwgoEjKmnmmZFS3WTfYGUQNhDd2J5f_lM_2rbRNNh72y_Ze3WDUKrTDzPneXAzUpqFP8aTS4sUFueWXiknwkhqcLTF1dvdq_IaGIaGJz4MSXVEgMYncARTi5iyUJdZs7vFMQKfsqW0D3Km_OcICj-Klu726v7-MW-ffHhLRiUmRLT/3vi/lxI2hX_UREeoGPGWz2IQzw/h0/vw9bTu00Joos5eE6Vrpwss2xbv7pTfmkgFuMHjo6mTQ)
---
Derek, **can you believe it’s been over 50 YEARS!?****
**
**It’s been 50 years since the Young Democrats of America last held a convention in Nevada!** In that time the Silver State’s population has grown by 6-fold and Las Vegas has completely transformed from a mere dot on the map to a glowing beacon in the desert providing opportunities to those who take a gamble. **** Time and time again, the battle born state defies the odds and re-elects Democrats up and down the ballot. Most recently, we re-elected the nation's first and only Latina Senator by a margin of 0.8% in one of the most difficult campaign cycles ever. Its battleground status is all thanks to robust campaign operations from unions, grassroots organizations, and activists that turn out a diverse coalition of voters. **** This is why we’re OVER THE MOON to be hosting the national convention in fabulous ✨Las Vegas✨! **** From June 18th - June 21st, we’ll be spending our time at the MGM Grand Hotel (that has a unionized staff so please be sure to tip!). We’re currently offering a [$50 early bird registration](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKwk8_6SuZZQmYLPHuT1187xfOAmTDl254R0Aegs_gsaq82CPWEen4FbCGQQg3TCgk0C8O27HdT3LutowYH-Db-DEGd1wcH6m2CUS77oi__KHJK5gOvCFjXH0xO4BBViqk7o8cIyfxibxuJwGv5Es6uHrsCkaUPMDyZCaFrZ2V81-nB1749Y9gZZzyyqyXd_9e2TzHMF2pAnEMbbDdLD2Qy0wsbGATxm46ElmKowha0nuzLdEAvi19cB4NTa_613Xg/3vi/lxI2hX_UREeoGPGWz2IQzw/h1/vxVEfPZl-RbCR3mcxtfKaLkXym_gzICZapNlo7RIPUw) for those who book their hotel rooms BEFORE May 17th. This deal is virtually unheard of, but we vowed from the onset to make it as affordable as possible so more young democrats across the country can join us!

clean_body: It’s been 50 years since the Young Democrats of America last held a convention in Nevada! | | Derek, can you believe it’s been over 50 YEARS!? It’s been 50 years since the Young Democrats of America last held a convention in Nevada! In that time the Silver State’s population has grown by 6-fold and Las Vegas has completely transformed from a mere dot on the map to a glowing beacon in the desert providing opportunities to those who take a gamble. ** Time and time again, the battle born state defies the odds and re-elects Democrats up and down the ballot. Most recently, we re-elected the nation's first and only Latina Senator by a margin of 0.8% in one of the most difficult campaign cycles ever. Its battleground status is all thanks to robust campaign operations from unions, grassroots organizations, and activists that turn out a diverse coalition of voters. This is why we’re OVER THE MOON to be hosting the national convention in fabulous ✨Las Vegas✨! From June 18th - June 21st, we’ll be spending our time at the MGM Grand Hotel (that has a unionized staff so please be sure to tip!). We’re currently offering a for those who book their hotel rooms BEFORE May 17th. This deal is virtually unheard of, but we vowed from the onset to make it as affordable as possible so more young democrats across the country can join us! Don’t miss out on the opportunity to join us for hands-on training, strategic planning, networking, and the election of the YDA officers for the next biennium. We’ll also be hearing special remarks from guest speakers both from national and in-state politics. You’ll have to register to find out who’ll join us! 🤭 See y’all out in the not-so-wild west! Tanner Hale President, Young Democrats of Nevada | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sen. Sherrod Brown's one of the most progressive Senators in the country, while his state's gone from purple to light red. Senator Brown, however, always a man of principle, hasn't changed. The jackal who just entered the race to challenge him will spend tens of millions of dollars smearing him, and Sen. Brown needs our help.
body:
We can’t lose another Ohio Senate seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7876ce5e-7816-43a2-a1c0-efcb5b0ee8ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Not Again. We Can't Let Them Do This Again._** _**Sen. Sherrod Brown's a unicorn. One of the most progressive Senators in the country, while his state's gone from purple to light red. **__Senator Brown, however, always a man of principle, hasn't changed._ _In 2022, private polling had Tim Ryan basically tied with the ghastly J.D. Vance. Then billionaire Trumper Peter Thiel (Vance worked for Thiel) joined McConnell in dumping $50 MILLION dollars in the race, and we lost by 5-6%. _ **_Brown has advantages Ryan lacked, incumbency and statewide name recognition. Yet, they're trying again._** _From Brown's recent email:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51dab717-8699-49e3-b3a1-6fb73bde7bc3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The jackal who just entered the race, Bernie Moreno, will spend tens of millions smearing Brown. We can't let him do it unanswered._ **_In fact, Moreno endorsed Trump for President--AFTER he was indicted, and Trump already offered Moreno support_**. **_Moreno will ban abortion, put AR-15s in teenagers' hands, attack our elections and deregulate trains even after that toxic crash caused a public health crisis in the Ohio region. He's JD Vance in a Bernie Moreno mask._** **_Folks, if we lose Sherrod Brown, we won't get another like him from Ohio. We're sick & tired of the Kyrsten Sinema's. Brown's been her polar opposite, never forgetting he represents us. Losing him would be a tragedy._** [**_If we dig harder this time, we can combat their tens of millions, get Brown the resources he needs. Will you join us RIGHT NOW, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Sherrod Brown?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c0a30b6-5e17-4418-82dd-6f129d578a22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for keeping Moreno far away from Washington._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1eb7d8a-ff28-43dc-8db1-ba3e00505d4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

Foreign interests have been using loopholes to try and influence American elections for too long.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62068752/402211877/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzA2ZTNmZDMtYjNkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pdwcsujiLnRkODpi3Dsfr5oxxhxe4Arobr9BM3oMS2Y=&emci=37970412-a8df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c06e3fd3-b3df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

For too long, foreign interests have been using loopholes to buy online ads to influence American elections._This is unacceptable._

Americans have the right to know who is paying for the political ads they’re seeing. Derek is leading the effort in Congress to bring transparency and accountability to online political ads, and this month, he reintroduced the bipartisan Honest Ads Act in the House!

This crucial bill would make it harder for foreign actors to use digital sources to directly attack our democracy. It would also help prevent interference in future elections and improve the transparency of online political advertisements altogether.

**[Foreign interests shouldn't be able to buy ads to influence our elections or our democracy. The Honest Ads Act will ensure our laws are up to date with the latest technology. Peter, will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of this important legislation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62068753/402211878/1276526800?ms=em23_230420_honads_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230420_honads_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230420_honads_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230420_honads_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=4RoP/MP7AwNaqoU487NA4bdVZRkoCx8W2S4dNvT7096VDsCD3J7LLgvnQhzeHNwey8SJx0pRZnjWoJnFoz7umVLk/Xt8wci7q4lgydlS6DaxP0EqSYqzl77YVluwrzVKZLT4ztV7ouVqJ+nnck4CMk555nkjnTOE7Ok1LlqZSKg=&refcode2=c06e3fd3-b3df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzA2ZTNmZDMtYjNkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pdwcsujiLnRkODpi3Dsfr5oxxhxe4Arobr9BM3oMS2Y=&emci=37970412-a8df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c06e3fd3-b3df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

Already, our elections have been exposed to digital – and other – attacks from foreign actors, including the Chinese Communist Party and Russia. These foreign governments and companies are using every tool at their disposal to try and undermine America's democracy.

The Honest Ads Act would close the loopholes and update campaign advertising regulations to prevent these attacks. It would ensure online political advertisements meet the same disclaimer requirements as television, radio, and print advertisements, and it would increase transparency by making it clear to the American public who is funding online ads.

**[If you agree it's time for Congress to bring digital political advertising regulations into the 21st century, sign on now as a citizen co-sponsor of the bipartisan Honest Ads Act →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62068754/402211879/1276526800?ms=em23_230420_honads_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230420_honads_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230420_honads_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230420_honads_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=4RoP/MP7AwNaqoU487NA4bdVZRkoCx8W2S4dNvT7096VDsCD3J7LLgvnQhzeHNwey8SJx0pRZnjWoJnFoz7umVLk/Xt8wci7q4lgydlS6DaxP0EqSYqzl77YVluwrzVKZLT4ztV7ouVqJ+nnck4CMk555nkjnTOE7Ok1LlqZSKg=&refcode2=c06e3fd3-b3df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzA2ZTNmZDMtYjNkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pdwcsujiLnRkODpi3Dsfr5oxxhxe4Arobr9BM3oMS2Y=&emci=37970412-a8df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c06e3fd3-b3df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

If you agree, please add your name to call on Washington to federally legalize →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62070417/402219921/-165828944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTg2OTc2YmEtYjhkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0TTeFTtdKGQZJ_4QSEOFt-g3rzX6eMhVbKkKDD0BKE8=&emci=fab3b0d5-77df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=986976ba-b8df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376)[ _****_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62070418/402219922/-2054837422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTg2OTc2YmEtYjhkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0TTeFTtdKGQZJ_4QSEOFt-g3rzX6eMhVbKkKDD0BKE8=&emci=fab3b0d5-77df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=986976ba-b8df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376) [LEGALIZE IT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62070419/402219923/-165828944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTg2OTc2YmEtYjhkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0TTeFTtdKGQZJ_4QSEOFt-g3rzX6eMhVbKkKDD0BKE8=&emci=fab3b0d5-77df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=986976ba-b8df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376)
* * *
As a Mayor on the front lines of legalization in New Jersey, I’ve seen firsthand the positive effects of a safe, legal, and regulated cannabis market. From social equity programs to giving small town main streets new business life, it’s time for the federal government to follow the lead of dozens of states and unlock opportunity and justice across the country. We have a unique opportunity to shape cannabis legalization to benefit people, not profits. Right now, companies like Phillip Morris and Anheuser-Bush are spending millions to lobby to shape the cannabis legalization landscape – making it a pay-to-play, equity-free system that so many will be left out of. As your next Senator, I’ll work with my colleagues to prioritize cannabis legalization – from getting a bill on the floor of the Senate to putting pressure on President Biden to implement this popular proposal, which will:
* Immediate cannabis legalization and the expunging and pardoning of all who are or have been incarcerated for cannabis offenses.
* Tax and regulate cannabis in a way that puts small businesses and communities affected by the War on Drugs first – to ensure huge corporations can’t create monopolies.
* Use tax proceeds from cannabis sales to fund social programs and repair communities destroyed by the War on Drugs.

[_**Peter, if you support federally legalizing cannabis to restore justice to millions harmed by our country’s violent intolerance of drugs and to unlock economic potential across the country – add your name to our citizen petition now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62070420/402219924/-165828944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTg2OTc2YmEtYjhkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0TTeFTtdKGQZJ_4QSEOFt-g3rzX6eMhVbKkKDD0BKE8=&emci=fab3b0d5-77df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=986976ba-b8df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376) [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62070421/402219926/-165828944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTg2OTc2YmEtYjhkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0TTeFTtdKGQZJ_4QSEOFt-g3rzX6eMhVbKkKDD0BKE8=&emci=fab3b0d5-77df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=986976ba-b8df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376) Thanks, **— Mayor Joe Signorello** _Candidate for U.S. Senate, New Jersey_ _Mayor of Roselle Park_ |
* * *
_I'm Joe Signorello. I’m the Mayor of Roselle Park, New Jersey, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in 2024. Bob Menendez is an embarrassment to the people of the state of New Jersey, but for the last couple of years, we’ve had no other option – nobody’s been willing to step up to him. **I'm ready to get to work!**_ _Once we leave the corrupt politics of the past behind, we can move forward with progress and have a smart, efficient government with the ability to make positive change for everyone.**I need your support to build our grassroots movement — [so please chip in what you can right now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62070422/402219927/244492595?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTg2OTc2YmEtYjhkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0TTeFTtdKGQZJ_4QSEOFt-g3rzX6eMhVbKkKDD0BKE8=)**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62070423/402219928/244492595?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTg2OTc2YmEtYjhkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0TTeFTtdKGQZJ_4QSEOFt-g3rzX6eMhVbKkKDD0BKE8=) Our email list is an important tool for us to reach Democrats and activists in New Jersey and around the country. If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, please use [this link to unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/qsataXLFGEWcjxevshYDeA2?unsubscribedata=YQzOYSpb94z3WJg%2FK9QDwaIx3IZUuVQ0u%2BP7ZCvtvII76SMesy%2FSdRgWl3k1z0cng5diaGBjcnefHo7pXDERoSz%2FSeqleedZe5xZfIaYL34BclwGMAEL45yno84TjHF1U5YS7iE%2FMLUxJUbTY2%2FqvoTTQHMBU1rotb2pPlffLlkGO%2F1bV%2BNTKFfmzxMNt5LcJj1vlPzLUuNd0TvK%2BJCGUYzytEePyyvyWYWFYcFzQzpupaMqHMD5D4%2FU1R0L3m%2BUOn6QKyk69F80rtT4N%2BrzFP7NaD5LPgoJmH3lO3ebHmCs6t8pXw1SwUZOvXpYWLcZyd4d2%2BaJQa4ty5vyceuGmJgKrCqzbnKtFDMuOIxyq%2BKII40Zz0OEAstiz6DBm9U4o%2FYDptNI3rS9Mk%2BQffcXw4j1Eh%2ByQC%2BzE2TsgVXvR6FZ2MBQ8DwKqS0JhzyRIefE) Paid for by Signorello for Senate

clean_body: GOP governors need to go | | | Hi Peter – We’ll keep this brief. Republican governors have been failing at their jobs left and right. It only takes a quick news scan to show countless instances of Republicans prioritizing their own political gains and right-wing agendas over the needs of the American people. URD has a simple mission: prevent headlines like these from ever existing. We’re doing this by electing Democrats who believe in protecting the rights of all Americans. We’re organizing people from across the country to join us. And we’re prioritizing the needs of rural voters, who are too often left out of the political process—and the news spotlight. Thank you for your support, Peter. – United Rural Democrats HQ United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Katie Porter
subject: Oversight for our National Parks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Our National Parks have so much to offer, and Congress has the duty to oversee them.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21550%2E3422442%2E4MKaD8)
I LOVE our National Parks, and this year’s National Park Week kicks off on April 22nd. To celebrate, entrance fees to National Parks are being waived this Saturday, 4/22.
My family enjoys exploring parks in every part of the country, from nearby Joshua Tree here in California to White Sands in New Mexico.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em-national-parks/?source=EMAG20_2_PAR_20230420_V1_F&t=2&akid=21550%2E3422442%2E4MKaD8)
Our government has the duty to oversee our National Parks, so our recent family trips have been mixed with some policy conversations. In Congress. **I’ve pushed leaders to make our parks more accessible to people with disabilities, and lead the fight to fully fund the Every Kid Outdoors program, which grants fourth graders and their families free access to National Parks.**
Our National Parks provide so many benefits—from supporting local economies, to providing affordable family vacations, to preserving our environment.
That’s why I’m passionate about my work on the Federal Lands & National Park Subcommittee, and I’d love to hear your thoughts or ideas for our National Parks. [**You can submit them here!**](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em-national-parks/?source=EMAG20_2_PAR_20230420_V1_F&t=3&akid=21550%2E3422442%2E4MKaD8)
As the weather gets warmer, I hope you’re able to get outside and enjoy one of our National Parks.
Happy exploring!
Katie
**Katie is running for the Senate to stand up to special interests and clean up corruption. That means we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Big Bank CEOs.**[Can you chip in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230420-2?refcode=EMAG20_2_PAR_20230420_V1_F&refcode2=21550_3422442_4MKaD8&akid=21550%2E3422442%2E4MKaD8)****
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=4&akid=21550%2E3422442%2E4MKaD8)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=21550%2E3422442%2E4MKaD8)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

body:
Our team needs to register as many voters as possible by May 1.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62070967/402221670/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230420VoterRegrs_N_TEAM_FULL_3_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMWM1ZWM4LWJiZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UaYDMDN2dNEruAW9A0VdXW0hBrzWEwgMuznBWyFT1cE=)
| Fellow activist,

May 1, the deadline to register voters ahead of the May 16 primary election, is getting closer and closer. While we have been out on the ground across the Commonwealth since January registering voters in our centered communities, we need to expand our efforts and pack even more community events and canvasses into these next 11 days. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62070968/402221671/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230420VoterRegrs_N_TEAM_FULL_3_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMWM1ZWM4LWJiZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UaYDMDN2dNEruAW9A0VdXW0hBrzWEwgMuznBWyFT1cE=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62070969/402221672/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230420VoterRegrs_N_TEAM_FULL_3_G_N_G2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMWM1ZWM4LWJiZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UaYDMDN2dNEruAW9A0VdXW0hBrzWEwgMuznBWyFT1cE=)

Community events and voter registration drives like these are vital to our community outreach – and they’re one of the main ways we turn your donations directly into voter outreach, engagement, and registration. Just last week, our Regional Organizing Director from Philadelphia, Carrie Fowler, registered 14 high school seniors who will be eligible to vote in the May 16 primary election! **[With the voter registration deadline right around the corner, we can’t wait until the end of the month to hit our fundraising goals – we need to start nearing our $4,000 end-of-month goal ASAP. Can you pitch in $10 by midnight tonight to help us stay on track and organize more voter registration and community events?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62070970/402221673/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230420VoterRegrs_N_TEAM_FULL_3_G_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMWM1ZWM4LWJiZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UaYDMDN2dNEruAW9A0VdXW0hBrzWEwgMuznBWyFT1cE=)** [DONATE NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62070971/402221674/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230420VoterRegrs_N_TEAM_FULL_3_G_N_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMWM1ZWM4LWJiZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UaYDMDN2dNEruAW9A0VdXW0hBrzWEwgMuznBWyFT1cE=) We know and have witnessed the ways in which underrepresented and often neglected young, immigrant, Black, Indigenous, and other communities of color have been denied the fundamental right to vote. Events like these are crucial to overcoming those obstacles and tapping into the core of our communities. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62070972/402221675/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230420VoterRegrs_N_TEAM_FULL_3_G_N_G3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMWM1ZWM4LWJiZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UaYDMDN2dNEruAW9A0VdXW0hBrzWEwgMuznBWyFT1cE=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62070973/402221676/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230420VoterRegrs_N_TEAM_FULL_3_G_N_G4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMWM1ZWM4LWJiZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UaYDMDN2dNEruAW9A0VdXW0hBrzWEwgMuznBWyFT1cE=) **[With even more attacks on our democracy and our voting rights coming soon in the upcoming PA Supreme Court and local election board elections, our work is as vital as ever. clean_body: Our team needs to register as many voters as possible by May 1. = | Fellow activist, May 1, the deadline to register voters ahead of the May 16 primary election, is getting closer and closer. While we have been out on the ground across the Commonwealth since January registering voters in our centered communities, we need to expand our efforts and pack even more community events and canvasses into these next 11 days. = = Community events and voter registration drives like these are vital to our community outreach – and they’re one of the main ways we turn your donations directly into voter outreach, engagement, and registration. Just last week, our Regional Organizing Director from Philadelphia, Carrie Fowler, registered 14 high school seniors who will be eligible to vote in the May 16 primary election! = = We know and have witnessed the ways in which underrepresented and often neglected young, immigrant, Black, Indigenous, and other communities of color have been denied the fundamental right to vote. Events like these are crucial to overcoming those obstacles and tapping into the core of our communities. = = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. body:
Earth Day is not only a celebration of our planet, but a reminder to protect it from the fossil fuel industry’s relentless attacks.

| We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this important message from Jane.

Earth Day is not only a celebration of our planet, but a reminder to protect it from the fossil fuel industry’s relentless attacks.

[_**Will you contribute $10 right away to help us reach our $5,000 Earth Day fundraising goal?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62071055/402221845/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230420-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5NTJhMjFjLWJjZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mV5bDUXlSKSMdilVD3RAJMrX6xi15FBtREoNgkBMkaU=)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62071057/402221847/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230420-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5NTJhMjFjLWJjZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mV5bDUXlSKSMdilVD3RAJMrX6xi15FBtREoNgkBMkaU=)
Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. **Earth Day** is this week, and I’m so grateful to call this beautiful planet my home!

Our planet consists of astonishing sights – from the picturesque mountains to the calming oceans. _**But decades of abuse and exploitation of our natural resources by the fossil fuel industry now poses a grave threat to these natural wonders.**_

We have a long road ahead of us in the fight to undo this damage, _**but there is hope.**_

I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to eliminate the fossil fuel industry’s stranglehold on our political system and elect climate champions at every level of government who will work to end the era of fossil fuels.

Each day, the movement to stop the climate crisis grows, and together, I believe we will end the reign of the fossil fuel industry. clean_body: Earth Day is not only a celebration of our planet, but a reminder to protect it from the fossil fuel industry’s relentless attacks. | We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this important message from Jane. Earth Day is not only a celebration of our planet, but a reminder to protect it from the fossil fuel industry’s relentless attacks. = | = Read more from Jane here: = Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. Earth Day is this week, and I’m so grateful to call this beautiful planet my home! Our planet consists of astonishing sights – from the picturesque mountains to the calming oceans. But decades of abuse and exploitation of our natural resources by the fossil fuel industry now poses a grave threat to these natural wonders. We have a long road ahead of us in the fight to undo this damage, but there is hope. I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to eliminate the fossil fuel industry’s stranglehold on our political system and elect climate champions at every level of government who will work to end the era of fossil fuels. Each day, the movement to stop the climate crisis grows, and together, I believe we will end the reign of the fossil fuel industry. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Every dollar you invest has an immediate impact in our fight against the fossil fuel industry. As we gear up to celebrate Earth Day, it is important to recognize the crucial work that needs to be done. And we cannot do it without your support. = | = Let’s fight like hell for our planet, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. | | We have to stop this GOP plan: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62071175/402222310/541775293?sourceid=1048945&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTdkYzMzNy1iY2RmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oP_lAIuuFGXmeMdNTDbX3s9eVhBaOe5GQyXN-TLXG7U=&emci=442c60b1-93df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1a7dc337-bcdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) This is a nightmare scenario, Peter:

**FIRST:** Republicans spent DECADES systematically taking control of 28 state legislatures across the country.

**THEN:** They began planning to hold a _constitutional convention_ to rewrite the U.S. Constitution and ban abortion outright — something they can do once they control 34 state legislatures.

**NOW:** National Republicans are prepared to do and spend whatever it takes to make this happen. They only need to flip six more state legislatures, and then they could **rewrite our constitution**.

**[**Please don't let the GOP get their hands on our Constitution. Donate now to help elect Democratic pro-choice women and STOP this GOP scheme to ban abortion nationwide.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62071185/402222321/541775293?sourceid=1048945&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTdkYzMzNy1iY2RmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oP_lAIuuFGXmeMdNTDbX3s9eVhBaOe5GQyXN-TLXG7U=&emci=442c60b1-93df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1a7dc337-bcdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) If Republicans succeed, the consequences for women, families, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and so many others could be catastrophic. And that's exactly why we have to step up this cycle, Peter — not just for the big-ticket races, but also for our fearless candidates who can stop this anti-choice power grab at the state and local levels.

We've already made incredible progress on this front: in last year's midterms, we flipped _four_ state chambers from red to blue and secured _two_ new Democratic trifectas, controlling the state House, Senate, and governorship. We can repeat this success in 2024 if we make early investments in key races _now_. ****The stakes couldn't be higher. Donate now to help Democratic pro-choice women protect and FLIP state legislatures across the country:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Women-Win-April23](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62071186/402222322/541775293?sourceid=1048945&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTdkYzMzNy1iY2RmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oP_lAIuuFGXmeMdNTDbX3s9eVhBaOe5GQyXN-TLXG7U=&emci=442c60b1-93df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1a7dc337-bcdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers)

Here’s a look at what we’ve accomplished together.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62071262/402222574/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230420First100Days_N_SB_90DO_8_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTdhNWQ3Yy1iY2RmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XKbdCQSl4GxkRku5b85-psAtJZJABtfRUt4GPtHZE0E=) Peter, we’re celebrating **100 days of the 118th Congress** , and I couldn’t be more proud of the accomplishments Democrats made.

* Reached the lowest unemployment level in over 50 years at 3.4% and a record-low unemployment rate for African Americans.

While the GOP is busy **_dismantling our rights through the courts and playing partisan games to stifle progress,_** Democrats in Congress are fighting back.

While the first 100 days of the 118th Congress have been groundbreaking, we must continue to push to:
* Enshrine reproductive rights in federal law through the Women’s Health Protection Act.
* Pass common-sense gun violence prevention measures to end the massacre of our people that we now see daily.
* Create meaningful police reform through community-based solutions to police violence to ensure our communities are properly protected and served.

Delivering equality and justice is a tall order, but President Biden and Democrats in Congress are fighting for it every day. To overcome the GOP’s attempts to wind back the clock and reverse our progress, we need your help.

[**_Will you contribute $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help Democrats in Congress continue to deliver the progress our people deserve? Together, I know we can do this._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62071270/402222582/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230420First100Days_N_SB_90DO_8_NG_TESTA_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTdhNWQ3Yy1iY2RmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XKbdCQSl4GxkRku5b85-psAtJZJABtfRUt4GPtHZE0E=)
