disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Protect this Indigenous sacred site: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvVdNQ3nngPm4VgRMEOG6tYYO0zmPmgWvNwemgtmWO9gwALo3gibeBbJ-WpjYQlNgHKfnPf38ZkyUtp4C8ODHfk2KJZgZsJIeAWLl09_myiATEl1JZeLqKCJHD-BRuQGuUvnF_24hwD1zw4ZRZhvYeUWZlfcRHGMI7USiij2n-p9xxYHwrToWmLtNDxNzWyOg3gtUL4S6kEmhrRkIIjzGsqQ5F1h0KevArKh0EryiF5J8oRQGuY20BbZfvXRQgQ6hGTrFhmW56UgFJf-MXEfpUJy5OT0Qwc7YZUMUOd6MAqYJ1sNn0m7_bu_aYFAwQIYs6/3vi/3obsauLVRla6-E6fVOlgxQ/h0/g7ZGHXcgkQVmiF0z-oxNS306qkB3d0qiwYZKPv7EELg)
---
Friend, The Biden administration will be deciding soon whether to follow-through with a Trump-era fast-tracked mining project on Native land, known as Oak Flat in Arizona's Tonto National Forest. In the late 1800s, Indigenous peoples were forcibly removed from Oak Flat at gunpoint by the U.S. Calvary and made prisoners of war for decades, but their connection to Oak Flat has never lapsed. **Native people still hold ceremonies at Oak Flat, pray, and connect with the Earth there.** **When U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Tom Vilsack publishes a Final Environmental Impact Statement, this sacred land will be handed over to Rio Tinto Resolution Copper Mining** , a UK-Australian mining company notorious for polluting Papua New Guinea, causing an environmental disaster in Brazil that left 19 dead, and blowing up Juukan Gorge, a historically significant 46,000-year-old Aboriginal site. Arizona tribes are overwhelmingly opposed to the disastrous mining project and have not been consulted by the federal government. **San Carlos Apache Tribe Chairman Terry Rambler** said, _“This is a serious breach of trust not only with the San Carlos Apache Tribe but with all Native American communities across the country.”_ [**Sign now to demand Secretary of Agriculture Tom Vilsack withhold the Final Environmental Impact Statement and protect Oak Flat for generations to come.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_Q4jOvoS3Ijy3N_Cuv5RSzeBwvneseq4s4J7CbP38fIioIwUJ1OISiv5JiLFroRtpsEdTAEeQC459_xZwTRiHGIaNgsUoWOJF3PUqdCjxBz-vYOARK7EgBpQZZFNXqzZWXwkpSn3jbcmpZfgbDt7Gi_HSGwhU0KiD2vE9vQfyICtQNK2rNLczzUlumX6qy_DFlCLEPXegkLBODG1epVKzDX_pj5S6zjYN6mqMHLv0EveUkoj5sYOrPXfKytDuH8bQXGOleMvRrcDwtKk1wVyf8R8L14JpIIpiVxFx868ws0MXnz25KeyEYqGRD4f_wSXIgaZJgf26Eg3YnjsZU3c2oxnjBrJxcNDkrnu4Cu__6mIeKiN2-EkwH1zlGQny4_g1wwXLGyWgTyJgGJC72G7TpSXAq9kBSutZpuOcCOZAXcizm9wGJk5wzDJKHZE_AbsmDGLb-m0kORpKdWvzKNdr07toDNoMDrMNtObUNiMzQpS7faLDrMWbls67eWXuipN9HsCcHzgXDyHfNLRhkIHHvHg/3vi/3obsauLVRla6-E6fVOlgxQ/h1/Ov4Ie_vzQHPd41vEI6GQkfa9hI8x6STLzn08JdeuhQI) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_Q4jOvoS3Ijy3N_Cuv5RSzeBwvneseq4s4J7CbP38fIioIwUJ1OISiv5JiLFroRtpsEdTAEeQC459_xZwTRiHGIaNgsUoWOJF3PUqdCjxBz-vYOARK7EgBpQZZFNXqzZWXwkpSn3jbcmpZfgbDt7Gi_HSGwhU0KiD2vE9vQfyICtQNK2rNLczzUlumX6qy_DFlCLEPXegkLBODG1epVKzDX_pj5S6zjYN6mqMHLv0EveUnmixk5x1ssOmgd8c-Qh4SyQfuJSN39_YaJOrcUKUtOzdts5MGINvbY-XC_yX5ng-Ogtf7wWwXWA8Qv1ZcnWd7KLtlRVypSLKi_AdcJP_eMNoPvkPwXqDcGFrRUDkzi66EkT1XG4AtAnMBO4ZL69Rdq_pYp6qpClALL5_fV-OTAqlYN7nlc_O8MlY-Uk2Qi7d5eL6YbUaVtK6gBMbGz9SXq_voGGX8zxw2LoBocS1vlwvlCkZ_l2UgIRKLt8gm4ebj55wCLN1-ZlDO_8YwwR9vu0PvTfmUFNdbbY-rpe-isQ/3vi/3obsauLVRla6-E6fVOlgxQ/h2/j8hkUjv9gbv4TtXRtKAiSm7Oblf-m4vYb6230LHsfJE)

clean_body: Protect this Indigenous sacred site: | | | Friend, The Biden administration will be deciding soon whether to follow-through with a Trump-era fast-tracked mining project on Native land, known as Oak Flat in Arizona's Tonto National Forest. In the late 1800s, Indigenous peoples were forcibly removed from Oak Flat at gunpoint by the U.S. Calvary and made prisoners of war for decades, but their connection to Oak Flat has never lapsed. Native people still hold ceremonies at Oak Flat, pray, and connect with the Earth there. When U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Tom Vilsack publishes a Final Environmental Impact Statement, this sacred land will be handed over to Rio Tinto Resolution Copper Mining , a UK-Australian mining company notorious for polluting Papua New Guinea, causing an environmental disaster in Brazil that left 19 dead, and blowing up Juukan Gorge, a historically significant 46,000-year-old Aboriginal site. Arizona tribes are overwhelmingly opposed to the disastrous mining project and have not been consulted by the federal government. San Carlos Apache Tribe Chairman Terry Rambler said, “This is a serious breach of trust not only with the San Carlos Apache Tribe but with all Native American communities across the country.” | If it proceeds, this mining operation will completely destroy a high desert oasis considered sacred by multiple Indigenous tribes. But this deal is not done, yet! Thank you for defending this cherished space for generations to come. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We don’t have to live like this. Fight back for our planet with EARLY ACCESS to our Earth Day match!
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | | | | | | | [DOUBLE YOUR GIFT FOR THE NEXT 52 HOURS ONLY](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1731599?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, I had to personally reach out to you early, ahead of the Earth Day rush Saturday, and share this important update on our planet-saving work.
No matter what greedy corporations say, or how many millions of dollars they spend on PR and misinformation campaigns, Friends of the Earth is committed to fighting back. **Corporate pollution is a choice, and we CAN hold companies accountable for that choice. **
**Right now, mega-manufacturing plants are pumping out single-use plastics that end up in our oceans to the tune of two huge garbage trucks per minute. Corporations are aggressively working to expand mining, logging and drilling operations on our public lands. The resulting habitat loss threatens the survival of endangered species – who are now in more danger than EVER. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is worsening from out-of-control fossil fuel greed. **
**The fact is this: We don't have to live like this, and our only Earth doesn't have to die like this.** We have the power to stop catastrophic outcomes for our planet and all its inhabitants if we fight back together now. And what more powerful moment than Earth Day to take action?
**That’s why this is such heartening news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day up to our goal of $180,000 but only until midnight Saturday. Because you've been such a committed supporter, we created a custom match link you can use to be the first to DOUBLE your Earth Day impact. So please hurry and make your gift for our planet now! Here’s your personal link: **
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1731599?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This goal means so much to our organization and the planet – and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early-bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators and stop the climate crisis before it’s too late.
**Matches like this don’t come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. **That’s why we must seize this opportunity for our planet, friend. With all our futures on the line, getting complacent or giving in to despair is simply not an option. So we’re counting on committed environmentalists like you to set the pace for the rest of our community.
**With time running out, we need to make this Earth Day really count. Please, make your membership gift and be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our planet while we still can. Your personalized Earth Day match access link is right here – donate now to have every dollar doubled:**
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1731599?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you,

Erich Pica
President
Friends of the Earth
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](https://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

subject: Standing with Dreamers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
For millions of Dreamers, the United States is the only home they've ever known.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62071736/402224418/-1382951893?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230420-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmExYTM3Mi1iZWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CcrN4mOi3pb0gYh18VyAfMOY0Wdr7hlIdAT0z9kDOu4=)
---
| Peter,

Last week, President Biden announced his plan to expand health coverage for DACA recipients or Dreamers – the thousands of young people brought to the U.S. as children.

For millions of Dreamers, the United States is the only home they've ever known.

And they have made this country a better place every single day they've lived here.

I applaud President Biden for taking this necessary and long-overdue step. But this is only the beginning of a pathway to citizenship for the thousands of Dreamers in our state and across the country.

Amidst hostile Republican rhetoric towards immigrants, I will never stop fighting for access to healthcare and a pathway to citizenship for Dreamers.

Thanks for your support,

Linda
---

Teddy Daniels asked me onto his show to share my thoughts about the video. He was also excited about our movement to unseat Dan Crenshaw to Restore Liberty. Watch below. For Liberty, | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- • • Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Jameson Ellis, 206A S Loop 336 W #309, Conroe, TX 77304, United States

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Well done.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
My finance team just shared the news. Peter,

I am _so_ pleased to announce that this team of grassroots supporters went above and beyond in helping us put up solid numbers for the first reporting deadline of the year.

From the beginning, I was optimistic that we could put together a strong report and show my 12 Republican opponents the strength of this campaign. But you all exceeded my expectations, and I can't thank you enough.

This race is about the people of Kentucky — putting people ahead of politics and ensuring Kentuckians' voices are elevated and heard. Having the support of this people-powered campaign means everything, and it proves that we're doing the right things to support Kentucky families in every zip code across our Commonwealth.

I intend to keep making progress for our Commonwealth, and I'm grateful to have your support through this re-election campaign. Together, we can protect the progress we've made. Once again — thank you.

Sincerely,

Andy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62072607/402227991/-428057120?refcode=em23_230420_ty_enask_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230420_ty_enask_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0718057f-c2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzE4MDU3Zi1jMmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BaDFXqF7aqmbW8d3Zo5QPfLuxreRZOlM8F7fxcy8ZuU=)

Peter, we fought hard to elect Black progressive champion Wes Moore as the first Black governor of Maryland, and **it’s already paying off.**

Gov. Moore is **stockpiling two and a half years’ worth of mifepristone in an attempt to protect abortion access for Maryland residents** following a federal judge’s decision to halt its FDA approval. He also signed critical pieces of legislation like the **Fair Wage Act** and **Family Prosperity Act** in the first official bill signing of his administration.

[One thing is clear, Peter: When our candidates win, AMERICA WINS. body:
For competitive races like ours, we have to defend against intense outside pressure and investment.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62072736/402228501/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230420-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2UzMDRlNTYtYzNkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n05F6tCI1olsAUFekag1OmAof_DralN-5EfrKazXP6o=)

| Peter,

I know you’ve received a lot of messages from my campaign team recently about how important our early campaign work is to winning another election. _**I wanted to reach out personally to put that sentiment in context.**_

For competitive races like ours, we have to defend against intense outside pressure and investment. National Republican groups want to flip VA-07 **red** badly, and they’re willing to pour millions into our district to do it.

Their investment leads to countless attack ads online, on TV, and on billboards. They’ll mobilize their field forces to campaign against me and the good work I’ve done in Congress. And they’ll recruit prominent national figures – just like Ted Cruz last cycle – to visit Virginia to support my eventual opponent.

All this means we have a challenging road ahead, but one that I know will again lead to victory because of the community we have behind this campaign. _**So, why does early investment matter?**_

It allows us to scale up our campaign team early and build a strong foundation for success. We can purchase campaign materials like yard signs and literature to get the word out about my candidacy, and we can defend my track record and stand up to Republican attack ads.

This network is the life force of our campaign, [_**and I’m counting on your support in the 2024 cycle and beyond. Will you please make a difference for our campaign by making a contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62072737/402228502/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230420-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2UzMDRlNTYtYzNkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n05F6tCI1olsAUFekag1OmAof_DralN-5EfrKazXP6o=)

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Fentanyl, cocaine, heroin, and gray death
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Mexican drug cartels are recruiting Americans on Craigslist to drive illegal migrants from the border to major U.S. cities to receive accommodation and fake papers.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=aad4a0bc67ad4d139f9db89663b3018c&_t=9P1hiYb9yk8tWMqrK4CumrtGh1MXiA_CdpsrR3hOaLJiMlgNFQRJb8r6PQIim-Na7isbGX_ISg4qZg4iRvUFZxo-U1K0q6CNdQfqTpGv-Ks%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=aad4a0bc67ad4d139f9db89663b3018c&_t=9P1hiYb9yk8tWMqrK4CumrtGh1MXiA_CdpsrR3hOaLJiMlgNFQRJb8r6PQIim-Na7isbGX_ISg4qZg4iRvUFZxo-U1K0q6CNdQfqTpGv-Ks%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aad4a0bc67ad4d139f9db89663b3018c&_e=FJt2-sBk-4B6_3ehPXT0cleMcsTTaIvLwgT6pam9e8Aw9NSZhg8j8Fq6cu6w4AvFkYL2TwFU7M6OifvCbgP9HSmf8qk__05e55L5CDvRkq_QNDwRaYM3HpzpK2fx4RXwD7i64fQWi6BAgSBUssdN2bXlbTIxomqtjlILyhwlydJxWrFGg-L1UyteVTxC4GSucwaoaxHsq2wjjrEeZqGdb1D6Qc5K7FbPSBeWBuUJVMuPLsZ1QPtOEToAY2bO_tYNyB37jzL3OzTvI9etVSYUquYBjd1WTrmnkpKUTVSwU78AupwJjUwCDkR5__PFHwgAe7UpxqMuSjLC2XeOyeKR9o5t5jl2c8Z4OoyUINJAdMzM24RqwtG_RiZwalhQ3pEeyo4QKlGl_TtId7N1dm-u-YPDNoTGP3-3usaoo1etMK-9zvFyLd_tsaVQU4TXrV6OoJuqIuHajRB2HcNUGJ1_iJ_NbN67EuX4_8-aZD6XjfvqvNFnZx1iXinuHqtfcckGRCOKiiDWHC7k0RU2-ODGNnbdy1rc2tmFC9JUaD6MIC4%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

When COVID-19 hit the United States, government officials around the country collectively decided that instead of following the science, they would mimic the mitigation efforts of the Communist Party of China and lock everyone down. When the then-governor of Arizona issued a stay-at-home lockdown order in March 2020, **I declined to enforce it in Pinal County due to its unconstitutional nature.**

**I not only stand by my decision, but I would also make the same call again under similar circumstances.**

Law enforcement officials in the United States should never again be faced with making the decision I had to make in the spring of 2020. As American citizens, having the freedom to choose where we go and when we do it is nearly as important as freedom of speech. While Republican governors did a quick about-face, Democrat-controlled states would still be locked down if not for the public outrage that forced their hands.

**In 2023, the only lockdown that I support is of our southern border with Mexico**.
[**STAND WITH SHERIFF MARK LAMB
SECURE THE BORDER-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aad4a0bc67ad4d139f9db89663b3018c&_e=FJt2-sBk-4B6_3ehPXT0cleMcsTTaIvLwgT6pam9e8Aw9NSZhg8j8Fq6cu6w4AvFkYL2TwFU7M6OifvCbgP9HSmf8qk__05e55L5CDvRkq_QNDwRaYM3HpzpK2fx4RXwD7i64fQWi6BAgSBUssdN2bXlbTIxomqtjlILyhwlydJxWrFGg-L1UyteVTxC4GSucwaoaxHsq2wjjrEeZqGdb1D6Qc5K7FbPSBeWBuUJVMuPLsZ1QPtOEToAY2bO_tYNyB37jzL3OzTvI9etVSYUquYBjd1WTrmnkpKUTVSwU78AupwJjUwCDkR5__PFHwgAe7UpxqMuSjLC2XeOyeKR9o5t5jl2c8Z4OoyUINJAdMzM24RqwtG_RiZwalhQ3pEeyo4QKlGl_TtId7N1dm-u-SbyANBZQEoPAaX4FdHVG_983UX3C744evUNT35qOu-05bNsEYO0pv7mXcycv7fiYYhGsy7Zi2YZri-uYdYGgFNW55WChhLZ1GGTCsruG73ZG6X3zdNcSkkkJ3INYuI_xOitv4icXv1YfRsprlrXgt8%3D)
Democrats love to talk about the COVID-19 death toll, but when have you ever heard them talking about the death toll resulting from cartel-imported fentanyl? Or the number of arrests we’ve made of members on the United States terrorist watchlist?

**There have been 1,029,953 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944!**

**[Do you support a general lockdown of the southern border? Let me know.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aad4a0bc67ad4d139f9db89663b3018c&_e=FJt2-sBk-4B6_3ehPXT0cleMcsTTaIvLwgT6pam9e8Aw9NSZhg8j8Fq6cu6w4AvFkYL2TwFU7M6OifvCbgP9HSmf8qk__05e55L5CDvRkq_QNDwRaYM3HpzpK2fx4RXwD7i64fQWi6BAgSBUssdN2bXlbTIxomqtjlILyhwlydJxWrFGg-L1UyteVTxC4GSucwaoaxHsq2wjjrEeZqGdb1D6Qc5K7FbPSBeWBuUJVMuPLsZ1QPtOEToAY2bO_tYNyB37jzL3OzTvI9etVSYUquYBjd1WTrmnkpKUTVSwU78AupwJjUwCDkR5__PFHwgAe7UpxqMuSjLC2XeOyeKR9o5t5jl2c8Z4OoyUINJAdMzM24RqwtG_RiZwalhQ3pEeyo4QKlGl_TtId7N1dm-u-WG24LMLk4VzaqfZtuLPOHsB1Bfnxy0a5XJA6g1n1kz9V8BWdf4nIc9SZ2pT-dt1tkdWQb5yh_CFbAsCnLtYzLjTmWHrgLV6x_MnOIxcavH6AB28hS1fR3csNNpkHPyUfe3ulCG6bQgkvCxUgzgqy1g%3D)** As an Arizona Sheriff, I’ve seen the good, the bad, and the ugly. Right now, I’m truly not sure how much more hideous things in our neck of the woods can get.

[**STAND WITH SHERIFF MARK LAMB
SECURE THE BORDER-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aad4a0bc67ad4d139f9db89663b3018c&_e=FJt2-sBk-4B6_3ehPXT0cleMcsTTaIvLwgT6pam9e8Aw9NSZhg8j8Fq6cu6w4AvFkYL2TwFU7M6OifvCbgP9HSmf8qk__05e55L5CDvRkq_QNDwRaYM3HpzpK2fx4RXwD7i64fQWi6BAgSBUssdN2bXlbTIxomqtjlILyhwlydJxWrFGg-L1UyteVTxC4GSucwaoaxHsq2wjjrEeZqGdb1D6Qc5K7FbPSBeWBuUJVMuPLsZ1QPtOEToAY2bO_tYNyB37jzL3OzTvI9etVSYUquYBjd1WTrmnkpKUTVSwU78AupwJjUwCDkR5__PFHwgAe7UpxqMuSjLC2XeOyeKR9o5t5jl2c8Z4OoyUINJAdMzM24RqwtG_RiZwalhQ3pEeyo4QKlGl_TtId7N1dm-u-at2esTdczp3_GMpr6PEiheEJ33La4XbwCE-u5JsKn18ItfaZCi1fCwcYto4rGoSfsgjNQnTArbRlFJPJcOfjo0b7Cm3kXMU553DwXSVzgQnz2AvJZQ-8oMX-vZjbzIeEsCG1mDq-7s0AXRBaGpL-Ms%3D)
Under President Biden, conditions along the southern border have gone from bad to WORSE. Trust me, I would know. **As Sheriff of the 3rd most populous country in Arizona – and home of the main artery between the border and Phoenix,** my deputies and I deal with illegal migrants and drug smugglers every single day.

When President Biden took office, we lost all lines of communication with law enforcement officials in Washington. It’s almost like they ... want open borders.

Under President Biden, we have seen:
* A 377% increase in traffic stops involving human smuggling
* A 451% increase in pursuits involving human smuggling,
* A 610% increase in fentanyl pill seizures

So much work must be done to quell the unrest at the border. While I’m more than up for the job, **I’m running for the United States Senate because Americans need a federal official who understands how to secure the border properly, not one who jumps into action only when an election is on the horizon.**

[**STAND WITH SHERIFF MARK LAMB
SECURE THE BORDER-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aad4a0bc67ad4d139f9db89663b3018c&_e=FJt2-sBk-4B6_3ehPXT0cleMcsTTaIvLwgT6pam9e8Aw9NSZhg8j8Fq6cu6w4AvFkYL2TwFU7M6OifvCbgP9HSmf8qk__05e55L5CDvRkq_QNDwRaYM3HpzpK2fx4RXwD7i64fQWi6BAgSBUssdN2bXlbTIxomqtjlILyhwlydJxWrFGg-L1UyteVTxC4GSucwaoaxHsq2wjjrEeZqGdb1D6Qc5K7FbPSBeWBuUJVMuPLsZ1QPtOEToAY2bO_tYNyB37jzL3OzTvI9etVSYUquYBjd1WTrmnkpKUTVSwU78AupwJjUwCDkR5__PFHwgAe7UpxqMuSjLC2XeOyeKR9o5t5jl2c8Z4OoyUINJAdMzM24RqwtG_RiZwalhQ3pEeyo4QKlGl_TtId7N1dm-u-So1mUVfzQ_vY3QgB1uhJp7jREYkr8DQ2ztE7JaZDnH_KlAMyEjQo8ixkCnncqm2Y6AT_zytdT92sLsDOypObRq3mxUzxxpPZulpFLvJ7NfQqmyDsnpYiW1MMqOdvsigJEbga91ChaXQbM_YhUYUJbs%3D)
**I know choke points, the weak spots, and the cast of characters who put all of us in danger every day.** Getting the border crisis under control - it’s not rocket science. If you’re willing to hold people accountable and enforce the rule of law, you will see a reduction in crime.

Fellow Conservative, I’m running for the United States Senate to expose Joe Biden and his allies in the Democrat Party. Their inaction on border-related issues has resulted in the death of hundreds of thousands of Americans.

Democrats don’t want you to know that in border states like Arizona, New Mexico, and Texas, Mexican drug cartels are recruiting drivers off Craigslist to ferry illicit drugs and migrants from the border to large interior cities.

**If Democrats can’t even be trusted to monitor Craigslist for these types of postings, how can we ever trust them to get the border in check? **

As a sheriff, I’ve spent my career protecting people and keeping citizens safe—every man, woman, and child. But there’s no greater call than to protect the hearts and minds of our little children. Right now, Washington is not only putting future generations at risk with their reckless spending, but even more so in their failure to secure the southern border.

[**STAND WITH SHERIFF MARK LAMB
SECURE THE BORDER-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aad4a0bc67ad4d139f9db89663b3018c&_e=FJt2-sBk-4B6_3ehPXT0cleMcsTTaIvLwgT6pam9e8Aw9NSZhg8j8Fq6cu6w4AvFkYL2TwFU7M6OifvCbgP9HSmf8qk__05e55L5CDvRkq_QNDwRaYM3HpzpK2fx4RXwD7i64fQWi6BAgSBUssdN2bXlbTIxomqtjlILyhwlydJxWrFGg-L1UyteVTxC4GSucwaoaxHsq2wjjrEeZqGdb1D6Qc5K7FbPSBeWBuUJVMuPLsZ1QPtOEToAY2bO_tYNyB37jzL3OzTvI9etVSYUquYBjd1WTrmnkpKUTVSwU78AupwJjUwCDkR5__PFHwgAe7UpxqMuSjLC2XeOyeKR9o5t5jl2c8Z4OoyUINJAdMzM24RqwtG_RiZwalhQ3pEeyo4QKlGl_TtId7N1dm-u-Qnd5k1saDLiCBsM_OptNvPjMCehbFtdcDiZbLazeTvNaam3Xj-kYpfXdr1gFDcq7jIxvtpuyH_EPyyoQYyo04xZxnbpMb-YokhThllsj21MXX4W8TmYd4DCcSeowNRMZ_ngkhsbTUIb3eOhpQKY77w%3D)
Thank you,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aad4a0bc67ad4d139f9db89663b3018c&_e=FJt2-sBk-4B6_3ehPXT0cleMcsTTaIvLwgT6pam9e8Aw9NSZhg8j8Fq6cu6w4AvFkYL2TwFU7M6OifvCbgP9HSmf8qk__05e55L5CDvRkq_QNDwRaYM3HpzpK2fx4RXwD7i64fQWi6BAgSBUssdN2bXlbTIxomqtjlILyhwlydJxWrFGg-L1UyteVTxC4GSucwaoaxHsq2wjjrEeZqGdb1D6Qc5K7FbPSBeWBuUJVMuPLsZ1QPtOEToAY2bO_tYNyB37jzL3OzTvI9etVSYUquYBjd1WTrmnkpKUTVSwU78AupwJjUwCDkR5__PFHwgAe7UpxqMuSjLC2XeOyeKR9o5t5jl2c8Z4OoyUINJAdMzM24RqwtG_RiZwalhQ3pEeyo4QKlGl_TtId7N1dm-u-asQZmFc07h8RKsSalwaUKue38Xq1h_VJ2cxN2FebHOsHYfTTaEX9bpttBv631eMmK4bmr6RkNDWTeyITze9_MOOdXrmVK0g9LyOO33Hsc5w34kOIQwTVi9ZUlpDMUwETv5XU1qqKyJrphJBS3ifTRs%3D)
Sheriff Mark Lamb

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: Mexican drug cartels are recruiting Americans on Craigslist to drive illegal migrants from the border to major U.S. cities to receive accommodation and fake papers. | | Fellow Conservative, When COVID-19 hit the United States, government officials around the country collectively decided that instead of following the science, they would mimic the mitigation efforts of the Communist Party of China and lock everyone down. When the then-governor of Arizona issued a stay-at-home lockdown order in March 2020, I declined to enforce it in Pinal County due to its unconstitutional nature. I not only stand by my decision, but I would also make the same call again under similar circumstances. Law enforcement officials in the United States should never again be faced with making the decision I had to make in the spring of 2020. As American citizens, having the freedom to choose where we go and when we do it is nearly as important as freedom of speech. While Republican governors did a quick about-face, Democrat-controlled states would still be locked down if not for the public outrage that forced their hands. In 2023, the only lockdown that I support is of our southern border with Mexico. Democrats love to talk about the COVID-19 death toll, but when have you ever heard them talking about the death toll resulting from cartel-imported fentanyl? Or the number of arrests we’ve made of members on the United States terrorist watchlist? There have been 1,029,953 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944! As an Arizona Sheriff, I’ve seen the good, the bad, and the ugly. Right now, I’m truly not sure how much more hideous things in our neck of the woods can get. Under President Biden, conditions along the southern border have gone from bad to WORSE. Trust me, I would know. As Sheriff of the 3rd most populous country in Arizona – and home of the main artery between the border and Phoenix, my deputies and I deal with illegal migrants and drug smugglers every single day. When President Biden took office, we lost all lines of communication with law enforcement officials in Washington. It’s almost like they ... want open borders. Under President Biden, we have seen: A 377% increase in traffic stops involving human smuggling A 451% increase in pursuits involving human smuggling, A 610% increase in fentanyl pill seizures So much work must be done to quell the unrest at the border. While I’m more than up for the job, I’m running for the United States Senate because Americans need a federal official who understands how to secure the border properly, not one who jumps into action only when an election is on the horizon. I know choke points, the weak spots, and the cast of characters who put all of us in danger every day. Getting the border crisis under control - it’s not rocket science. If you’re willing to hold people accountable and enforce the rule of law, you will see a reduction in crime. Fellow Conservative, I’m running for the United States Senate to expose Joe Biden and his allies in the Democrat Party. Their inaction on border-related issues has resulted in the death of hundreds of thousands of Americans. Democrats don’t want you to know that in border states like Arizona, New Mexico, and Texas, Mexican drug cartels are recruiting drivers off Craigslist to ferry illicit drugs and migrants from the border to large interior cities. If Democrats can’t even be trusted to monitor Craigslist for these types of postings, how can we ever trust them to get the border in check? As a sheriff, I’ve spent my career protecting people and keeping citizens safe—every man, woman, and child. But there’s no greater call than to protect the hearts and minds of our little children. Right now, Washington is not only putting future generations at risk with their reckless spending, but even more so in their failure to secure the southern border. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Psst…are you celebrating? 🍃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Weed really like to know...
#
Today’s a special day, Derek...
**✨ 🍃 Happy 4/20 to all who celebrate! 🍃 ✨**
In honor of the special occasion, we’re bringing back a Team Fetterman classic: our **Official 4/20 Legal Weed quiz** to test your knowledge on some of the most important facts and figures about our fight to legalize the plant.
_So, Derek, let's see how high (of a score) you can get..._
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/weed-quiz-em-2023/?source=em20230420-1-8343&akid=8343%2E434096%2EBvd3CE)
**There's actually a *ton* to know about the ongoing fight for legal weed. A lot of myths to clear up, too. For example, did you know that:**
🔥 Legal weed will create tens of *thousands* of new jobs.
🔥 It'll be a BIG step forward toward racial justice.
🔥 It'll help farmers, veterans, and people suffering from chronic pain.
🔥 And it'll help us expunge more bogus marijuana convictions and give folks across our country a second chance.
John Fetterman understands that legal weed means more revenue, jobs, justice, and freedom. He sees how it will benefit our farmers, veterans, and small businesses. And that’s why John’s one of the loudest voices in the U.S. Senate fighting for legal weed nationwide.
**But he can’t do this alone.** So, in honor of today's big day, take a second to roll through our quiz + learn more about the fight for legal weed:
**[Let’s be blunt...we’ll be amazed if you can (puff, puff) pass our Legal Weed Quiz. Take the quiz now »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/weed-quiz-em-2023/?source=em20230420-1-8343&akid=8343%2E434096%2EBvd3CE)**
Thanks for fighting for marijuana justice alongside John.
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230420-8343-footer&t=1&refcode2=8343_434096_Bvd3CE&akid=8343%2E434096%2EBvd3CE)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8343%2E434096%2EBvd3CE)

It’s an entire month of giving back for Muslims across the world and a time to uplift our community and other marginalized communities. Part of having a healthy community is knowing that your neighbors care about you and will tend to your needs. It’s that same mentality that brought me to become a delegate and give my all every single day in the House to represent Loudouners. And it’s why I’m in this race for State Senate — to continue fighting for more Virginians. [**Whether you are a practicing Muslim or not, will you take part in celebrating this entire month of giving back by pitching in whatever you can to support the fight for justice for marginalized communities in our district?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62073266/402230370/888399412?refcode=em-20230420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQ1ZmY5YS1jNWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4b4LLrxJ842_uSZpyp35a9IS68PEOL5nNCuMY1xc1NA=) Today is also significant because in just 2 months, Virginians will be casting their votes in the Democratic primary for State Senate. There are so many issues on the line — voting rights, education equity, quality, affordable housing and healthcare for all, and a uniquely-Virginian Green New Deal. **Derek, this district needs a leader who will give their all to tackle these issues and fight for everyday people.** **[This work is going to take all of us coming together to ensure our rights are protected. This Eid al-Fitr, I hope you’ll join me in this fight and contribute what you can to the work that we're doing for Virginians across this state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62073267/402230371/888399412?refcode=em-20230420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQ1ZmY5YS1jNWRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4b4LLrxJ842_uSZpyp35a9IS68PEOL5nNCuMY1xc1NA=)** Eid Mubarak! name: CaucusRoom
subject: Can China Blight Our Food Production?
body:
DeSantis is not dead yet. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qutkjil-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday! Do you think[ _Biden should ditch Kamala_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-y/)?**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-t/) **Can China Blight Our Food Production?** **[China's influence on the U.S. agriculture industry has become a heightened concern,](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-i/) **particularly in the aftermath of a Chinese spycraft flying across the country earlier this year. **Expose it All** A lawsuit against Biden and Pfizer honchos who pushed for Alex Berenson's **[removal from Twitter for expressing concerns about the COVID vaccine could expose internal communications](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-d/).** **Indiana Pulls the Trigger** The state of Indiana has **[passed a bill that would use taxpayer dollars to fund voluntary firearm training](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-h/)** for teachers. **DOJ Thwarting Prosecution of Hunter** IRS agent has reported to the Justice Department's top watchdog that **[federal prosecutors appointed by Joe Biden have engaged in"preferential treatment and politics" to block criminal tax charges against presidential son Hunter Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-k/).** **Settlement Reached** Fox News and Dominion Voting Systems have **[reached a $787 Million settlement for the defamation lawsuit.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-u/)**

**Unqualified** The **[director of the ATF is under fire](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-o/)** for failing to provide the definition to the term 'assault weapon'. Why do we have these incompetent people in these jobs? **Flooding the Border** **[Mayorkas is predicting a surge of migrants](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-x/) **at the southern border when Title 42 expires next month. And he doesn't have a single plan to deal with it. Meanwhile, **[hundreds of Chinese men are heading toward the US border](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-m/)** right now. **DeSantis is Not Dead Yet** **[Rumors of his political death are not just greatly exaggerated](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-c/)** -- they are absurdly overwrought, although that's what a bout of bad national polling will do. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* I can't [**afford it**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-a/)
* Racist[ **roads**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qutkjil-trhiujldw-f/)**.**

body:
We owe our children, grandchildren, and the generations that come after us a commitment to ending the cycle of gun violence.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62073709/402231890/-1767934686?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjEwOGY0ZDUtYzZkZi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cEcCjBmFvCpY3hCaxDyh2uoJYEcnM2BNlpHP0d9aeNI=&emci=943f76cf-c6df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6108f4d5-c6df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)
---
| Peter,

Twenty-four years ago, the horrific tragedy at Columbine High School set us on a path of action to change our nation’s gun culture.

In the years since the memory of the twelve students and teachers who lost their lives sparked a movement to end gun violence.

There have been more than 375 school shootings since Columbine. And as a new generation bears witness to more mass shootings—from Sandy Hook to Uvalde and many more—we must let this anniversary serve as a reminder of the work ahead of us.

**We owe our children, grandchildren, and the generations that come after us a commitment to ending the cycle of gun violence.**

We have a long road ahead of us, but nothing is impossible. clean_body: We owe our children, grandchildren, and the generations that come after us a commitment to ending the cycle of gun violence. | | Peter, Twenty-four years ago, the horrific tragedy at Columbine High School set us on a path of action to change our nation’s gun culture. In the years since the memory of the twelve students and teachers who lost their lives sparked a movement to end gun violence. There have been more than 375 school shootings since Columbine. And as a new generation bears witness to more mass shootings—from Sandy Hook to Uvalde and many more—we must let this anniversary serve as a reminder of the work ahead of us. We owe our children, grandchildren, and the generations that come after us a commitment to ending the cycle of gun violence. We have a long road ahead of us, but nothing is impossible. | Together, we can end gun violence in our lifetime. name: Students for Life of America
subject: [4/20] Poll: Defund Planned Parenthood?
body:
Dear Friend,

**You’ve been selected to participate in a special PRO-LIFE OPINION POLL.**

Planned Parenthood committed 383,460 abortions last year alone according to their most recent annual report. And not long ago, _an undercover video investigation caught Planned Parenthood chopping up recently-aborted babies to sell off their organs for spare parts_.

Meanwhile, the Abortion Goliath raked in a whopping $633 MILLION in taxpayer funding.

**Not only that, but Planned Parenthood bragged about spending $50 MILLION to elect pro-abortion politicians during the 2022 Midterms!**

Students for Life of America, the largest pro-life youth organization in the nation with nearly 1,400 active groups, is conducting this opinion poll to help us gauge the enthusiasm of the pro-life movement.

[**Will you please click here to begin your PRO-LIFE OPINION POLL?**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8zsFutCAQwPGnwRsGBwW_A4f9unEPTXpt9ogwKA0Ii263vn3jtul1ZvKfn445eLcrIv8TgNnblQAQfiIAt-sjlvtHfL3Q62WkN_EWu2MJLwRg2zP-Xf5Gaozah2Mqz5VVWmiHtkLViB4Y9C1j1axaIawzsm-EQxxlh7zjXDje9Q5h7FzlFTDgrAUGwARv60aaRlo3jraT2Jp_pGXPR7VuHrqUlGJtUqyCmrctr0_RQGBY7-UT9zqXFLxDHbF4o-tUJgJDTiHQUS90019Z71iouy_WLxN1qdAc9LKgpVkXXLY5JUsPEs1HmA9rMYSfy5QJiLhO3hJ-_gGf3quibH74EPwqJGnZ9ISaFL8DAAD___8Lb6g)

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: AOC just reintroduced the Green New Deal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is major news.
#
Alexandria just reintroduced the Green New Deal resolution in Congress!
The Green New Deal (GND) envisions an economic mobilization much like what former President Franklin D. Roosevelt implemented during the Great Depression. It would create millions of good, union jobs all while repairing our infrastructure, reducing pollution, and building the 100% renewable energy future we need.
The GND also focuses on environmental justice — which means centering Indigenous and frontline communities that are suffering the worst effects of the climate crisis in the process.
[Today marks four years since Alexandria first introduced the Green New Deal in Congress. In honor of this anniversary, can you donate $4, $14, or $40 today to support this critical resolution to meet the climate crisis with the urgency and scope it demands?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230420.XLMgQG&refcode=em20230420-4199-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4199%2E2526796%2EbZWt9h)
Four years ago, very few people knew what a “Green New Deal” meant. But since then we’ve made a lot of progress:
* Last year, Congress made the biggest federal investment ever – $369 billion — to fight climate change through the Inflation Reduction Act.
* We secured another $100 million for 60 different local Green New Deal projects, stretching from Hawaii to Vermont.
* Our allies in Congress introduced 12 companion bills that apply the GND principles of jobs, justice, and climate to everything from agriculture to electric vehicles.
* Last Congress, more than half of Democrats sponsored a GND bill.

**Of course, there’s still a lot more to do.** While the investment Congress made last year to fight the climate crisis was meaningful, it still left a lot of work undone — particularly when it comes to the intersection between racial justice and climate policy. We need your help to continue building our progress.
[When it was first introduced, the GND was called ‘unrealistic’. But, thanks to your support, last year we won the largest climate investment in history. Can you make a contribution right now to help Alexandria keep up the fight for the Green New Deal in Congress and transformative policies like it?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230420.XLMgQG&refcode=em20230420-4199-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4199%2E2526796%2EbZWt9h)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230420.XLMgQG&refcode=em20230420-4199-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4199%2E2526796%2EbZWt9h)**
Thank you for your support,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230420?refcode=em20230420-4199-P_FND_RES_GND&t=22&refcode2=4199_2526796_bZWt9h&akid=4199%2E2526796%2EbZWt9h)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230420-4199-P_FND_RES_GND&t=23&akid=4199%2E2526796%2EbZWt9h)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4199%2E2526796%2EbZWt9h) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4199%2E2526796%2EbZWt9h) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4199%2E2526796%2EbZWt9h)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

body:
| | | Peter, Whether you’re one of the 118 million adults in the U.S. who have used marijuana or not, we hope you’ll agree: This 4/20, it’s high time for cannabis justice nationwide. **The fight to legalize cannabis, expunge all prior criminal records, and invest in communities hit by the war on drugs is one of the most important racial and economic justice fights of our time.** And we’re calling on our representatives to act. **[Will you sign the petition to tell Congress to legalize, expunge, and invest in communities harmed by cannabis criminalization **For decades, fearmongering about cannabis that is completely divorced from science and reality has ruined lives.** In 2020 and 2021, an estimated 396,856 arrests were made just for the possession of cannabis.1 That’s 396,856 crises devastating our families and our communities — particularly Black and brown communities — for having a substance that only 12% of the country thinks should be illegal.2 And with the federal government listing cannabis alongside heroin and LSD as a Schedule 1 drug, too many of these arrests lead to severe prison sentences and criminal records that make it almost impossible to find housing and jobs. Last year, the House of Representatives passed a bill that would:
* Remove cannabis from the list of scheduled substances,
* Eliminate criminal penalties for manufacturing, distributing, and possessing cannabis,
* Expunge convictions and conduct sentencing review hearings,
* Ensure that people are not denied federal benefits and protections based on cannabis-related conduct,
* Grow our economy by making small business loans and services available to legitimate businesses and providers, and
* Invest in the communities that have been hit hardest by the war on drugs.

But when the new Congress took office in January, the bill died. **We’re calling on our representatives to reintroduce cannabis justice legislation that legalizes cannabis, expunges criminal records, and invests in our communities. clean_body: | | | Peter, Whether you’re one of the 118 million adults in the U.S. who have used marijuana or not, we hope you’ll agree: This 4/20, it’s high time for cannabis justice nationwide. The fight to legalize cannabis, expunge all prior criminal records, and invest in communities hit by the war on drugs is one of the most important racial and economic justice fights of our time. And we’re calling on our representatives to act. For decades, fearmongering about cannabis that is completely divorced from science and reality has ruined lives. In 2020 and 2021, an estimated 396,856 arrests were made just for the possession of cannabis.1 That’s 396,856 crises devastating our families and our communities — particularly Black and brown communities — for having a substance that only 12% of the country thinks should be illegal.2 And with the federal government listing cannabis alongside heroin and LSD as a Schedule 1 drug, too many of these arrests lead to severe prison sentences and criminal records that make it almost impossible to find housing and jobs. Last year, the House of Representatives passed a bill that would: Remove cannabis from the list of scheduled substances, Eliminate criminal penalties for manufacturing, distributing, and possessing cannabis, Expunge convictions and conduct sentencing review hearings, Ensure that people are not denied federal benefits and protections based on cannabis-related conduct, Grow our economy by making small business loans and services available to legitimate businesses and providers, and Invest in the communities that have been hit hardest by the war on drugs. But when the new Congress took office in January, the bill died. We’re calling on our representatives to reintroduce cannabis justice legislation that legalizes cannabis, expunges criminal records, and invests in our communities. And if this Congress doesn’t get the job done, we’ll elect more progressive champions in 2024 who will. In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. , U.S. News & World Report, October 17, 2022 2\. , Pew Research Center, April 13, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. I’m committed to being a true advocate for everyday Arizonans just like you.

In Congress, I will:
* Ban corporate PACs
* Expand access to affordable healthcare
* Protect the right to choose

body:
| | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg1_pxBXmqTYJWLC7V4S6hHcUkOtFdd1iTOEBJx7gTpUiXPYE3Hws0cyFKDEpmCBRPL3oyH7bAPiXJsOQDtwwDShfSxid5Vh681J3K74iVTuM93o3cNdQT0t1n7Ou3j40Zt6Vnbb_Z_NmeH2I6DDKOX0/3vi/mSpVtKksSJ-wTEPqZ-vGiQ/h0/Z6Ai_7ECMpJpxxPKfBdUr4wyBEPllkLoLTKmckdCb8M) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.

[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqmA69ikdZBGzploS2d8ZuzecSAkI3gjOXjgjuPtbPE82RFwfQ6-kgT_cb-o9evG2qBMNoKcCYnFDdNzRbwYVImd1Jf4_67rA6a99t3dFta9Vl_71nV5G6KS8z_ThbhtnpfG0p0Zu3PZm9e8Md-zULmhmZvTnxhLJzJgodDrY88Wg/3vi/mSpVtKksSJ-wTEPqZ-vGiQ/h1/MOqZhK50Myp0qYoSeIIODJb2dq0myox_4xWC0VWxHtk)
Friend, it’s been a few weeks since I last gave you an update on the Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic, on which I serve as the ranking member.

**Since we last spoke, our subcommittee has met again and the extreme rhetoric, attacks, and misinformation from Congressional Republicans has only amplified.
**
[**_Can you help my team fight back against these far-right attacks with a donation of $5 today? »_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKMESXaE6NL3dPa6SXUcsfAu09gEEfUoVMl39JeMmoiVI-rOw3AeRMFUFDHaYvhlkQpUr6Yz6QO4gEkke9BL0OTml9MJfVY0n-bLdaK1KnTZCsFb87JQVPHYaKW_9k_TgC_9eaAeuGIRVqPSZ0440IC82aP_ECE6vgas0Cfj0jyLJObTGfiuAX30BETzp2JuAWRwu_DJmkNMC3Fu0sOauafPO6Whetjw1lvyf9npnMUS4pZXBeTQQ5IM0KJvPwRgEEvSZnAxbuB7_OJsO31OVLiwjZ43PzAhdiWhWXmNIBCdwQwaJVARoEx1nwuHRIfMc7rufaoEFX8nmtgEu16V-6YAaQ4aP7UXxYoArjKtNoqBo/3vi/mSpVtKksSJ-wTEPqZ-vGiQ/h2/QnSh0DcDUh0y_h-34TYYg_DHwwkfxd8K-76MlV1XyGQ) I’ll be honest, friend, I’m getting pretty sick and tired of hearing the same tired lies, and conspiracy theories lobbed at the CDC, Dr. Fauci, teachers unions, and Democratic leaders. Instead of drawing insightful or productive conclusions about the COVID-19 response, Republicans on the committee have chosen to politicize this tragedy.
**That’s not my focus.** I’m focused on making our communities, our schools, and our health care system **more resilient for the** _**future pandemics**_ , god forbid we face one again.

I’m focused on addressing the underlying inequities that disproportionately harmed underserved communities and school districts, specifically majority Latino, African American, or Native American ones.

I’m focusing on continuing to provide increased funding and resources to these communities and school districts so we can better address and prevent future pandemics.

I’m eager, however, for committee members on both sides of the aisle to set aside partisan rhetoric, and get to work on real bipartisan work among my colleagues for the good of the public.

Thank you for taking a moment to read this email. I'll be in touch again soon.

_— Dr. Raul Ruiz_

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, it’s been a few weeks since I last gave you an update on the Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic, on which I serve as the ranking member. Since we last spoke, our subcommittee has met again and the extreme rhetoric, attacks, and misinformation from Congressional Republicans has only amplified. I’ll be honest, friend, I’m getting pretty sick and tired of hearing the same tired lies, and conspiracy theories lobbed at the CDC, Dr. Fauci, teachers unions, and Democratic leaders. Instead of drawing insightful or productive conclusions about the COVID-19 response, Republicans on the committee have chosen to politicize this tragedy. That’s not my focus. I’m focused on making our communities, our schools, and our health care system more resilient for the future pandemics , god forbid we face one again. I’m focused on addressing the underlying inequities that disproportionately harmed underserved communities and school districts, specifically majority Latino, African American, or Native American ones. I’m focusing on continuing to provide increased funding and resources to these communities and school districts so we can better address and prevent future pandemics. I’m eager, however, for committee members on both sides of the aisle to set aside partisan rhetoric, and get to work on real bipartisan work among my colleagues for the good of the public. Thank you for taking a moment to read this email. I'll be in touch again soon. — Dr. Raul Ruiz A quick note from Rep. Ruiz's campaign team: Hi team, we're incredibly proud of the work that Dr. Ruiz is doing on this new Select Committee. name: Team TNDP
subject: Legalize it.
body:
No one should be sitting in jail for weed, Peter. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62074823/402235463/-775277641?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230420_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmY0MDMwMC1jYmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kr_yDSmr5-2dOfb2KqSFUSKEFPfhwt3nkWbjtEhuvZo=)
---
Peter, it’s past time we end our prohibition on marijuana. Weed arrests and convictions mirror the racial injustices of this country, and exacerbates the racial disparities present in our criminal justice system — despite similar rates of use between racial groups. **We shouldn’t be locking Tennesseans up for use of a substance that is legal for use in nearly 40 states.** We have to not just legalize and regulate marijuana, we must ensure that we do the work to repair the racial inequities the war on drugs created. That means expunging the records of anyone who was penalized for marijuana crimes in the past. [**Peter — If you’re with us and believe in the full legalization of marijuana, will you add your name right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62074849/402235491/-14091694?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230420_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmY0MDMwMC1jYmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kr_yDSmr5-2dOfb2KqSFUSKEFPfhwt3nkWbjtEhuvZo=&emci=182d220e-bfdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=22f40300-cbdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62074850/402235492/-14091694?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230420_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmY0MDMwMC1jYmRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kr_yDSmr5-2dOfb2KqSFUSKEFPfhwt3nkWbjtEhuvZo=&emci=182d220e-bfdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=22f40300-cbdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)

Thanks for your support in this fight,

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: My refusal to enforce COVID mandates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Democrats love to talk about the toll COVID-19 had on the American public. But do you ever hear them talk about the drug pandemic? The border crisis?
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=e3fc1199f33b4cf48ed3908afccab8b1&_t=tQ02_IbMEy0FVE-KQSPBOUmOnLhG-BkJrpUs2q8L2OmdbEZeIJOVS6hwv5w55v7xrKhczLn2geg6PH3zGOYYFlKtXbHQlzlFuEB6pi0xJqc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=e3fc1199f33b4cf48ed3908afccab8b1&_t=tQ02_IbMEy0FVE-KQSPBOUmOnLhG-BkJrpUs2q8L2OmdbEZeIJOVS6hwv5w55v7xrKhczLn2geg6PH3zGOYYFlKtXbHQlzlFuEB6pi0xJqc%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e3fc1199f33b4cf48ed3908afccab8b1&_e=MrZcch1MkUIjtM4dX4Zn7pBPFwpXsIA2jjxzaN7P_bjsAl5vVzl-F4PbNhGR3KnWQsHKrAiiGMRJ5WBSq9zyZNwfIuXNRaongsES4dEXSs2si0CtSIXM7FXEk6UAPSC3cL_rqaV6FrwxwDF6HeFN_TJMlYfNRq1tF2I25lmcOaAE6qb1bc1EhbDrFN8-XacHkFxDpoGvg6qrljYuizn57KAM3Z8RmMV6jinidStnNXBWWk1WiBOAQlTHSbQi-1teUda6NpxHCNP2EHu3PuRU8PD8-8lw2z2WfxxFXOARilUgeS00Rdus1hI24j_MW0FADroZNZ8KAcDW6yjlG9fv4_i_C2o0wstzFpMSFw-BzVCegDc6mA7pHuZkBzAS5A-0Bu8uAZaFYL35GNa98fC7g6FalkT5eCc7vYCW2kjADZ0vAxZFd1Oq-U9rxtOgnEfgdJv6naiiB1coUbOGIe2FvM8kTqWKajXViGqMYT8OqmFX1iaG5eOmd_eUVz-ZHUo_FByq2Rg4pt-NTrUmhIV0UnGkByRQba0-0iU9Daqt_N4%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

When COVID-19 hit the United States, government officials around the country collectively decided that instead of following the science, they would mimic the mitigation efforts of the Communist Party of China and lock everyone down. When the then-governor of Arizona issued a stay-at-home lockdown order in March 2020, **I declined to enforce it in Pinal County due to its unconstitutional nature.**

**I not only stand by my decision, but I would also make the same call again under similar circumstances.**

Law enforcement officials in the United States should never again be faced with making the decision I had to make in the spring of 2020. As American citizens, having the freedom to choose where we go and when we do it is nearly as important as freedom of speech. While Republican governors did a quick about-face, Democrat-controlled states would still be locked down if not for the public outrage that forced their hands.

**In 2023, the only lockdown that I support is of our southern border with Mexico**.
[**STAND WITH SHERIFF MARK LAMB
SECURE THE BORDER-> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e3fc1199f33b4cf48ed3908afccab8b1&_e=MrZcch1MkUIjtM4dX4Zn7pBPFwpXsIA2jjxzaN7P_bjsAl5vVzl-F4PbNhGR3KnWQsHKrAiiGMRJ5WBSq9zyZNwfIuXNRaongsES4dEXSs2si0CtSIXM7FXEk6UAPSC3cL_rqaV6FrwxwDF6HeFN_TJMlYfNRq1tF2I25lmcOaAE6qb1bc1EhbDrFN8-XacHkFxDpoGvg6qrljYuizn57KAM3Z8RmMV6jinidStnNXBWWk1WiBOAQlTHSbQi-1teUda6NpxHCNP2EHu3PuRU8PD8-8lw2z2WfxxFXOARilUgeS00Rdus1hI24j_MW0FADroZNZ8KAcDW6yjlG9fv4_i_C2o0wstzFpMSFw-BzVCegDc6mA7pHuZkBzAS5A-0Bu8uAZaFYL35GNa98fC7g3rxN5Pspx3SB_ehnuk7TdNDuRmXLYkgd-JEM6Iv9tOzsq8p5c0MzlgQe1BEXKqBqH1SmqYTHpKSi8wk_Z2CcIjtMcMZvKvRCEuh3K3eFEymik4GHX59loVvCVwLHFO6Z2yuQgZHAknQj8EspPrviJs%3D)
Democrats love to talk about the COVID-19 death toll, but when have you ever heard them talking about the death toll resulting from cartel-imported fentanyl? Or the number of arrests we’ve made of members on the United States terrorist watchlist?

**There have been 1,029,953 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944!**

**[Do you support a general lockdown of the southern border? Let me know.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e3fc1199f33b4cf48ed3908afccab8b1&_e=MrZcch1MkUIjtM4dX4Zn7pBPFwpXsIA2jjxzaN7P_bjsAl5vVzl-F4PbNhGR3KnWQsHKrAiiGMRJ5WBSq9zyZNwfIuXNRaongsES4dEXSs2si0CtSIXM7FXEk6UAPSC3cL_rqaV6FrwxwDF6HeFN_TJMlYfNRq1tF2I25lmcOaAE6qb1bc1EhbDrFN8-XacHkFxDpoGvg6qrljYuizn57KAM3Z8RmMV6jinidStnNXBWWk1WiBOAQlTHSbQi-1teUda6NpxHCNP2EHu3PuRU8PD8-8lw2z2WfxxFXOARilUgeS00Rdus1hI24j_MW0FADroZNZ8KAcDW6yjlG9fv4_i_C2o0wstzFpMSFw-BzVCegDc6mA7pHuZkBzAS5A-0Bu8uAZaFYL35GNa98fC7gxR9Z8PXkd7hQXMaLBAQdCeYdKYTBvZ2UufKrG3yhcLSwwJc6ZztIyrto2RRgkEPZza0LzHDPbU7simObMiBh9-VMxktI7vll-wNLq4hvrBnz4gk1qupiV9sRppYeYaWnSzDqepsyTb-hE1XvefocLc%3D)** As an Arizona Sheriff, I’ve seen the good, the bad, and the ugly. Right now, I’m truly not sure how much more hideous things in our neck of the woods can get.

[**STAND WITH SHERIFF MARK LAMB

Under President Biden, conditions along the southern border have gone from bad to WORSE. Trust me, I would know. **As Sheriff of the 3rd most populous country in Arizona – and home of the main artery between the border and Phoenix,** my deputies and I deal with illegal migrants and drug smugglers every single day.

When President Biden took office, we lost all lines of communication with law enforcement officials in Washington. It’s almost like they ... want open borders.

Under President Biden, we have seen:
* A 377% increase in traffic stops involving human smuggling
* A 451% increase in pursuits involving human smuggling,
* A 610% increase in fentanyl pill seizures

So much work must be done to quell the unrest at the border. While I’m more than up for the job, **I’m running for the United States Senate because Americans need a federal official who understands how to secure the border properly, not one who jumps into action only when an election is on the horizon.**

Fellow Conservative, I’m running for the United States Senate to expose Joe Biden and his allies in the Democrat Party. Their inaction on border-related issues has resulted in the death of hundreds of thousands of Americans.

Democrats don’t want you to know that in border states like Arizona, New Mexico, and Texas, Mexican drug cartels are recruiting drivers off Craigslist to ferry illicit drugs and migrants from the border to large interior cities.

**If Democrats can’t even be trusted to monitor Craigslist for these types of postings, how can we ever trust them to get the border in check? **

As a sheriff, I’ve spent my career protecting people and keeping citizens safe—every man, woman, and child. But there’s no greater call than to protect the hearts and minds of our little children. Right now, Washington is not only putting future generations at risk with their reckless spending, but even more so in their failure to secure the southern border.

name: 2024 Alert (via UD)
subject: Peter didn’t sign the letter?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
we have to show support NOW

| Peter, last week we asked you to sign our letter calling on President Biden to run for reelection.

We thought Democrats like you would jump at the opportunity – **_but we still don’t have enough signatures!_**

[So we’re calling on you once again: Chip in $3 to sign our open letter telling Joe Biden that we want him to run for reelection – and that he has our vote! »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62075658/402238060/1898476523?amount=3&refcode=UD_20230420_EMLTR_E1_T0_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyMDdiMjExLWNmZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tukjYFWHE5zEKLtr_oxTygd2WOa5l8_blusmUm7-UlQ=) | [CHIP IN $3 TO TELL JOE BIDEN YOU SUPPORT HIS REELECTION »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62075665/402238063/1898476523?amount=3&refcode=UD_20230420_EMLTR_E1_T0_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyMDdiMjExLWNmZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tukjYFWHE5zEKLtr_oxTygd2WOa5l8_blusmUm7-UlQ=)

**BUT IF** we all step up and show President Biden he has our support, he’ll be able to win reelection and **our progressive priorities will be safe from MAGA Republicans!**

Dear President Biden,

For the last 2 years, you’ve fearlessly led the country out of a pandemic, through Republican extremism, and forward into progress.

**Because of your leadership, we’re all far better off than we were before you became president!**

I wanted to tell you that, despite dishonest Republican attacks, I am 100% with you and I want you to run again in 2024!

_**This link to our LIVE POLL was generated for dpwillis67@gmail.com only. Deadline: 11:59 p.m.**_
---
Today marks 24 years since the shooting and attempted bombing at Columbine high school. Fifteen precious lives were lost that day. **But the gun violence epidemic in our country has only gotten worse.**
From schools to banks, grocery stores to malls, Americans are forced every day to contend with the reality that the next mass shooting could be at any place, in any state. **But it doesn’t have to be this way. We can prevent these tragedies by replacing incompetent, do-nothing GOP leaders with bold Democratic women ready to make change. **
Leaders like **State Rep. Gloria Johnson** , a founder of Emerge Tennessee, who has fought for red-flag bills, and **State Sen. London Lamar (Emerge Tennessee)** who has fought for stricter permitting requirements.
Leaders like **Congresswoman Lucy McBath (Emerge Georgia),** who ran for Congress after she lost her son to gun violence, turned her activism into legislation. McBath was instrumental in seeing the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act of 2022 – the first major national legislative action on gun violence prevention in almost 30 years – signed into law. **But the majority of Republicans in Congress voted NO.**
**Peter, it’s going to take persistent pressure from our movement to achieve real lifesaving action. That’s why we’re asking 47 more Emerge community members – including you – to respond to our urgent poll before the deadline at midnight tonight:**
**Do you think Congress should address the gun violence epidemic?**
| | | [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62075610/402237997/-86135032?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1186-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4MDdiMjExLWNmZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gOLYCqln7YEPUir36r5hd7kJMIkIReEYg_shZLCgwrY=&emci=1b4760a4-0fde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7807b211-cfdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)
---
| [NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62075619/402238012/-86135032?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1186-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4MDdiMjExLWNmZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gOLYCqln7YEPUir36r5hd7kJMIkIReEYg_shZLCgwrY=&emci=1b4760a4-0fde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7807b211-cfdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)

_**This link to our LIVE POLL was gen erated for dpwillis67@gmail.com only. Deadline: 11:59 p.m. **_
Thank you for speaking up today as we work toward real solutions.

– Team Emerge
|

Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. **[If you’d like to donate, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62075628/402238021/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1186-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4MDdiMjExLWNmZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gOLYCqln7YEPUir36r5hd7kJMIkIReEYg_shZLCgwrY=)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: this is urgent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
I’m furious.
| | |
---
Friend, this is urgent: **corrupt GOP lawmakers in Ohio are trying to ram a bill through the state legislature that’ll make it harder for folks to have a voice in our democracy. I’m furious.**
This is a GOP power grab, plain and simple, designed to stop the organizers across Ohio who are fighting to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution.
We’ve seen pro-choice majorities succeed in other states when abortion access is on the ballot. Now it’s time for Ohioans to get that same chance to make their voices heard – without any new barriers in place.
**I’m working as hard as I can to fight back against this latest attack on reproductive rights, but I need to know you’re with me. Will you respond to my live poll now?**

Fellow American,

Things got a little heated on CNN.

While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms."

**That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years.** His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology.

My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e3b730c40c4b4d3b8611176e53a28c29&_e=LItrBMYbQuxA5MWetkuEd0sTtCq9caZiHeE1coswHmqCy0ZEnp7mU0i4qxrvWgK3STcfmLd-ynOYKmrn12BfcFYy3iuHSnQgbO3z9p5ZBR3u_3rMV8NFqlQD3chEGDY86hw-CL8h_Z7vqRhxh0-bfHwWJoWwq2KqbFEqELrp-JxxC3zC7xLcVxyburmtYwsSQvSrn2xgxhXe4uA5LTIunJmxZfVhcWkMW-ZB3Iv0O7jpgr-lOB4dXRkIC9YVv1YoN4aHcnNvw73SYxV-94_HbiEORWGUzP5ZHwN8La4tMe2opRWRqzO7HXGl3-3w4pt7Sb1LBiEgg9Q5J2sm6pNJKJiaFH4eV1qstPHZ33wZo0_vtWXX2JLfK6eOW2ko9Xpaet0n5XQUtwZlysHeF4GuZw%3D%3D)
I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me.

**I refuse to back down, Fellow American.** I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August.

In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. **[Any amount will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. I need your help to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e3b730c40c4b4d3b8611176e53a28c29&_e=LItrBMYbQuxA5MWetkuEd0sTtCq9caZiHeE1coswHmqCy0ZEnp7mU0i4qxrvWgK3STcfmLd-ynOYKmrn12BfcFYy3iuHSnQgbO3z9p5ZBR3u_3rMV8NFqlQD3chEGDY86hw-CL8h_Z7vqRhxh0-bfHwWJoWwq2KqbFEqELrp-JxxC3zC7xLcVxyburmtYwsSQvSrn2xgxhXe4uA5LTIunJmxZfVhcWkMW-ZB3Iv0O7jpgr-lOB4dXRkIC9YVv1YoAMBYud25VlIONtwKO1s3S8cmjLGUzvjJ-FHehb_KupSw6bEsZ_MJMQAgPJsDwyAwDElD2g9BdkXurrOJ58BnQ-S7Htke1knxopJEbPsdM3yy4RHafjP7NBXAEaW2LnfDniYXw7lKx0295Jp7i4mNKQ%3D%3D)**

**[Please consider making a small donation to my campaign today. Your contribution will help me continue my fight to revive the values that this nation was founded on: free speech. The rule of law. Excellence over grievance.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e3b730c40c4b4d3b8611176e53a28c29&_e=LItrBMYbQuxA5MWetkuEd0sTtCq9caZiHeE1coswHmqCy0ZEnp7mU0i4qxrvWgK3STcfmLd-ynOYKmrn12BfcFYy3iuHSnQgbO3z9p5ZBR3u_3rMV8NFqlQD3chEGDY86hw-CL8h_Z7vqRhxh0-bfHwWJoWwq2KqbFEqELrp-JxxC3zC7xLcVxyburmtYwsSQvSrn2xgxhXe4uA5LTIunJmxZfVhcWkMW-ZB3Iv0O7jpgr-lOB4dXRkIC9YVv1Yo9XHdZdar9hBqllJZGAHFDper9t4gVeIYJHPKY-QorM8hJZHDlwQ6c1KFlVD6ZkcKeICwYy5xkNBiVIDR2q2OK1OOce1cikNBoonwR8Wn098rPk_UG0CIUSBZnxrAuKPKe-gGM13DjaZxaBD2KUVUyw%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e3b730c40c4b4d3b8611176e53a28c29&_e=LItrBMYbQuxA5MWetkuEd0sTtCq9caZiHeE1coswHmqCy0ZEnp7mU0i4qxrvWgK3STcfmLd-ynOYKmrn12BfcFYy3iuHSnQgbO3z9p5ZBR3u_3rMV8NFqlQD3chEGDY86hw-CL8h_Z7vqRhxh0-bfHwWJoWwq2KqbFEqELrp-JxxC3zC7xLcVxyburmtYwsSQvSrn2xgxhXe4uA5LTIunJmxZfVhcWkMW-ZB3Iv0O7jpgr-lOB4dXRkIC9YVv1Yo00QR9s1qSmzQyPEbhXT_S5XtpK5VfaQzokbzihOKFoQckTZNE85msSqbFWM2YYOarZV7j953D08XxLtXRWUNkRKpujjAleMtn2QsfjIaGqS6PYuhbXCgSpgr1sd3zbmCOtW93KQJVT2UUfDbMvMAMw%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Friend, today marks exactly **six years** since I announced my first campaign for Congress and began the work of flipping a seat blue that the Republicans had controlled for nearly four decades.

[**This next campaign could be my closest one yet for VA-10, and I'll be relying heavily on grassroots supporters like you once again. To help us sustain our outreach efforts throughout 2023 and into 2024, can you commit to a monthly recurring donation of just $6?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62076867/402241343/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230420SY_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=6&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ViMjcxOC1kNGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zj33tvtkmxfvR8-kDgiuwwNA9OrB1LE3onzD2NKcP2o=) [Donate $6 Monthly ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62076868/402241344/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230420SY_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=6&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ViMjcxOC1kNGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zj33tvtkmxfvR8-kDgiuwwNA9OrB1LE3onzD2NKcP2o=) As I look back on all of our team's accomplishments, all the challenges we've faced, and all the changes (both good and bad) in our country since then, I am more determined than ever to keep being a voice for the people of Northern Virginia.

I'm proud to have backed policies that have led to record job creation and economic growth. I'm proud to have backed historic legislation that took on pharmaceutical companies and lifted up our efforts to combat climate change. But progress in our country is only possible when we recognize that the status quo must always be improved.

The threats to reproductive choice and our very democracy are too great for me to be complacent. And there's still so much more to be done to lower the cost of living, improve the quality of education, and make our planet a cleaner place to live.

**So today, as I look back on six years of our journey together, I want to thank you for your steadfast support — and let you know that I aim to keep being your voice for many more years to come.**

[**That's why I'm asking you to make a $6 monthly recurring contribution.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62076869/402241345/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230420SY_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=6&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ViMjcxOC1kNGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zj33tvtkmxfvR8-kDgiuwwNA9OrB1LE3onzD2NKcP2o=)** ** The funds we raise over the next few months will pay dividends as the cycle picks up. Building up a strong recurring base of donations now means that we'll be able to recruit a field team, launch digital ads, and invest in future TV spots ahead of schedule.

The last six years have taught me time and time again that campaigns are a team effort. And you are what makes this team so incredible.

Thank you,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62076870/402241346/-772585877?refcode=refcode=EM_FR_230420SY_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ViMjcxOC1kNGRmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zj33tvtkmxfvR8-kDgiuwwNA9OrB1LE3onzD2NKcP2o=)****
