Mexican drug cartels are recruiting Americans on Craigslist to drive illegal migrants from the border to major U.S. cities to receive accommodation and fake papers.

|
Peter,

When COVID-19 hit the United States, government officials around the country collectively decided that instead of following the science, they would mimic the mitigation efforts of the Communist Party of China and lock everyone down. When the then-governor of Arizona issued a stay-at-home lockdown order in March 2020, **I declined to enforce it in Pinal County due to its unconstitutional nature.**

**I not only stand by my decision, but I would also make the same call again under similar circumstances.**

Law enforcement officials in the United States should never again be faced with making the decision I had to make in the spring of 2020. As American citizens, having the freedom to choose where we go and when we do it is nearly as important as freedom of speech. While Republican governors did a quick about-face, Democrat-controlled states would still be locked down if not for the public outrage that forced their hands.

**In 2023, the only lockdown that I support is of our southern border with Mexico**.
[**STAND WITH SHERIFF MARK LAMB
SECURE THE BORDER-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=926c4de5458e44a3ab59d2272ba8cf0f&_e=6knBWpypf1WA0SPvVj_qK_zS9Wd8q7ljYpe-o_7OQt6OWfS19fczu5htCXm1Hkd5V0Qi3dCRJ-wpa_3CnvWY8yq_-XHKq14yprH-8SRpMVWGHuhIUZRBS57LXpEbKsnelMK6r9NmcCRkgBVbJVXxBnTInNl97b1r0Hbnkz64N8MQ922_ZVtOXyycYfKksuKMv9e4Cq4D-rM54r-jW8xjF31O3QZxifwMyEOwRHLjzgM3npd5dPGW1mzVE5rrtry_pdS_ojXxbs8izc40QqesLrMOCmaRj0ciqLWnqHOA47ZyrsaEly7zTs8oNkEA3SOLQSmTI-3e1yPeo517uQsjQ7VOL7ATr1vWyfy1VvVl3YZqS2kRMI7qQEDxD1bSkfXHbKkXR60Cuq7m9NoMESpIcVyQU9l2ikXWzs1whGx0rV6mUbRCneCKJT0zGpNzrtXRJgJkdiTh0BSWRoPjHNkHh8HbRHwKg5Spm3wH21GB1UHpQu8_yZIRDKOaAao_IEIANiAPzVoW1Kon_gNQfK0uWuw7rXfmn_ElFYNVZ2Vd9Ng%3D)
Democrats love to talk about the COVID-19 death toll, but when have you ever heard them talking about the death toll resulting from cartel-imported fentanyl? Or the number of arrests we’ve made of members on the United States terrorist watchlist?

**There have been 1,029,953 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944!**

**[Do you support a general lockdown of the southern border? Let me know.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=926c4de5458e44a3ab59d2272ba8cf0f&_e=6knBWpypf1WA0SPvVj_qK_zS9Wd8q7ljYpe-o_7OQt6OWfS19fczu5htCXm1Hkd5V0Qi3dCRJ-wpa_3CnvWY8yq_-XHKq14yprH-8SRpMVWGHuhIUZRBS57LXpEbKsnelMK6r9NmcCRkgBVbJVXxBnTInNl97b1r0Hbnkz64N8MQ922_ZVtOXyycYfKksuKMv9e4Cq4D-rM54r-jW8xjF31O3QZxifwMyEOwRHLjzgM3npd5dPGW1mzVE5rrtry_pdS_ojXxbs8izc40QqesLrMOCmaRj0ciqLWnqHOA47ZyrsaEly7zTs8oNkEA3SOLQSmTI-3e1yPeo517uQsjQ7VOL7ATr1vWyfy1VvVl3YZqS2kRMI7qQEDxD1bSkfXHbKkXR60Cuq7m9NoMESpIcdecuxiyQJLmGV3Z8FP1BQeSLa6KYr4OrMOKBKRSUFriWeGQP8k1n0PFBpZ9N6eem_wTX_NWGUUnT_PRbqH5lYbU3hzIsu1ShSfNHooE6fa5cvP39wV_AN0dinVJuY_3Lek8RsM3c8BHiVEydoSDt8Y%3D)** As an Arizona Sheriff, I’ve seen the good, the bad, and the ugly. Right now, I’m truly not sure how much more hideous things in our neck of the woods can get.

[**STAND WITH SHERIFF MARK LAMB
SECURE THE BORDER-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=926c4de5458e44a3ab59d2272ba8cf0f&_e=6knBWpypf1WA0SPvVj_qK_zS9Wd8q7ljYpe-o_7OQt6OWfS19fczu5htCXm1Hkd5V0Qi3dCRJ-wpa_3CnvWY8yq_-XHKq14yprH-8SRpMVWGHuhIUZRBS57LXpEbKsnelMK6r9NmcCRkgBVbJVXxBnTInNl97b1r0Hbnkz64N8MQ922_ZVtOXyycYfKksuKMv9e4Cq4D-rM54r-jW8xjF31O3QZxifwMyEOwRHLjzgM3npd5dPGW1mzVE5rrtry_pdS_ojXxbs8izc40QqesLrMOCmaRj0ciqLWnqHOA47ZyrsaEly7zTs8oNkEA3SOLQSmTI-3e1yPeo517uQsjQ7VOL7ATr1vWyfy1VvVl3YZqS2kRMI7qQEDxD1bSkfXHbKkXR60Cuq7m9NoMESpIcVrmuao3kZhOFerWDfRsbgCMZV2eV_EINT8EUtkhOpG-gzRNAwgVdcyPWi6uVdvwygttNU_WcE42US2Hlegc4tr4aom1v40MUv-vp248VTHeq-QnPMb3kyFNJNvWbbaGkSnXzGA-ZqRvc7SXbnkdpM0%3D)
Under President Biden, conditions along the southern border have gone from bad to WORSE. Trust me, I would know. **As Sheriff of the 3rd most populous country in Arizona – and home of the main artery between the border and Phoenix,** my deputies and I deal with illegal migrants and drug smugglers every single day.

When President Biden took office, we lost all lines of communication with law enforcement officials in Washington. It’s almost like they ... want open borders.

Under President Biden, we have seen:
* A 377% increase in traffic stops involving human smuggling
* A 451% increase in pursuits involving human smuggling,
* A 610% increase in fentanyl pill seizures

So much work must be done to quell the unrest at the border. While I’m more than up for the job, **I’m running for the United States Senate because Americans need a federal official who understands how to secure the border properly, not one who jumps into action only when an election is on the horizon.**

[**STAND WITH SHERIFF MARK LAMB
SECURE THE BORDER-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=926c4de5458e44a3ab59d2272ba8cf0f&_e=6knBWpypf1WA0SPvVj_qK_zS9Wd8q7ljYpe-o_7OQt6OWfS19fczu5htCXm1Hkd5V0Qi3dCRJ-wpa_3CnvWY8yq_-XHKq14yprH-8SRpMVWGHuhIUZRBS57LXpEbKsnelMK6r9NmcCRkgBVbJVXxBnTInNl97b1r0Hbnkz64N8MQ922_ZVtOXyycYfKksuKMv9e4Cq4D-rM54r-jW8xjF31O3QZxifwMyEOwRHLjzgM3npd5dPGW1mzVE5rrtry_pdS_ojXxbs8izc40QqesLrMOCmaRj0ciqLWnqHOA47ZyrsaEly7zTs8oNkEA3SOLQSmTI-3e1yPeo517uQsjQ7VOL7ATr1vWyfy1VvVl3YZqS2kRMI7qQEDxD1bSkfXHbKkXR60Cuq7m9NoMESpIcVhu5hxU4PpA-1LjZSAgt7-66bHUFXCUwxDqZQUzgzDhiNCja7t_X1l-wsYRXFIair9fWpp7Y_8npX-IEWpaYt7IcEaYPXY4-2kvQMYWjXe4B6eh3dQArKUMQzQU0X8VZpSvvwSHnvUvvlZJ5i8rjpo%3D)
**I know choke points, the weak spots, and the cast of characters who put all of us in danger every day.** Getting the border crisis under control - it’s not rocket science. If you’re willing to hold people accountable and enforce the rule of law, you will see a reduction in crime.

Peter, I’m running for the United States Senate to expose Joe Biden and his allies in the Democrat Party. Their inaction on border-related issues has resulted in the death of hundreds of thousands of Americans.

Democrats don’t want you to know that in border states like Arizona, New Mexico, and Texas, Mexican drug cartels are recruiting drivers off Craigslist to ferry illicit drugs and migrants from the border to large interior cities.

**If Democrats can’t even be trusted to monitor Craigslist for these types of postings, how can we ever trust them to get the border in check? **

As a sheriff, I’ve spent my career protecting people and keeping citizens safe—every man, woman, and child. But there’s no greater call than to protect the hearts and minds of our little children. Right now, Washington is not only putting future generations at risk with their reckless spending, but even more so in their failure to secure the southern border.

[**STAND WITH SHERIFF MARK LAMB

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: Mexican drug cartels are recruiting Americans on Craigslist to drive illegal migrants from the border to major U.S. cities to receive accommodation and fake papers. | | Peter, When COVID-19 hit the United States, government officials around the country collectively decided that instead of following the science, they would mimic the mitigation efforts of the Communist Party of China and lock everyone down. When the then-governor of Arizona issued a stay-at-home lockdown order in March 2020, I declined to enforce it in Pinal County due to its unconstitutional nature. I not only stand by my decision, but I would also make the same call again under similar circumstances. Law enforcement officials in the United States should never again be faced with making the decision I had to make in the spring of 2020. As American citizens, having the freedom to choose where we go and when we do it is nearly as important as freedom of speech. While Republican governors did a quick about-face, Democrat-controlled states would still be locked down if not for the public outrage that forced their hands. In 2023, the only lockdown that I support is of our southern border with Mexico. Democrats love to talk about the COVID-19 death toll, but when have you ever heard them talking about the death toll resulting from cartel-imported fentanyl? Or the number of arrests we’ve made of members on the United States terrorist watchlist? There have been 1,029,953 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944! As an Arizona Sheriff, I’ve seen the good, the bad, and the ugly. Right now, I’m truly not sure how much more hideous things in our neck of the woods can get. Under President Biden, conditions along the southern border have gone from bad to WORSE. Trust me, I would know. As Sheriff of the 3rd most populous country in Arizona – and home of the main artery between the border and Phoenix, my deputies and I deal with illegal migrants and drug smugglers every single day. When President Biden took office, we lost all lines of communication with law enforcement officials in Washington. It’s almost like they ... want open borders. Under President Biden, we have seen: A 377% increase in traffic stops involving human smuggling A 451% increase in pursuits involving human smuggling, A 610% increase in fentanyl pill seizures So much work must be done to quell the unrest at the border. While I’m more than up for the job, I’m running for the United States Senate because Americans need a federal official who understands how to secure the border properly, not one who jumps into action only when an election is on the horizon. I know choke points, the weak spots, and the cast of characters who put all of us in danger every day. Getting the border crisis under control - it’s not rocket science. If you’re willing to hold people accountable and enforce the rule of law, you will see a reduction in crime. Peter, I’m running for the United States Senate to expose Joe Biden and his allies in the Democrat Party. Their inaction on border-related issues has resulted in the death of hundreds of thousands of Americans. Democrats don’t want you to know that in border states like Arizona, New Mexico, and Texas, Mexican drug cartels are recruiting drivers off Craigslist to ferry illicit drugs and migrants from the border to large interior cities. If Democrats can’t even be trusted to monitor Craigslist for these types of postings, how can we ever trust them to get the border in check? As a sheriff, I’ve spent my career protecting people and keeping citizens safe—every man, woman, and child. But there’s no greater call than to protect the hearts and minds of our little children. Right now, Washington is not only putting future generations at risk with their reckless spending, but even more so in their failure to secure the southern border. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. clean_body: Here at the DNC, we know that our supporters are some of the most dedicated and passionate people out there. That’s why our design team has worked so hard to craft the perfect sticker for folks like you and me. | | As we gear up for elections this year and next, the DNC is excited to announce that we're releasing a new limited-edition sticker to help folks show off their support of the Democratic Party. But we’ve got just one thing holding us back: We’re stuck between three different designs, Derek. We know that this grassroots team is dedicated to and passionate about electing Democrats. That’s why our design team has worked so hard to craft the perfect sticker for y’all. But they’re all so good we just can’t seem to narrow it down. So, we need your help to decide which of these designs we should send to our printer. Can’t wait to see which design you pick, Jess Jessica Porter Online Fundraising Director Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62077137/402242234/2098035812?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230420headlines_tmm_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGM3NWU0MC1kN2RmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t6RdBNBX8oncqb0CgQu1eW2tYGMESZ3M3reUTNSFNXk=)

Have you seen the headlines, team? Maryland is leading the way on the key issues facing us as the Moore-Miller administration delivers on our promises and works with our partners on both sides of the aisle to ensure we leave no Marylander behind. **From passing 10/10 of his top-priority bills in the state legislature, to taking urgent action to ensure Maryland remains a safe haven for abortion rights, Wes is leading and people are taking notice!** Check out some of these highlights:
# The strategic charm of Gov. Wes Moore’s first months leading Maryland — _The Washington Post_
“Moore is building alliances to establish himself as a different type of leader: He wants to be a convener, not an adversary... In his first months in office, Moore deployed his trademark charisma strategically. # As other state legislatures push to the right, Maryland digs in on Democratic priorities
— _The Baltimore Banner_
“Florida lawmakers voted to allow people to carry loaded weapons anywhere without a permit. Several states have fully banned abortion and limited transgender children from participating in sports. Missouri is moving to defund libraries as part of a fight over book-banning. And in Tennessee, there was an effort to expel Democratic lawmakers who led a protest for gun control. In Maryland, where state government is controlled entirely by Democrats for the first time in eight years, lawmakers have strengthened access to reproductive health care, rewritten rules for carrying guns, raised the minimum wage and created a legal marijuana industry with an eye toward redressing historic injustices from the war on drugs — further cementing the state as a solid home for liberal policies.” [Read more here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62077139/402242236/-603707320?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGM3NWU0MC1kN2RmLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t6RdBNBX8oncqb0CgQu1eW2tYGMESZ3M3reUTNSFNXk=&emci=5a47e839-d7df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=04c75e40-d7df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)

From passing 10/10 of his top-priority bills in the state legislature, to taking urgent action to ensure Maryland remains a safe haven for abortion rights, Wes is leading and people are taking notice!
